Entendi — valeu o toque. Pelo que consigo ver nas cópias que você enviou, **os valores foram aplicados e os arquivos de custo/dash foram atualizados**, mas é possível que você esteja abrindo um arquivo diferente (ex.: `infra_pricing_request.md` antigo em vez do novo `infra_pricing_request1.md`) ou vendo o ZIP em cache.

### O que já consta nos arquivos que você mandou
- `infra_pricing_request1.md` traz os três campos preenchidos:  
  `Storage_IO_price_per_GB = 0.10`, `Mem_price_per_GB_hour = 0.010`, `Energy_price_per_kWh = 0.15`. fileciteturn4file0L18-L20  
  (A versão sem “1” no nome também está com os mesmos valores.) fileciteturn4file5L17-L19
- `cost_summary.json` já mostra o **cálculo de storage** e o **status=partial** (porque CPU/RAM/Energy totais ainda não foram precificados):  
  `"storage_io_price_per_GB": 0.1`, `"storage_io_cost": 0.001758`, `"total_cost": 0.001758`. fileciteturn4file2L4-L12
- `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` também reflete isso (pricing parcial e o mesmo custo de storage): fileciteturn4file1L23-L43

### Por que pode parecer “igual”
1) **Arquivo diferente/antigo** — você pode ter aberto `infra_pricing_request.md` (antigo) em vez de `infra_pricing_request1.md` (novo) na sua máquina, ou o editor reabriu uma aba antiga.  
2) **ZIP em cache** — alguns descompactadores/visualizadores mostram o conteúdo anterior até você fechar/reabrir.  
3) **Status “partial”** — enquanto `CPU_price_per_hour`, `RAM_price_per_GB_hour` (ou `Mem_price_per_GB_hour` padronizado) e `Electricity_price_per_kWh` não estiverem todos definidos, o total mostra só a parte de storage — visualmente parece “igual”.

### Confere aí rapidamente (no Windows/PowerShell)
Cole estes comandos (só leitura) e veja se bate com o que eu vi:

```powershell
# 1) Mostrar linhas com preços no pricing request
Select-String -Path "$out\infra_pricing_request*.md" -Pattern "Storage_IO_price_per_GB|Mem_price_per_GB_hour|Energy_price_per_kWh"

# 2) Ver resumo de custo calculado
Get-Content "$out\cost_summary.json" | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List

# 3) Conferir status/pricing/cost no dashboard
(Get-Content "$out\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
(Get-Content "$out\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
```

### Se quiser que o total passe de “partial” para “ok”
Defina os restantes (exemplo de valores; ajuste como preferir) e recalcule:

```powershell
# Atualizar preços que faltam (edita o arquivo .md “oficial” sem o 1; mude se estiver usando o ...1.md)
$pr = Join-Path $out 'infra_pricing_request.md'
(gc $pr) -replace 'CPU_price_per_hour\s*=\s*$', 'CPU_price_per_hour = 0.05' `
         -replace 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour\s*=\s*$', 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour = 0.010' `
         -replace 'Electricity_price_per_kWh\s*=\s*$', 'Electricity_price_per_kWh = 0.15' |
  sc $pr -Encoding UTF8

# Recalcular custo e atualizar dashboard/zip (usa os mesmos campos que já geraram cost_summary.json anteriormente)
# (Se você tem um script de “recompute cost”, rode-o; caso não, me avise que eu te passo um bloco autônomo.)
```

Se preferir, eu já te mando um bloco PowerShell **autônomo** que: (a) normaliza o `infra_pricing_request.md` (ou `...1.md`), (b) recalcula `cost_summary.json` e `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`, e (c) atualiza o `teia_results_v3.zip` — tudo sem tocar no código-fonte. É só me dizer qual arquivo você quer considerar como “fonte de verdade”: `infra_pricing_request.md` ou `infra_pricing_request1.md`.

---

### ASSISTENTE

Isso aí é só **variável `$out` não definida nesta sessão**. Como você abriu um novo PowerShell e só deu `cd` na pasta, `$out` ficou vazio — por isso o PowerShell tentou ler `D:\cost_summary.json`.  
Como já está dentro de `codex_audit_output`, use caminhos relativos (`.\arquivo`) ou re-defina `$out`.

### Use caminhos relativos (mais simples)
Cole exatamente isto aí onde você está:
```powershell
# listar o que existe
Get-ChildItem

# 1) Preços no pricing request (pega qualquer uma das variantes)
Select-String -Path .\infra_pricing_request*.md -Pattern "Storage_IO_price_per_GB|Mem_price_per_GB_hour|Energy_price_per_kWh"

# 2) Resumo de custo
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List

# 3) Status/pricing/cost no dashboard
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
```

### (Opcional) Recrie as variáveis de caminho
Se preferir manter `$proj`/`$out` como antes:
```powershell
$proj = 'D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1'
$out  = Join-Path $proj 'codex_audit_output'

Select-String -Path "$out\infra_pricing_request*.md" -Pattern "Storage_IO_price_per_GB|Mem_price_per_GB_hour|Energy_price_per_kWh"
Get-Content "$out\cost_summary.json" | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List
(Get-Content "$out\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
(Get-Content "$out\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
```

### Sobre o prompt “untrusted publisher” (PSReadLine.format.ps1xml)
Isso é o PowerShell avisando que o **publisher da Microsoft ainda não está confiado** localmente. Para não ver mais o aviso:
- Aperte **A (Always run)** quando aparecer (ele adiciona o publisher aos “Trusted Publishers”), **OU**
- Importe o certificado para *CurrentUser\Trusted Publishers* (resultado é o mesmo do “A”).

Se der algum erro nos comandos acima, me diga o texto exato que aparece e eu ajusto na hora.

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — agora está claro: **os preços foram aplicados** e os artefatos existem. O que ficou “em branco” (CPU/mem/energia) é porque ainda não definimos preços/assunções suficientes pra calcular esses itens.

Rapidinho:

- As “vírgulas” (0,1; 0,15) você só está vendo por causa da **localidade do PowerShell**. Nos arquivos JSON/MD, os números estão com **ponto** — tudo certo.
- Já temos: `Storage_IO_price_per_GB=0.10`, `Mem_price_per_GB_hour=0.010`, `Energy_price_per_kWh=0.15`.
- Falta (opcional): `CPU_price_per_hour` (ex.: 0.02) e **assunções de consumo** pra CPU/RAM/energia (tempo total já temos nas métricas; consumo médio de RAM e CPU e potência do host não vêm nos logs).

Se quiser que eu **preencha e recalcule tudo agora**, cole este bloco exatamente onde você está (em `codex_audit_output`):

```powershell
# === TEIA – preencher preços faltantes + recalcular custos ===
$pricingPath = ".\infra_pricing_request.md"
$csvPath     = ".\metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = ".\cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = ".\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$reportHtml  = ".\REPORT.html"

# 1) Parâmetros (ajuste se quiser)
$CPU_price_per_hour      = 0.02     # USD/h (exemplo)
$Mem_price_per_GB_hour   = 0.010    # já definido, reafirmamos
$Energy_price_per_kWh    = 0.15     # já definido
$Storage_IO_price_per_GB = 0.10     # já definido

# Assunções para custo (ajuste conforme sua realidade)
$Assumed_avg_mem_GB    = 0.50       # memória média usada durante a prova/bench
$Assumed_cpu_cores     = 1.0        # núcleos efetivos utilizados
$Assumed_cpu_util      = 0.40       # fator de utilização (40%)
$Assumed_power_watts   = 65         # potência média do host durante a execução

# 2) Persistir/atualizar o pricing no arquivo .md
$md = Get-Content $pricingPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8
function Upsert-Line($text, $key, $val){
  if($text -match [regex]::Escape($key) + '\s*='){
    return [regex]::Replace($text, '(^|\n)\s*'+[regex]::Escape($key)+'\s*=.*', "`n$($key) = $val", 'IgnoreCase')
  } else {
    return $text.TrimEnd() + "`n$($key) = $val`n"
  }
}
$md = Upsert-Line $md 'CPU_price_per_hour'        $CPU_price_per_hour
$md = Upsert-Line $md 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'     $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
$md = Upsert-Line $md 'Energy_price_per_kWh'      $Energy_price_per_kWh
$md = Upsert-Line $md 'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'   $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
Set-Content -Path $pricingPath -Value $md -Encoding UTF8

# 3) Ler tempo total (ms) e bytes totais das métricas
$rows = Import-Csv $csvPath
[int64]$totalBytes = 0; [int64]$totalMs = 0
foreach($r in $rows){ $totalBytes += [int64]$r.size_bytes; $totalMs += [int64]$r.elapsed_ms }
$totalGB = [math]::Round($totalBytes/1GB, 6)
$totalHours = [math]::Round($totalMs/3600000.0, 6)

# 4) Calcular custos
$storage_io_cost = [math]::Round($totalGB * $Storage_IO_price_per_GB, 6)

$cpu_hours = $Assumed_cpu_cores * $Assumed_cpu_util * $totalHours
$cpu_cost  = [math]::Round($cpu_hours * $CPU_price_per_hour, 6)

$mem_gb_hours = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$memory_cost  = [math]::Round($mem_gb_hours * $Mem_price_per_GB_hour, 6)

$kWh = [math]::Round(($Assumed_power_watts/1000.0) * $totalHours, 6)
$energy_cost = [math]::Round($kWh * $Energy_price_per_kWh, 6)

$total_cost = [math]::Round($storage_io_cost + $cpu_cost + $memory_cost + $energy_cost, 6)

# 5) Atualizar cost_summary.json
$cost = [ordered]@{
  status                  = 'complete'
  total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_kWh
  assumptions             = [ordered]@{
    avg_mem_GB   = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB
    cpu_cores    = $Assumed_cpu_cores
    cpu_util     = $Assumed_cpu_util
    power_watts  = $Assumed_power_watts
    total_hours  = $totalHours
  }
  cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
  memory_cost             = $memory_cost
  energy_cost             = $energy_cost
  total_cost              = $total_cost
}
$enc = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($costPath, (ConvertTo-Json $cost -Depth 6), $enc)

# 6) Refletir no REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (se existir)
if(Test-Path $dashPath){
  $dash = Get-Content $dashPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
  if(-not $dash.pricing){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName pricing -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
  $dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour        = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour     = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh      = $Energy_price_per_KWh
  $dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB   = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB

  if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cost -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
  $dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
  $dash.cost.total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  $dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  $dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  $dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
  $dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
  $dash.cost.memory_cost             = $memory_cost
  $dash.cost.energy_cost             = $energy_cost
  $dash.cost.total_cost              = $total_cost

  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath, (ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6), $enc)
}

# 7) Atualizar seção de custo no REPORT.html (se existir)
if(Test-Path $reportHtml){
  $html = Get-Content $reportHtml -Raw -Encoding UTF8
  $block = @"
<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
<p><strong>Status:</strong> complete</p>
<ul>
  <li>Storage I/O: \$$storage_io_cost ( $totalGB GB × \$$Storage_IO_price_per_GB/GB )</li>
  <li>CPU: \$$cpu_cost ( $Assumed_cpu_cores núc × $Assumed_cpu_util util × $totalHours h × \$$CPU_price_per_hour/h )</li>
  <li>Memória: \$$memory_cost ( $Assumed_avg_mem_GB GB × $totalHours h × \$$Mem_price_per_GB_hour/GB·h )</li>
  <li>Energia: \$$energy_cost ( $kWh kWh × \$$Energy_price_per_kWh/kWh )</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Total:</strong> \$$total_cost</p>
"@
  if($html -match '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>'){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html, '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>[\s\S]*?(?=<h2>|</body>)', $block, 'IgnoreCase')
  } else {
    $html = $html -replace '</body>', ($block + "</body>")
  }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($reportHtml, $html, $enc)
}

"OK: preços atualizados e custos recalculados."
```

Depois, confira rapidamente:

```powershell
# Preços
Select-String -Path .\infra_pricing_request.md -Pattern "CPU_price_per_hour|RAM_price_per_GB_hour|Storage_IO_price_per_GB|Energy_price_per_kWh"

# Custos
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List

# Dashboard
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
```

Se quiser, também atualizo o `teia_results_v3.zip` com os arquivos recalculados (mesma lógica que você já usou).

PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # === TEIA - preencher preços faltantes + recalcular custos ===
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $pricingPath = ".\infra_pricing_request.md"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $csvPath     = ".\metrics_summary.csv"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $costPath    = ".\cost_summary.json"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $dashPath    = ".\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $reportHtml  = ".\REPORT.html"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 1) Parâmetros (ajuste se quiser)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $CPU_price_per_hour      = 0.02     # USD/h (exemplo)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Mem_price_per_GB_hour   = 0.010    # já definido, reafirmamos
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Energy_price_per_kWh    = 0.15     # já definido
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Storage_IO_price_per_GB = 0.10     # já definido
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # Assunções para custo (ajuste conforme sua realidade)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_avg_mem_GB    = 0.50       # memória média usada durante a prova/bench
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_cpu_cores     = 1.0        # núcleos efetivos utilizados
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_cpu_util      = 0.40       # fator de utilização (40%)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_power_watts   = 65         # potência média do host durante a execução
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 2) Persistir/atualizar o pricing no arquivo .md
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $md = Get-Content $pricingPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> function Upsert-Line($text, $key, $val){
>>   if($text -match [regex]::Escape($key) + '\s*='){
>>     return [regex]::Replace($text, '(^|\n)\s*'+[regex]::Escape($key)+'\s*=.*', "`n$($key) = $val", 'IgnoreCase')
>>   } else {
>>     return $text.TrimEnd() + "`n$($key) = $val`n"
>>   }
>> }
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'CPU_price_per_hour'        $CPU_price_per_hour
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'     $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'Energy_price_per_kWh'      $Energy_price_per_kWh
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'   $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
>> Set-Content -Path $pricingPath -Value $md -Encoding UTF8
>>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 3) Ler tempo total (ms) e bytes totais das métricas
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $rows = Import-Csv $csvPath
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> [int64]$totalBytes = 0; [int64]$totalMs = 0
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> foreach($r in $rows){ $totalBytes += [int64]$r.size_bytes; $totalMs += [int64]$r.elapsed_ms }
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $totalGB = [math]::Round($totalBytes/1GB, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $totalHours = [math]::Round($totalMs/3600000.0, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 4) Calcular custos
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $storage_io_cost = [math]::Round($totalGB * $Storage_IO_price_per_GB, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $cpu_hours = $Assumed_cpu_cores * $Assumed_cpu_util * $totalHours
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $cpu_cost  = [math]::Round($cpu_hours * $CPU_price_per_hour, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $mem_gb_hours = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $memory_cost  = [math]::Round($mem_gb_hours * $Mem_price_per_GB_hour, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $kWh = [math]::Round(($Assumed_power_watts/1000.0) * $totalHours, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $energy_cost = [math]::Round($kWh * $Energy_price_per_kWh, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $total_cost = [math]::Round($storage_io_cost + $cpu_cost + $memory_cost + $energy_cost, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 5) Atualizar cost_summary.json
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $cost = [ordered]@{
>>   status                  = 'complete'
>>   total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
>>   storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
>>   storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
>>   cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
>>   mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
>>   energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_kWh
>>   assumptions             = [ordered]@{
>>     avg_mem_GB   = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB
>>     cpu_cores    = $Assumed_cpu_cores
>>     cpu_util     = $Assumed_cpu_util
>>     power_watts  = $Assumed_power_watts
>>     total_hours  = $totalHours
>>   }
>>   cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
>>   memory_cost             = $memory_cost
>>   energy_cost             = $energy_cost
>>   total_cost              = $total_cost
>> }
>> $enc = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
>> [IO.File]::WriteAllText($costPath, (ConvertTo-Json $cost -Depth 6), $enc)
>>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 6) Refletir no REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (se existir)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> if(Test-Path $dashPath){
>>   $dash = Get-Content $dashPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
>>   if(-not $dash.pricing){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName pricing -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
>>   $dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour        = $CPU_price_per_hour
>>   $dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour     = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
>>   $dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh      = $Energy_price_per_KWh
>>   $dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB   = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
>>
>>   if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cost -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
>>   $dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
>>   $dash.cost.total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
>>   $dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
>>   $dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
>>   $dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
>>   $dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
>>   $dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
>>   $dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
>>   $dash.cost.memory_cost             = $memory_cost
>>   $dash.cost.energy_cost             = $energy_cost
>>   $dash.cost.total_cost              = $total_cost
>>
>>   [IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath, (ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6), $enc)
>> }
>>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 7) Atualizar seção de custo no REPORT.html (se existir)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> if(Test-Path $reportHtml){
>>   $html = Get-Content $reportHtml -Raw -Encoding UTF8
>>   $block = @"
>> <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
>> <p><strong>Status:</strong> complete</p>
>> <ul>
>>   <li>Storage I/O: \$$storage_io_cost ( $totalGB GB × \$$Storage_IO_price_per_GB/GB )</li>
>>   <li>CPU: \$$cpu_cost ( $Assumed_cpu_cores núc × $Assumed_cpu_util util × $totalHours h × \$$CPU_price_per_hour/h )</li>
>>   <li>Memória: \$$memory_cost ( $Assumed_avg_mem_GB GB × $totalHours h × \$$Mem_price_per_GB_hour/GB·h )</li>
>>   <li>Energia: \$$energy_cost ( $kWh kWh × \$$Energy_price_per_kWh/kWh )</li>
>> </ul>
>> <p><strong>Total:</strong> \$$total_cost</p>
>> "@
>>   if($html -match '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>'){
>>     $html = [regex]::Replace($html, '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>[\s\S]*?(?=<h2>|</body>)', $block, 'IgnoreCase')
>>   } else {
>>     $html = $html -replace '</body>', ($block + "</body>")
>>   }
>>   [IO.File]::WriteAllText($reportHtml, $html, $enc)
>> }
>>

### ASSISTENTE

Boa! Obrigado pelos logs — deu pra ver o problema: o **`cost_summary.json` e o `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` não foram atualizados** (continuam com `status: partial`). Isso costuma acontecer por dois motivos comuns:

1) **Caminho variável `$out`**: em alguns comandos você usou `"$out\arquivo"` com `$out` não definido nessa sessão — isso apontou para `D:\arquivo` (vide “Cannot find path 'D:\cost_summary.json'”).  
2) **Atualização não aplicada**: mesmo após o bloco, os arquivos ficaram com o conteúdo antigo. Vamos forçar a escrita e já validar na sequência.

Cole e rode este bloco **exatamente dentro de** `codex_audit_output` (onde você já está). Ele:
- reescreve `cost_summary.json` com `status=complete`;
- corrige/atualiza `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` (sem variações de nome de chave);
- mostra o conteúdo final para conferência.

```powershell
# === TEIA – forçar atualização de custo e dashboard (fix) ===
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

# Arquivos locais nesta pasta
$csvPath   = ".\metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath  = ".\cost_summary.json"
$dashPath  = ".\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"

# Preços (use os que você já definiu)
$CPU_price_per_hour        = 0.02
$RAM_price_per_GB_hour     = 0.010
$Energy_price_per_kWh      = 0.15
$Storage_IO_price_per_GB   = 0.10

# Assunções simples
$Assumed_avg_mem_GB  = 0.50
$Assumed_cpu_cores   = 1.0
$Assumed_cpu_util    = 0.40
$Assumed_power_watts = 65

# 1) Ler métricas e calcular totais
$rows = Import-Csv $csvPath
[int64]$totalBytes = 0; [int64]$totalMs = 0
foreach($r in $rows){ $totalBytes += [int64]$r.size_bytes; $totalMs += [int64]$r.elapsed_ms }
$totalGB    = [math]::Round($totalBytes/1GB, 6)
$totalHours = [math]::Round($totalMs/3600000.0, 6)

# 2) Calcular custos
$storage_io_cost = [math]::Round($totalGB * $Storage_IO_price_per_GB, 6)
$cpu_hours       = $Assumed_cpu_cores * $Assumed_cpu_util * $totalHours
$cpu_cost        = [math]::Round($cpu_hours * $CPU_price_per_hour, 6)
$mem_gb_hours    = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$memory_cost     = [math]::Round($mem_gb_hours * $RAM_price_per_GB_hour, 6)
$kWh             = [math]::Round(($Assumed_power_watts/1000.0) * $totalHours, 6)
$energy_cost     = [math]::Round($kWh * $Energy_price_per_kWh, 6)
$total_cost      = [math]::Round($storage_io_cost + $cpu_cost + $memory_cost + $energy_cost, 6)

# 3) Escrever cost_summary.json (status=complete)
$cost = [ordered]@{
  status                  = 'complete'
  total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_kWh
  assumptions             = [ordered]@{
    avg_mem_GB   = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB
    cpu_cores    = $Assumed_cpu_cores
    cpu_util     = $Assumed_cpu_util
    power_watts  = $Assumed_power_watts
    total_hours  = $totalHours
  }
  cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
  memory_cost             = $memory_cost
  energy_cost             = $energy_cost
  total_cost              = $total_cost
}
$enc = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($costPath, (ConvertTo-Json $cost -Depth 6), $enc)

# 4) Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json
if(Test-Path $dashPath){
  $dash = Get-Content $dashPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
  if(-not $dash.pricing){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName pricing -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
  $dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = $RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_kWh
  $dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB

  if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cost -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
  $dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
  $dash.cost.total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  $dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  $dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  $dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_kWh
  $dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
  $dash.cost.memory_cost             = $memory_cost
  $dash.cost.energy_cost             = $energy_cost
  $dash.cost.total_cost              = $total_cost

  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath, (ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6), $enc)
}

# 5) Mostrar resultado final (garantia visual)
"--- cost_summary.json ---"
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List
"--- REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (pricing) ---"
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
"--- REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (cost) ---"
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
```

Se ainda aparecer “partial”, me diga o resultado desses dois comandos para eu diagnosticar no ato:

```powershell
(Get-Item .\cost_summary.json).LastWriteTime
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json -Raw
```

Quer que eu também atualize o **`teia_results_v3.zip`** com os arquivos recalculados (cost/pricing/dashboard/report)? Posso te passar um bloco de 4 linhas pra empacotar isso via `.NET Zip`.

---

### ASSISTENTE

Valeu pelo log — deu pra ver o motivo: você rodou **só as etapas 6 e 7** (atualizar dashboard e HTML). Como a etapa que **recalcula e grava** o `cost_summary.json` (e define variáveis como `$enc`, `$totalGB`, `$dashPath`, etc.) não foi executada nessa sessão, nada foi sobrescrito; por isso o dashboard e o JSON continuaram com `status: partial`.

Segue um **fix único** (cola e executa exatamente no diretório `codex_audit_output`). Ele:
1) Lê preços do `infra_pricing_request.md`,
2) Lê métricas do `metrics_summary.csv`,
3) Aplica suposições (ajuste se quiser),
4) Recalcula custos → grava `cost_summary.json`,
5) Atualiza `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`,
6) Atualiza a seção “Custo Computacional” no `REPORT.html`.

```powershell
# === TEIA – Recalcular custos + atualizar dashboard/HTML (fix completo) ===
$pricingPath = ".\infra_pricing_request.md"
$csvPath     = ".\metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = ".\cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = ".\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$reportHtml  = ".\REPORT.html"
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)

function Get-Num($text, $key, $fallback=$null){
  if(-not (Test-Path $pricingPath)){ return $fallback }
  $m = [regex]::Match($text, [regex]::Escape($key) + '\s*=\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)')
  if($m.Success){ [double]$m.Groups[1].Value } else { $fallback }
}

# 1) Ler preços do arquivo
$md = if (Test-Path $pricingPath) { Get-Content $pricingPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 } else { "" }
$CPU_price_per_hour      = Get-Num $md 'CPU_price_per_hour'        0.02
$Mem_price_per_GB_hour   = Get-Num $md 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'     0.010
$Energy_price_per_kWh    = Get-Num $md 'Energy_price_per_kWh'      0.15
$Storage_IO_price_per_GB = Get-Num $md 'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'   0.10

# 2) Suposições (ajuste se necessário)
$Assumed_avg_mem_GB  = 0.50
$Assumed_cpu_cores   = 1.0
$Assumed_cpu_util    = 0.40
$Assumed_power_watts = 65

# 3) Ler métricas totais
$rows = Import-Csv $csvPath
[int64]$totalBytes = 0; [int64]$totalMs = 0
foreach($r in $rows){ $totalBytes += [int64]$r.size_bytes; $totalMs += [int64]$r.elapsed_ms }
$totalGB    = [math]::Round($totalBytes/1GB, 6)
$totalHours = [math]::Round($totalMs/3600000.0, 6)

# 4) Custos
$storage_io_cost = [math]::Round($totalGB * $Storage_IO_price_per_GB, 6)

$cpu_hours = $Assumed_cpu_cores * $Assumed_cpu_util * $totalHours
$cpu_cost  = [math]::Round($cpu_hours * $CPU_price_per_hour, 6)

$mem_gb_hours = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$memory_cost  = [math]::Round($mem_gb_hours * $Mem_price_per_GB_hour, 6)

$kWh = [math]::Round(($Assumed_power_watts/1000.0) * $totalHours, 6)
$energy_cost = [math]::Round($kWh * $Energy_price_per_kWh, 6)

$total_cost = [math]::Round($storage_io_cost + $cpu_cost + $memory_cost + $energy_cost, 6)

# 5) Gravar cost_summary.json
$cost = [ordered]@{
  status                  = 'complete'
  total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
  assumptions             = [ordered]@{
    avg_mem_GB   = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB
    cpu_cores    = $Assumed_cpu_cores
    cpu_util     = $Assumed_cpu_util
    power_watts  = $Assumed_power_watts
    total_hours  = $totalHours
  }
  cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
  memory_cost             = $memory_cost
  energy_cost             = $energy_cost
  total_cost              = $total_cost
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($costPath, (ConvertTo-Json $cost -Depth 6), $enc)

# 6) Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json
if(Test-Path $dashPath){
  $dash = Get-Content $dashPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
  if(-not $dash.pricing){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName pricing -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
  $dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour        = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour     = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh      = $Energy_price_per_KWh
  $dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB   = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB

  if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cost -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
  $dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
  $dash.cost.total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  $dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  $dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  $dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
  $dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
  $dash.cost.memory_cost             = $memory_cost
  $dash.cost.energy_cost             = $energy_cost
  $dash.cost.total_cost              = $total_cost

  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath, (ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6), $enc)
}

# 7) Atualizar bloco no REPORT.html
if(Test-Path $reportHtml){
  $html = Get-Content $reportHtml -Raw -Encoding UTF8
  $block = @"
<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
<p><strong>Status:</strong> complete</p>
<ul>
  <li>Storage I/O: \$$storage_io_cost ( $totalGB GB × \$$Storage_IO_price_per_GB/GB )</li>
  <li>CPU: \$$cpu_cost ( $Assumed_cpu_cores núc × $Assumed_cpu_util util × $totalHours h × \$$CPU_price_per_hour/h )</li>
  <li>Memória: \$$memory_cost ( $Assumed_avg_mem_GB GB × $totalHours h × \$$Mem_price_per_GB_hour/GB·h )</li>
  <li>Energia: \$$energy_cost ( $kWh kWh × \$$Energy_price_per_KWh/kWh )</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Total:</strong> \$$total_cost</p>
"@
  if($html -match '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>'){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html, '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>[\s\S]*?(?=<h2>|</body>)', $block, 'IgnoreCase')
  } else {
    $html = $html -replace '</body>', ($block + "</body>")
  }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($reportHtml, $html, $enc)
}

"OK: custos recalculados, dashboard e HTML atualizados."
```

Depois, valide:

```powershell
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
```

Se quiser, mando também o comando pra **atualizar o `teia_results_v3.zip`** com esses quatro arquivos (`infra_pricing_request.md`, `cost_summary.json`, `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`, `REPORT.html`).

### ASSISTENTE

Pelo histórico, você só executou a **linha que imprime**:

```
"OK: custos recalculados, dashboard e HTML atualizados."
```

…e **não** rodou o bloco que faz o recálculo/escrita. Vamos corrigir agora com um bloco **autossuficiente** (curto) que recalcula e grava `cost_summary.json`, atualiza `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` e o trecho de custo no `REPORT.html`.

> Rode **no diretório** `...codex_audit_output` exatamente como está abaixo (um único bloco):

```powershell
# === TEIA – Recalcular custos + atualizar dashboard/HTML ===
$pricingPath = ".\infra_pricing_request.md"
$csvPath     = ".\metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = ".\cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = ".\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$reportHtml  = ".\REPORT.html"
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)

function Get-Num($text,$key,$fallback=$null){
  if(-not(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ return $fallback }
  $m=[regex]::Match($text,[regex]::Escape($key)+'\s*=\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)')
  if($m.Success){ [double]$m.Groups[1].Value } else { $fallback }
}

# 1) Ler preços
$md = if(Test-Path $pricingPath){ Get-Content $pricingPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 } else { "" }
$CPU_price_per_hour      = Get-Num $md 'CPU_price_per_hour'        0.02
$Mem_price_per_GB_hour   = Get-Num $md 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'     0.010
$Energy_price_per_kWh    = Get-Num $md 'Energy_price_per_kWh'      0.15
$Storage_IO_price_per_GB = Get-Num $md 'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'   0.10

# 2) Suposições (ajuste se quiser)
$Assumed_avg_mem_GB  = 0.50
$Assumed_cpu_cores   = 1.0
$Assumed_cpu_util    = 0.40
$Assumed_power_watts = 65

# 3) Ler métricas
$rows = Import-Csv $csvPath
[int64]$totalBytes=0; [int64]$totalMs=0
foreach($r in $rows){ $totalBytes += [int64]$r.size_bytes; $totalMs += [int64]$r.elapsed_ms }
$totalGB    = [math]::Round($totalBytes/1GB,6)
$totalHours = [math]::Round($totalMs/3600000.0,6)

# 4) Custos
$storage_io_cost = [math]::Round($totalGB * $Storage_IO_price_per_GB, 6)
$cpu_hours = $Assumed_cpu_cores * $Assumed_cpu_util * $totalHours
$cpu_cost  = [math]::Round($cpu_hours * $CPU_price_per_hour, 6)
$mem_gb_hours = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$memory_cost  = [math]::Round($mem_gb_hours * $Mem_price_per_GB_hour, 6)
$kWh = [math]::Round(($Assumed_power_watts/1000.0) * $totalHours, 6)
$energy_cost = [math]::Round($kWh * $Energy_price_per_kWh, 6)
$total_cost = [math]::Round($storage_io_cost + $cpu_cost + $memory_cost + $energy_cost, 6)

# 5) Gravar cost_summary.json
$cost = [ordered]@{
  status                  = 'complete'
  total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_kWh
  assumptions             = [ordered]@{
    avg_mem_GB=$Assumed_avg_mem_GB; cpu_cores=$Assumed_cpu_cores; cpu_util=$Assumed_cpu_util
    power_watts=$Assumed_power_watts; total_hours=$totalHours
  }
  cpu_cost   = $cpu_cost
  memory_cost= $memory_cost
  energy_cost= $energy_cost
  total_cost = $total_cost
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($costPath,(ConvertTo-Json $cost -Depth 6),$enc)

# 6) Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json
if(Test-Path $dashPath){
  $dash = Get-Content $dashPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
  if(-not $dash.pricing){ $dash | Add-Member pricing (@{}) }
  $dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
  $dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB

  if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member cost (@{}) }
  $dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
  $dash.cost.total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  $dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  $dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  $dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  $dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  $dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
  $dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
  $dash.cost.memory_cost             = $memory_cost
  $dash.cost.energy_cost             = $energy_cost
  $dash.cost.total_cost              = $total_cost
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath,(ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6),$enc)
}

# 7) Atualizar bloco no REPORT.html
if(Test-Path $reportHtml){
  $html = Get-Content $reportHtml -Raw -Encoding UTF8
  $block = @"
<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
<p><strong>Status:</strong> complete</p>
<ul>
  <li>Storage I/O: \$$storage_io_cost ( $totalGB GB × \$$Storage_IO_price_per_GB/GB )</li>
  <li>CPU: \$$cpu_cost ( $Assumed_cpu_cores núc × $Assumed_cpu_util util × $totalHours h × \$$CPU_price_per_hour/h )</li>
  <li>Memória: \$$memory_cost ( $Assumed_avg_mem_GB GB × $totalHours h × \$$Mem_price_per_GB_hour/GB·h )</li>
  <li>Energia: \$$energy_cost ( $kWh kWh × \$$Energy_price_per_KWh/kWh )</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Total:</strong> \$$total_cost</p>
"@
  if($html -match '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>'){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,'<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>[\s\S]*?(?=<h2>|</body>)',$block,'IgnoreCase')
  } else {
    $html = $html -replace '</body>', ($block + '</body>')
  }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($reportHtml,$html,$enc)
}

"OK: custos recalculados e arquivos atualizados."
```

### Verifique em seguida
```powershell
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
```
– O campo **`status`** deve aparecer **`complete`** e os custos (**cpu/memory/energy/total**) preenchidos.

### (Opcional) Atualizar o ZIP final
```powershell
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$zip = ".\teia_results_v3.zip"
$toAdd = @("infra_pricing_request.md","cost_summary.json","REPORT_DASHBOARD.json","REPORT.html") | ForEach-Object { Join-Path . $_ }
$z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zip,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Update)
try{
  foreach($f in $toAdd){
    if(Test-Path $f){
      $name=[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f)
      ($z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -ieq $name }) | ForEach-Object { $_.Delete() }
      [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($z,$f,$name) | Out-Null
    }
  }
} finally { $z.Dispose() }
"ZIP atualizado: $zip"
```

Se ainda aparecer “partial”, me mostre as **três primeiras linhas** de `metrics_summary.csv` e o valor exibido para `$totalHours` (posso ajustar o cálculo conforme necessário).

PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> function Get-Num($text,$key,$fallback=$null){
>>   if(-not(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ return $fallback }
>>   $m=[regex]::Match($text,[regex]::Escape($key)+'\s*=\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)')
>>   if($m.Success){ [double]$m.Groups[1].Value } else { $fallback }
>> }
>>

ZIP atualizado: .\teia_results_v3.zip
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>"

---

### ASSISTENTE

Boa! Vi dois problemas práticos aí:

1) **O `cost_summary.json` e o `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` continuam “partial”** porque o bloco que grava os arquivos provavelmente não está escrevendo **no caminho certo** (variáveis antigas de caminho podem ter sobrado na sessão) ou está sendo sobrescrito depois.  
2) O erro do **ZIP** foi porque você montou a lista com caminhos relativos (`.\...`) e, durante a operação, o diretório efetivo acabou sendo `C:\Windows\System32`. Por isso o `CreateEntryFromFile` procurou lá.

Abaixo vai um bloco **idempotente** que:
- Força o **caminho absoluto** do `codex_audit_output`;  
- Recalcula custos e grava **`status=complete`**;  
- Atualiza `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` e injeta o bloco no `REPORT.html`;  
- Atualiza o zip usando **caminhos absolutos**.

> Execute **todo o bloco de uma vez** no PowerShell:

```powershell
# === TEIA: Fix total (custos + dashboard + HTML + ZIP) ===

# 0) Pinos absolutos
$proj = 'D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1'
$out  = Join-Path $proj 'codex_audit_output'
Set-Location $out
$pricingPath = Join-Path $out 'infra_pricing_request.md'
$csvPath     = Join-Path $out 'metrics_summary.csv'
$costPath    = Join-Path $out 'cost_summary.json'
$dashPath    = Join-Path $out 'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json'
$reportHtml  = Join-Path $out 'REPORT.html'
$zipPath     = Join-Path $out 'teia_results_v3.zip'
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)

function Get-Num($text, $key, $fallback=$null){
  if(-not $text){ return $fallback }
  $m = [regex]::Match($text, [regex]::Escape($key) + '\s*=\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)')
  if($m.Success){ [double]$m.Groups[1].Value } else { $fallback }
}

# 1) Ler preços (com defaults razoáveis)
$md = if (Test-Path $pricingPath) { Get-Content $pricingPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 } else { "" }
$CPU_price_per_hour      = Get-Num $md 'CPU_price_per_hour'        0.02
$Mem_price_per_GB_hour   = Get-Num $md 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'     0.010  # mantém chave RAM_... no arquivo
$Energy_price_per_kWh    = Get-Num $md 'Energy_price_per_kWh'      0.15
$Storage_IO_price_per_GB = Get-Num $md 'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'   0.10

# 2) Suposições (ajuste se quiser)
$Assumed_avg_mem_GB  = 0.50
$Assumed_cpu_cores   = 1.0
$Assumed_cpu_util    = 0.40
$Assumed_power_watts = 65

# 3) Totais das métricas
$rows = Import-Csv $csvPath
[int64]$totalBytes = 0; [int64]$totalMs = 0
foreach($r in $rows){ $totalBytes += [int64]$r.size_bytes; $totalMs += [int64]$r.elapsed_ms }
$totalGB    = [math]::Round($totalBytes/1GB, 6)
$totalHours = [math]::Round($totalMs/3600000.0, 6)

# 4) Custos
$storage_io_cost = [math]::Round($totalGB * $Storage_IO_price_per_GB, 6)
$cpu_hours   = $Assumed_cpu_cores * $Assumed_cpu_util * $totalHours
$cpu_cost    = [math]::Round($cpu_hours   * $CPU_price_per_hour,    6)
$mem_gb_hours= $Assumed_avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$memory_cost = [math]::Round($mem_gb_hours* $Mem_price_per_GB_hour, 6)
$kWh         = [math]::Round(($Assumed_power_watts/1000.0) * $totalHours, 6)
$energy_cost = [math]::Round($kWh * $Energy_price_per_kWh, 6)
$total_cost  = [math]::Round($storage_io_cost + $cpu_cost + $memory_cost + $energy_cost, 6)

# 5) Gravar cost_summary.json (ABSOLUTO)
$cost = [ordered]@{
  status                  = 'complete'
  total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_kWh
  assumptions             = [ordered]@{
    avg_mem_GB   = $Assumed_avg_mem_GB
    cpu_cores    = $Assumed_cpu_cores
    cpu_util     = $Assumed_cpu_util
    power_watts  = $Assumed_power_watts
    total_hours  = $totalHours
  }
  cpu_cost     = $cpu_cost
  memory_cost  = $memory_cost
  energy_cost  = $energy_cost
  total_cost   = $total_cost
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($costPath, (ConvertTo-Json $cost -Depth 6), $enc)

# 6) Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (cria se não existir)
if(Test-Path $dashPath){
  $dash = Get-Content $dashPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
} else {
  $dash = [pscustomobject]@{}
}
if(-not $dash.pricing){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName pricing -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
$dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour        = $CPU_price_per_hour
$dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour     = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour   # mantém chave RAM_... por compatibilidade
$dash.pricing.Mem_price_per_GB_hour     = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour   # e espelha nesta, se você quiser usar esta chave
$dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh      = $Energy_price_per_kWh
$dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB   = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB

if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cost -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
$dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
$dash.cost.total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
$dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
$dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
$dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
$dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
$dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
$dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
$dash.cost.memory_cost             = $memory_cost
$dash.cost.energy_cost             = $energy_cost
$dash.cost.total_cost              = $total_cost
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath, (ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6), $enc)

# 7) Injetar bloco no REPORT.html
if(Test-Path $reportHtml){
  $html = Get-Content $reportHtml -Raw -Encoding UTF8
  $block = @"
<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
<p><strong>Status:</strong> complete</p>
<ul>
  <li>Storage I/O: \$$storage_io_cost ( $totalGB GB × \$$Storage_IO_price_per_GB/GB )</li>
  <li>CPU: \$$cpu_cost ( $Assumed_cpu_cores núc × $Assumed_cpu_util util × $totalHours h × \$$CPU_price_per_hour/h )</li>
  <li>Memória: \$$memory_cost ( $Assumed_avg_mem_GB GB × $totalHours h × \$$Mem_price_per_GB_hour/GB·h )</li>
  <li>Energia: \$$energy_cost ( $kWh kWh × \$$Energy_price_per_kWh/kWh )</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Total:</strong> \$$total_cost</p>
"@
  if($html -match '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>'){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html, '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>[\s\S]*?(?=<h2>|</body>)', $block, 'IgnoreCase')
  } else {
    $html = $html -replace '</body>', ($block + '</body>')
  }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($reportHtml, $html, $enc)
}

# 8) Atualizar ZIP com caminhos absolutos
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$toAdd = @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$reportHtml) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }
$z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Update)
try{
  foreach($f in $toAdd){
    $name=[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f)
    ($z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -ieq $name }) | ForEach-Object { $_.Delete() }
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($z,$f,$name) | Out-Null
  }
} finally { $z.Dispose() }

"OK: custos recalculados (status=complete), dashboard/HTML e ZIP atualizados."
```

### Checagens rápidas
```powershell
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).cost
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
```
Você deve ver `status : complete` e todos os campos de custo preenchidos.

---

Se preferir **delegar ao Codex CLI**, segue um **prompt pronto**:

```
# TEIA – Codex Master Prompt (Custos/Dashboard/HTML/ZIP)
Contexto: Projeto em D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1; usar out=codex_audit_output.
Tarefas (sem alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em out):
1) Ler preços de infra_pricing_request.md (chaves: CPU_price_per_hour, RAM_price_per_GB_hour, Energy_price_per_kWh, Storage_IO_price_per_GB).
2) Somar size_bytes e elapsed_ms de metrics_summary.csv; calcular totalGB e totalHours.
3) Calcular custos (assuma avg_mem_GB=0.5, cpu_cores=1.0, cpu_util=0.40, power_watts=65). 
4) Escrever cost_summary.json com status=complete e todos os campos (inclui assumptions).
5) Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (criar se não existir) preenchendo .pricing e .cost (status=complete).
6) Atualizar/injetar seção “Custo Computacional” no REPORT.html.
7) Atualizar teia_results_v3.zip com infra_pricing_request.md, cost_summary.json, REPORT_DASHBOARD.json, REPORT.html (zip via System.IO.Compression).
Saídas esperadas (no out): cost_summary.json, REPORT_DASHBOARD.json, REPORT.html, teia_results_v3.zip atualizados.
Logs: imprimir caminhos absolutos atualizados e mostrar status=complete.
```

Se ainda aparecer “partial”, me diga o que sai de:
```powershell
Resolve-Path .\cost_summary.json
Get-Item .\cost_summary.json | Select FullName,Length,LastWriteTime
(Get-Content .\cost_summary.json -Raw)[0..120] -join ''
```
que te ajudo a ajustar na hora.

>>   [IO.File]::WriteAllText($reportHtml,$html,$enc)
>> }

>_
  ✗ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference='"'Stop';
    "'$OutDir = (Resolve-Path '"'.').Path;
    "'$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'infra_pricing_request.md';
    "'$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'metrics_summary.csv';
    "'$costSummaryPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json';
    "'$dashboardPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json';
    "'$htmlPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT.html';
    "'$zipPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'teia_results_v3.zip';

    # 1) Parse pricing
    if ("'!(Test-Path $pricingPath)) { throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
    $content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath;
    $keys = '"'CPU_price_per_hour','RAM_price_per_GB_hour','Energy_price_per_kWh','Storage_IO_price_per_GB';
    "'$pricing = @{};
    foreach ($k in $keys) {
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $pattern = "(?im)''^'"\\s*"'${kEsc}'"\\s*[:=]\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\\b\";
      "'$m = [regex]::Match($content,$pattern);
      if ($m.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]$m.Groups[1].Value; }
    }
    foreach ($k in $keys) {
      if ($pricing.ContainsKey($k)) { continue }
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $pattern2 = "(?im)'"\\b"'${kEsc}'"\\b.*?([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\";
      "'$m2 = [regex]::Match($content,$pattern2);
      if ($m2.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]$m2.Groups[1].Value }
    }
    $missing = $keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) };
    if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join '"', ') in "'$pricingPath" }

    # 2) Sum metrics
    if (!(Test-Path $metricsPath)) { throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
    $csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
    if (-not $csv) { throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
    $cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name;
    $sizeCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^size_bytes$'"' };
    "'$elapsedCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^elapsed_ms$'"' };
    if (-not "'$sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol) { throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms
columns. Found: $($cols -join '"', ')\" }
    "'$sumBytes = 0.0; $sumMs = 0.0;
    foreach ($row in $csv) {
      $b = 0.0; $e = 0.0;
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$b);
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$e);
      $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
    }
    $totalGB = $sumBytes / 1e9; # decimal GB
    $totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0;

    # 3) Compute costs with assumptions
    $assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
      avg_mem_GB = 0.5
      cpu_cores   = 1.0
      cpu_util    = 0.40
      power_watts = 65
    };
    $CPU_cost = $pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour'] * "'$assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
    $RAM_cost = $pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'] * "'$assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
    $Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
    $Energy_cost = $Energy_kWh * $pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh'];
    "'$Storage_cost = $pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'] * "'$totalGB;
    $Total_cost = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

    $metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      size_bytes_sum = [double]::Parse(($sumBytes.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      elapsed_ms_sum = [double]::Parse(($sumMs.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      totalGB = [double]::Parse(($totalGB.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      totalHours = [double]::Parse(($totalHours.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
    };
    $pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      CPU_price_per_hour     = [double]$pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']
      RAM_price_per_GB_hour  = [double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']
      Energy_price_per_kWh   = [double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
      Storage_IO_price_per_GB= [double]"'$pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']
    };
    "'$costBreakdown = [pscustomobject]@{
      cpu      = [double]$CPU_cost
      ram      = [double]$RAM_cost
      energy   = [double]$Energy_cost
      storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
      energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
      total    = [double]$Total_cost
    };
    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
      status = '"'complete'
      timestamp_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
      pricing = "'$pricingObj
      metrics = $metricsObj
      assumptions = $assumptions
      cost = $costBreakdown
    };

    # 4) Write cost_summary.json
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costSummaryPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # 5) Update REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (.pricing and .cost + status)
    $dashboard = @{};
    if (Test-Path $dashboardPath) {
      try { $dashboard = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashboardPath | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $dashboard = @{} }
    }
    $dashboard.status = '"'complete';
    "'$dashboard.pricing = $pricingObj;
    $dashboard.cost = $costBreakdown;
    $dashboard.metrics = $metricsObj;
    $dashboard.assumptions = $assumptions;
    $dashboard | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashboardPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # 6) Update/inject section in REPORT.html
    function FormatInv([double]$n, [string]$fmt = '"'0.######') {
      return [string]::Format([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture, \"{0:"'${fmt}}", $n)
    }
    $snippet = @"
    <!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->
    <section id="custo-computacional">
      <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
      <ul>
        <li>CPU: $$(FormatInv $CPU_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li>RAM: "'$$(FormatInv $RAM_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li>Energia: "'$$(FormatInv $Energy_cost '"'0.######') (kWh: "'$(FormatInv $Energy_kWh))</li>
        <li>Storage I/O: $$(FormatInv $Storage_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li><strong>Total: "'$$(FormatInv $Total_cost '"'0.######')</strong></li>
      </ul>
      <p>Tempo total: "'$(FormatInv $totalHours '"'0.########') h; Dados processados: "'$(FormatInv $totalGB
'"'0.######') GB</p>
    </section>
    <"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
    "@;
    if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
      if ($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet });
      } elseif ($html -match '"'</body>') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>");
      } else {
        $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n";
      }
    } else {
      $html = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
      $snippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@;
    }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8;

    # 7) Update ZIP with required files

### ASSISTENTE

Parece que o **Codex** reescreveu os arquivos num **novo esquema**. Seus comandos antigos estavam lendo campos do esquema **antigo** (ex.: `(.cost).status`), por isso continuam vendo `partial`/vazio — nesses arquivos novos o `status` fica **na raiz** e os custos estão em objetos aninhados.

### Veja do jeito “novo”
```powershell
# cost_summary.json (novo layout)
$cs = Get-Content .\cost_summary.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
$cs.status                  # ← deve ser "complete"
$cs.pricing
$cs.metrics
$cs.assumptions
$cs.cost                    # cpu, ram, energy, storage_io, energy_kwh, total

# REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo layout)
$dash = Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
$dash.status                # ← deve ser "complete"
$dash.pricing               # CPU_price_per_hour, RAM_price_per_GB_hour, ...
$dash.metrics               # totalGB, totalHours...
$dash.cost                  # cpu, ram, energy, storage_io, energy_kwh, total
```

Se quiser um resumo rápido em lista:
```powershell
"$($cs.status) | GB=$($cs.metrics.totalGB) | h=$($cs.metrics.totalHours) | total=$($cs.cost.total)"
```

---

## Precisa manter compatibilidade com os **comandos antigos**?
Rode este “shim” que **adiciona** (não sobrescreve) os campos esperados pelos seus `Format-List` antigos:

```powershell
# === Compat layer p/ layout antigo ===
$dashPath = ".\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$costPath = ".\cost_summary.json"
$enc      = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)

# Dashboard
$dash = Get-Content $dashPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
# garantir métricas
if(-not $dash.metrics){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName metrics -NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{ totalGB=0; totalHours=0 }) }

# adicionar campos "antigos" dentro de .cost
if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cost -NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{}) }
$dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
$dash.cost.total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round($dash.metrics.totalGB*1024,0))
$dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
$dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $dash.cost.storage_io
$dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour
$dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
$dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh
$dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $dash.cost.cpu
$dash.cost.memory_cost             = $dash.cost.ram
$dash.cost.energy_cost             = $dash.cost.energy
$dash.cost.total_cost              = $dash.cost.total
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath,(ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6),$enc)

# cost_summary.json – expõe também no formato antigo (opcional)
$cs = Get-Content $costPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status                  = $cs.status
  total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round($cs.metrics.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $cs.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $cs.cost.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $cs.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $cs.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $cs.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost                = $cs.cost.cpu
  memory_cost             = $cs.cost.ram
  energy_cost             = $cs.cost.energy
  total_cost              = $cs.cost.total
}
# anexa um nó "legacy" (sem perder o novo)
$cs | Add-Member -NotePropertyName legacy -NotePropertyValue ($legacy) -Force
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($costPath,(ConvertTo-Json $cs -Depth 8),$enc)
```

Depois disso, **os seus comandos antigos** voltam a funcionar:
```powershell
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).pricing
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json | ConvertFrom-Json).cost      # agora terá status/total_cost etc.
Get-Content .\cost_summary.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -Expand legacy | Format-List
```

Se ainda aparecer “partial”, manda aqui o resultado de:
```powershell
(Get-Content .\cost_summary.json -Raw)[0..300] -join ''
(Get-Content .\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json -Raw)[0..300] -join ''
```
que eu ajusto na hora.

### USUÁRIO

delege um prompt para codex prosseguir

---

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — segue um **prompt de orquestração** para o Codex continuar sozinho e deixar tudo consistente (recalcular custos, aplicar compatibilidade com seus comandos antigos, atualizar HTML e recriar o ZIP). Basta colar no Codex:

```
user
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP)
Contexto:
- Projeto: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1
- Usar diretório de saída: .\codex_audit_output  (chamar de $OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; somente arquivos dentro de $OutDir.

Objetivo:
1) Recalcular custos a partir de infra_pricing_request.md e metrics_summary.csv.
2) Gravar cost_summary.json no **layout novo** (status/pricing/metrics/assumptions/cost) e também incluir um **nó "legacy"** com os campos planos esperados pelos comandos antigos.
3) Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json com o layout novo **e**, dentro de .cost, **espelhar** os campos legados (status, total_mb, *_price_*, *_cost, total_cost).
4) Injetar/atualizar o bloco “Custo Computacional” em REPORT.html entre marcadores BEGIN/END.
5) Recriar teia_results_v3.zip contendo: infra_pricing_request.md, cost_summary.json, REPORT_DASHBOARD.json, REPORT.html.
6) Ser idempotente (pode rodar várias vezes); usar **cultura invariante** (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos para evitar C:\Windows\System32.

Aprovações: /approvals write_files, run_powershell

Execute em PowerShell 7:

/run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop";
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest;

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1";
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output";
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md";
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv";
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json";
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json";
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html";
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip";
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false);
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture;

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt="0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Parse pricing (tolerante a Markdown) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath;

$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB");
$pricing = @{};
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
  $m = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\b");
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse($m.Groups[1].Value,$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)");
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse($m2.Groups[1].Value,$inv) }
}
$missing = $keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) }
if($missing.Count -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ')" }

# --- 2) Somar métricas (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv  = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }

$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found: $($cols -join ', ')" }

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0;
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0;
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol   -replace ',','.'), [ref]$b);
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol-replace ',','.'), [ref]$e);
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
}
# GB decimais (10^9)
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9;
$totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0;

# --- 3) Assumptions & Costs ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
  avg_mem_GB = 0.5
  cpu_cores  = 1.0
  cpu_util   = 0.40
  power_watts= 65
};

$CPU_cost      = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]      * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
$RAM_cost      = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]   * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
$Energy_kWh    = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0)   * $assumptions.cpu_util   * $totalHours;
$Energy_cost   = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"];
$Storage_cost  = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB;
$Total_cost    = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

# --- 4) cost_summary.json (layout novo + nó legacy) ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
  elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
  totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
  totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
  ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
  energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
  energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
  total      = [double]$Total_cost
}

$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status                  = "complete"
  total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
  memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
  energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
  total_cost              = $costObj.total
}

$costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
  status         = "complete"
  timestamp_utc  = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing        = $pricingObj
  metrics        = $metricsObj
  assumptions    = $assumptions
  cost           = $costObj
  legacy         = $legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo + compat legada em .cost) ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status       = "complete"
  pricing      = $pricingObj
  metrics      = $metricsObj
  assumptions  = $assumptions
  cost         = $costObj
}
# espelha campos legados dentro de .cost (sem perder os novos)
$dash.cost | Add-Member status                  "complete" -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member total_mb                ([int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))) -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member storage_io_price_per_GB $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member storage_io_cost         $costObj.storage_io -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member cpu_price_per_hour      $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member mem_price_per_GB_hour   $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member energy_price_per_kWh    $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_KWh -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member cpu_cost                $costObj.cpu -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member memory_cost             $costObj.ram -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member energy_cost             $costObj.energy -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member total_cost              $costObj.total -Force

$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) REPORT.html (bloco entre marcadores) ---
$snippet = @"
<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->
<section id="custo-computacional">
  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
  <ul>
    <li>CPU: $$(InvStr $CPU_cost)</li>
    <li>RAM: $$(InvStr $RAM_cost)</li>
    <li>Energia: $$(InvStr $Energy_cost) (kWh: $(InvStr $Energy_kWh))</li>
    <li>Storage I/O: $$(InvStr $Storage_cost)</li>
    <li><strong>Total: $$(InvStr $Total_cost)</strong></li>
  </ul>
  <p>Tempo total: $(InvStr $totalHours "0.########") h; Dados processados: $(InvStr $totalGB) GB</p>
</section>
<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
"@

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  if($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->",$snippet)
  } elseif($html -match "</body>"){
    $html = $html -replace "</body>", ($snippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html += "`n$snippet`n"
  }
} else {
  $html = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$snippet
</body>
</html>
"@
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($htmlPath,$html,$enc)

# --- 7) ZIP (usando caminhos absolutos) ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if(Test-Path $zipPath){ Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile(
      $zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal
    ) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) Saída-resumo ---
"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
```

Se quiser, eu preparo também um prompt “/verify” para o Codex imprimir um sumário dos números calculados (totalGB, totalHours, total, etc.).

---

### USUÁRIO

Retornou assim: PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # === TEIA - preencher preços faltantes + recalcular custos ===
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $pricingPath = ".\infra_pricing_request.md"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $csvPath     = ".\metrics_summary.csv"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $costPath    = ".\cost_summary.json"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $dashPath    = ".\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $reportHtml  = ".\REPORT.html"
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 1) Parâmetros (ajuste se quiser)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $CPU_price_per_hour      = 0.02     # USD/h (exemplo)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Mem_price_per_GB_hour   = 0.010    # já definido, reafirmamos
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Energy_price_per_kWh    = 0.15     # já definido
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Storage_IO_price_per_GB = 0.10     # já definido
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # Assunções para custo (ajuste conforme sua realidade)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_avg_mem_GB    = 0.50       # memória média usada durante a prova/bench
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_cpu_cores     = 1.0        # núcleos efetivos utilizados
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_cpu_util      = 0.40       # fator de utilização (40%)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $Assumed_power_watts   = 65         # potência média do host durante a execução
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 2) Persistir/atualizar o pricing no arquivo .md
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $md = Get-Content $pricingPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> function Upsert-Line($text, $key, $val){
>>   if($text -match [regex]::Escape($key) + '\s*='){
>>     return [regex]::Replace($text, '(^|\n)\s*'+[regex]::Escape($key)+'\s*=.*', "`n$($key) = $val", 'IgnoreCase')
>>   } else {
>>     return $text.TrimEnd() + "`n$($key) = $val`n"
>>   }
>> }
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'CPU_price_per_hour'        $CPU_price_per_hour
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'     $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'Energy_price_per_kWh'      $Energy_price_per_kWh
>> $md = Upsert-Line $md 'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'   $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
>> Set-Content -Path $pricingPath -Value $md -Encoding UTF8
>>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 3) Ler tempo total (ms) e bytes totais das métricas
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $rows = Import-Csv $csvPath
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> [int64]$totalBytes = 0; [int64]$totalMs = 0
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> foreach($r in $rows){ $totalBytes += [int64]$r.size_bytes; $totalMs += [int64]$r.elapsed_ms }
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $totalGB = [math]::Round($totalBytes/1GB, 6)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> $totalHours = [math]::Round($totalMs/3600000.0, 6)

PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 4) Calcular custos
