>>   $dash.pricing.CPU_price_per_hour        = $CPU_price_per_hour
>>   $dash.pricing.RAM_price_per_GB_hour     = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
>>   $dash.pricing.Energy_price_per_kWh      = $Energy_price_per_KWh
>>   $dash.pricing.Storage_IO_price_per_GB   = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
>>
>>   if(-not $dash.cost){ $dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cost -NotePropertyValue (@{}) }
>>   $dash.cost.status                  = 'complete'
>>   $dash.cost.total_mb                = [int][math]::Round($totalGB*1024,0)
>>   $dash.cost.storage_io_price_per_GB = $Storage_IO_price_per_GB
>>   $dash.cost.storage_io_cost         = $storage_io_cost
>>   $dash.cost.cpu_price_per_hour      = $CPU_price_per_hour
>>   $dash.cost.mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $Mem_price_per_GB_hour
>>   $dash.cost.energy_price_per_kWh    = $Energy_price_per_KWh
>>   $dash.cost.cpu_cost                = $cpu_cost
>>   $dash.cost.memory_cost             = $memory_cost
>>   $dash.cost.energy_cost             = $energy_cost
>>   $dash.cost.total_cost              = $total_cost
>>
>>   [IO.File]::WriteAllText($dashPath, (ConvertTo-Json $dash -Depth 6), $enc)
>> }
>>
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> # 7) Atualizar seção de custo no REPORT.html (se existir)
PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> if(Test-Path $reportHtml){
>>   $html = Get-Content $reportHtml -Raw -Encoding UTF8
>>   $block = @"
>> <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
>> <p><strong>Status:</strong> complete</p>
>> <ul>
>>   <li>Storage I/O: \$$storage_io_cost ( $totalGB GB × \$$Storage_IO_price_per_GB/GB )</li>
>>   <li>CPU: \$$cpu_cost ( $Assumed_cpu_cores núc × $Assumed_cpu_util util × $totalHours h × \$$CPU_price_per_hour/h )</li>
>>   <li>Memória: \$$memory_cost ( $Assumed_avg_mem_GB GB × $totalHours h × \$$Mem_price_per_GB_hour/GB·h )</li>
>>   <li>Energia: \$$energy_cost ( $kWh kWh × \$$Energy_price_per_kWh/kWh )</li>
>> </ul>
>> <p><strong>Total:</strong> \$$total_cost</p>
>> "@
>>   if($html -match '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>'){
>>     $html = [regex]::Replace($html, '<h2>Custo Computacional</h2>[\s\S]*?(?=<h2>|</body>)', $block, 'IgnoreCase')
>>   } else {
>>     $html = $html -replace '</body>', ($block + "</body>")
>>   }
>>   [IO.File]::WriteAllText($reportHtml, $html, $enc)
>> }
>>

PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> function Get-Num($text, $key, $fallback=$null){
>>   if(-not (Test-Path $pricingPath)){ return $fallback }
>>   $m = [regex]::Match($text, [regex]::Escape($key) + '\s*=\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)')
>>   if($m.Success){ [double]$m.Groups[1].Value } else { $fallback }
>> }
>>

PS D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output> function Get-Num($text,$key,$fallback=$null){

>>   if($m.Success){ [double]$m.Groups[1].Value } else { $fallback }
>> }

>_
  ✗ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference='"'Stop';
    "'$OutDir = (Resolve-Path '"'.').Path;
    "'$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'infra_pricing_request.md';
    "'$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'metrics_summary.csv';
    "'$costSummaryPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json';
    "'$dashboardPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json';
    "'$htmlPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT.html';
    "'$zipPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'teia_results_v3.zip';

    # 1) Parse pricing
    if ("'!(Test-Path $pricingPath)) { throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
    $content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath;
    $keys = '"'CPU_price_per_hour','RAM_price_per_GB_hour','Energy_price_per_kWh','Storage_IO_price_per_GB';
    "'$pricing = @{};
    foreach ($k in $keys) {
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $pattern = "(?im)''^'"\\s*"'${kEsc}'"\\s*[:=]\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\\b\";
      "'$m = [regex]::Match($content,$pattern);
      if ($m.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]$m.Groups[1].Value; }
    }
    foreach ($k in $keys) {
      if ($pricing.ContainsKey($k)) { continue }
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $pattern2 = "(?im)'"\\b"'${kEsc}'"\\b.*?([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\";
      "'$m2 = [regex]::Match($content,$pattern2);
      if ($m2.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]$m2.Groups[1].Value }
    }
    $missing = $keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) };
    if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join '"', ') in "'$pricingPath" }

    # 2) Sum metrics
    if (!(Test-Path $metricsPath)) { throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
    $csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
    if (-not $csv) { throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
    $cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name;
    $sizeCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^size_bytes$'"' };
    "'$elapsedCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^elapsed_ms$'"' };
    if (-not "'$sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol) { throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms
columns. Found: $($cols -join '"', ')\" }
    "'$sumBytes = 0.0; $sumMs = 0.0;
    foreach ($row in $csv) {
      $b = 0.0; $e = 0.0;
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$b);
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$e);
      $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
    }
    $totalGB = $sumBytes / 1e9; # decimal GB
    $totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0;

    # 3) Compute costs with assumptions
    $assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
      avg_mem_GB = 0.5
      cpu_cores   = 1.0
      cpu_util    = 0.40
      power_watts = 65
    };
    $CPU_cost = $pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour'] * "'$assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
    $RAM_cost = $pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'] * "'$assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
    $Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
    $Energy_cost = $Energy_kWh * $pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh'];
    "'$Storage_cost = $pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'] * "'$totalGB;
    $Total_cost = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

    $metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      size_bytes_sum = [double]::Parse(($sumBytes.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      elapsed_ms_sum = [double]::Parse(($sumMs.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      totalGB = [double]::Parse(($totalGB.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      totalHours = [double]::Parse(($totalHours.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
    };
    $pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      CPU_price_per_hour     = [double]$pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']
      RAM_price_per_GB_hour  = [double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']
      Energy_price_per_kWh   = [double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
      Storage_IO_price_per_GB= [double]"'$pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']
    };
    "'$costBreakdown = [pscustomobject]@{
      cpu      = [double]$CPU_cost
      ram      = [double]$RAM_cost
      energy   = [double]$Energy_cost
      storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
      energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
      total    = [double]$Total_cost
    };
    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
      status = '"'complete'
      timestamp_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
      pricing = "'$pricingObj
      metrics = $metricsObj
      assumptions = $assumptions
      cost = $costBreakdown
    };

    # 4) Write cost_summary.json
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costSummaryPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # 5) Update REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (.pricing and .cost + status)
    $dashboard = @{};
    if (Test-Path $dashboardPath) {
      try { $dashboard = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashboardPath | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $dashboard = @{} }
    }
    $dashboard.status = '"'complete';
    "'$dashboard.pricing = $pricingObj;
    $dashboard.cost = $costBreakdown;
    $dashboard.metrics = $metricsObj;
    $dashboard.assumptions = $assumptions;
    $dashboard | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashboardPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # 6) Update/inject section in REPORT.html
    function FormatInv([double]$n, [string]$fmt = '"'0.######') {
      return [string]::Format([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture, \"{0:"'${fmt}}", $n)
    }
    $snippet = @"
    <!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->
    <section id="custo-computacional">
      <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
      <ul>
        <li>CPU: $$(FormatInv $CPU_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li>RAM: "'$$(FormatInv $RAM_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li>Energia: "'$$(FormatInv $Energy_cost '"'0.######') (kWh: "'$(FormatInv $Energy_kWh))</li>
        <li>Storage I/O: $$(FormatInv $Storage_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li><strong>Total: "'$$(FormatInv $Total_cost '"'0.######')</strong></li>
      </ul>
      <p>Tempo total: "'$(FormatInv $totalHours '"'0.########') h; Dados processados: "'$(FormatInv $totalGB
'"'0.######') GB</p>
    </section>
    <"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
    "@;
    if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
      if ($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet });
      } elseif ($html -match '"'</body>') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>");
      } else {
        $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n";
      }
    } else {
      $html = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
      $snippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@;
    }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8;

    # 7) Update ZIP with required files

  ✓ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference='"'Stop';
    "'$OutDir = (Resolve-Path '"'.').Path;
    "'$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'infra_pricing_request.md';
    "'$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'metrics_summary.csv';
    "'$costSummaryPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json';
    "'$dashboardPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json';
    "'$htmlPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT.html';
    "'$zipPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'teia_results_v3.zip';

    # Parse pricing
    if ("'!(Test-Path $pricingPath)) { throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
    $content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath;
    $keys = '"'CPU_price_per_hour','RAM_price_per_GB_hour','Energy_price_per_kWh','Storage_IO_price_per_GB';
    "'$pricing = @{};
    foreach ($k in $keys) {
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $pattern = "(?im)''^'"\\s*"'${kEsc}'"\\s*[:=]\\s*([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\\b\";
      "'$m = [regex]::Match($content,$pattern);
      if ($m.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]$m.Groups[1].Value; }
    }
    foreach ($k in $keys) {
      if ($pricing.ContainsKey($k)) { continue }
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $pattern2 = "(?im)'"\\b"'${kEsc}'"\\b.*?([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\";
      "'$m2 = [regex]::Match($content,$pattern2);
      if ($m2.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]$m2.Groups[1].Value }
    }
    $missing = $keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) };
    if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join '"', ') in "'$pricingPath" }

    # Sum metrics
    if (!(Test-Path $metricsPath)) { throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
    $csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
    if (-not $csv) { throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
    $cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name;
    $sizeCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^size_bytes$'"' };
    "'$elapsedCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^elapsed_ms$'"' };
    if (-not "'$sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol) { throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms
columns. Found: $($cols -join '"', ')\" }
    "'$sumBytes = 0.0; $sumMs = 0.0;
    foreach ($row in $csv) {
      $b = 0.0; $e = 0.0;
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$b);
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$e);
      $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
    }
    $totalGB = $sumBytes / 1e9; # decimal GB
    $totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0;

    # Assumptions and costs
    $assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
      avg_mem_GB = 0.5
      cpu_cores   = 1.0
      cpu_util    = 0.40
      power_watts = 65
    };
    $CPU_cost = $pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour'] * "'$assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
    $RAM_cost = $pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'] * "'$assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
    $Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
    $Energy_cost = $Energy_kWh * $pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh'];
    "'$Storage_cost = $pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB'] * "'$totalGB;
    $Total_cost = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

    $metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      size_bytes_sum = [double]::Parse(($sumBytes.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      elapsed_ms_sum = [double]::Parse(($sumMs.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      totalGB = [double]::Parse(($totalGB.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
      totalHours = [double]::Parse(($totalHours.ToString([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture)))
    };
    $pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      CPU_price_per_hour     = [double]$pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']
      RAM_price_per_GB_hour  = [double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']
      Energy_price_per_kWh   = [double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
      Storage_IO_price_per_GB= [double]"'$pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']
    };
    "'$costBreakdown = [pscustomobject]@{
      cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
      ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
      energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
      storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
      energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
      total      = [double]$Total_cost
    };
    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
      status = '"'complete'
      timestamp_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
      pricing = "'$pricingObj
      metrics = $metricsObj
      assumptions = $assumptions
      cost = $costBreakdown
    };

    # Write cost_summary.json
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costSummaryPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # Write REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (fresh object with required fields)
    $dashboard = [pscustomobject]@{
      status = '"'complete'
      pricing = "'$pricingObj
      cost = $costBreakdown
      metrics = $metricsObj
      assumptions = $assumptions
    };
    $dashboard | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashboardPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # Update/inject section in REPORT.html
    function FormatInv([double]$n, [string]$fmt = '"'0.######') {
      return [string]::Format([Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture, \"{0:"'${fmt}}", $n)
    }
    $snippet = @"
    <!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->
    <section id="custo-computacional">
      <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
      <ul>
        <li>CPU: $$(FormatInv $CPU_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li>RAM: "'$$(FormatInv $RAM_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li>Energia: "'$$(FormatInv $Energy_cost '"'0.######') (kWh: "'$(FormatInv $Energy_KWh))</li>
        <li>Storage I/O: $$(FormatInv $Storage_cost '"'0.######')</li>
        <li><strong>Total: "'$$(FormatInv $Total_cost '"'0.######')</strong></li>
      </ul>
      <p>Tempo total: "'$(FormatInv $totalHours '"'0.########') h; Dados processados: "'$(FormatInv $totalGB
'"'0.######') GB</p>
    </section>
    <"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
    "@;
    if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
      if ($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet });
      } elseif ($html -match '"'</body>') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>");
      } else {
        $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n";
      }
    } else {
      $html = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
      $snippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@;
    }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8;

    # Update ZIP
    Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem;
    if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create);
    $filesToZip = @($pricingPath, $costSummaryPath, $dashboardPath, $htmlPath);
    foreach ($f in $filesToZip) {
      if (Test-Path $f) {
        [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip, $f, [IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
      }
    }
    $zip.Dispose();

    "UPDATED:";
    $costSummaryPath;
    $dashboardPath;
    $htmlPath;
    $zipPath;
    "status=complete";'

📋 Update plan [██████████] 7/7
  └ ✔ Parse pricing from Markdown

codex


user
user
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP)
Contexto:
- Projeto: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1
- Usar diretório de saída: .\codex_audit_output  (chamar de $OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; somente arquivos dentro de $OutDir.

Objetivo:
1) Recalcular custos a partir de infra_pricing_request.md e metrics_summary.csv.
2) Gravar cost_summary.json no **layout novo** (statuspricingmetricsassumptionscost) e também incluir um **nó "legacy"**
com os campos planos esperados pelos comandos antigos.
3) Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json com o layout novo **e**, dentro de .cost, **espelhar** os campos legados (status,
total_mb, *_price_*, *_cost, total_cost).
4) Injetaratualizar o bloco Custo Computacional em REPORT.html entre marcadores BEGINEND.
5) Recriar teia_results_v3.zip contendo: infra_pricing_request.md, cost_summary.json, REPORT_DASHBOARD.json,
REPORT.html.
6) Ser idempotente (pode rodar várias vezes); usar **cultura invariante** (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos para
evitar C:\Windows\System32.

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

Execute em PowerShell 7:

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop";
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest;

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1";
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output";
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md";
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv";
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json";
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json";
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html";
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip";
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false);
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture;

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt="0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Parse pricing (tolerante a Markdown) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath;

$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB");
$pricing = @{};
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
  $m = [regex]::Match($content, "(im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(:\.[0-9]+))\b");
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse($m.Groups[1].Value,$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, "(im)\b$kEsc\b.*([0-9]+(:\.[0-9]+))");
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse($m2.Groups[1].Value,$inv) }
}
$missing = $keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) }
if($missing.Count -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ')" }

# --- 2) Somar métricas (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv  = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }

$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join ', ')" }

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0;
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0;
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol   -replace ',','.'), [ref]$b);
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol-replace ',','.'), [ref]$e);
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
}
# GB decimais (10^9)
$totalGB    = $sumBytes  1e9;
$totalHours = $sumMs  1000.0  3600.0;

# --- 3) Assumptions & Costs ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
  avg_mem_GB = 0.5
  cpu_cores  = 1.0
  cpu_util   = 0.40
  power_watts= 65
};

$CPU_cost      = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]      * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours;
$RAM_cost      = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]   * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
$Energy_kWh    = ($assumptions.power_watts1000.0)   * $assumptions.cpu_util   * $totalHours;
$Energy_cost   = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"];
$Storage_cost  = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB;
$Total_cost    = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

# --- 4) cost_summary.json (layout novo + nó legacy) ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
  elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
  totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
  totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
  ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
  energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
  energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
  total      = [double]$Total_cost
}

$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status                  = "complete"
  total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
  memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
  energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
  total_cost              = $costObj.total
}

$costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
  status         = "complete"
  timestamp_utc  = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing        = $pricingObj
  metrics        = $metricsObj
  assumptions    = $assumptions
  cost           = $costObj
  legacy         = $legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo + compat legada em .cost) ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status       = "complete"
  pricing      = $pricingObj
  metrics      = $metricsObj
  assumptions  = $assumptions
  cost         = $costObj
}
# espelha campos legados dentro de .cost (sem perder os novos)
$dash.cost | Add-Member status                  "complete" -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member total_mb                ([int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))) -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member storage_io_price_per_GB $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB -Force



>_

    Set-StrictMode -Version Latest;

    # --- Setup & Paths ---
    "'$Root   = '"'D:\\Teia\\TEIA_NUCLEO\\offline\\nano\\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1';
    "'$OutDir = Join-Path $Root '"'codex_audit_output';
    if("'!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

    $pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'infra_pricing_request.md';
    "'$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'metrics_summary.csv';
    "'$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json';
    "'$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json';
    "'$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT.html';
    "'$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir '"'teia_results_v3.zip';
    "'$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false);
    $inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture;

    function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt='"'0.######'){ [string]::Format("'$inv,'"'{0:'+"'$fmt+'"'}',"'$n) }

    # --- 1) Parse pricing (tolerant to Markdown; supports comma or dot decimals) ---
    if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
    $content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath;

    $keys = @('"'CPU_price_per_hour','RAM_price_per_GB_hour','Energy_price_per_kWh','Storage_IO_price_per_GB');
    "'$pricing = @{};
    foreach($k in $keys){
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $m = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)''^'"\\s*"'$kEsc'"\\s*[:=]\\s*([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?)\\b\");
      if("'$m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace '"',','.'), "'$inv) }
    }
    foreach($k in $keys){
      if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)'"\\b"'$kEsc'"\\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?)\");
      if("'$m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace '"',','.'), "'$inv) }
    }
    $missing = $keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) };
    if($missing.Count -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join '"', ') in "'$pricingPath" }

    # --- 2) Sum metrics (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
    if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
    $csv  = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
    if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }

    $cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name;
    $sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^size_bytes$'"' });
    "'$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^elapsed_ms$'"' });
    if(-not "'$sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join '"', ')\" }

    [double]"'$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0;
    foreach($row in $csv){
      [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0;
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$b);
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$e);
      $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
    }
    # Decimal GB (10''^9) and hours
    $totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9;
    $totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0;

    # --- 3) Assumptions & Costs ---
    $assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
      avg_mem_GB = 0.5
      cpu_cores  = 1.0
      cpu_util   = 0.40
      power_watts= 65
    };
    $CPU_cost      = $pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']     * "'$assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util *
$totalHours;
    $RAM_cost      = $pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']  * "'$assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
    $Energy_kWh    = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0)  * $assumptions.cpu_util   * $totalHours;
    $Energy_cost   = $Energy_kWh * $pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh'];
    "'$Storage_cost  = $pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']* "'$totalGB;
    $Total_cost    = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

    # --- 4) cost_summary.json (new layout + legacy node) ---
    $pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']
      RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']
      Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
      Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]"'$pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']
    };
    "'$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
      elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
      totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
      totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
    };
    $costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
      ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
      energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
      storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
      energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
      total      = [double]$Total_cost
    };

    $legacy = [ordered]@{
      status                  = '"'complete'
      total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round("'$metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
      storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
      storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
      cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
      mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
      energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
      cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
      memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
      energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
      total_cost              = $costObj.total
    };

    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
      status         = '"'complete'
      timestamp_utc  = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
      pricing        = "'$pricingObj
      metrics        = $metricsObj
      assumptions    = $assumptions
      cost           = $costObj
      legacy         = $legacy
    };
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (new + mirror legacy fields inside .cost) ---
    $dash = [pscustomobject]@{
      status       = '"'complete'
      pricing      = "'$pricingObj
      metrics      = $metricsObj
      assumptions  = $assumptions
      cost         = $costObj
    };
    # Mirror legacy fields into .cost (without losing new ones)
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName status                  -NotePropertyValue '"'complete' -Force;
    "'$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_mb                -NotePropertyValue ([int]
([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))) -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_price_per_GB -NotePropertyValue

    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_cost         -NotePropertyValue $costObj.storage_io -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_price_per_hour      -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
-Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName mem_price_per_GB_hour   -NotePropertyValue
$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_price_per_kWh    -NotePropertyValue

    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_cost                -NotePropertyValue $costObj.cpu -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName memory_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.ram -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.energy -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_cost              -NotePropertyValue $costObj.total -Force;
    $dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 6) REPORT.html (inject/update block between markers) ---
    function BuildSnippet {
      $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder;
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('"'<"'!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->'"');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'<section id=\"custo-computacional\">');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <ul>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$("+(InvStr $CPU_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$("+(InvStr $RAM_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$("+(InvStr $Energy_cost)+'"') (kWh: '+(InvStr "'$Energy_kWh)+'"')</
li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$("+(InvStr $Storage_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$("+(InvStr $Total_cost)+'"')</strong></li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  </ul>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <p>Tempo total: '+(InvStr "'$totalHours,'"'0.########')+' h; Dados processados:
'+(InvStr "'$totalGB)+'"' GB</p>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'</section>');
      [void]"'$sb.Append('"'<"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->'"');
      return "'$sb.ToString();
    }
    $snippet = BuildSnippet;

    if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
      if ($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet });
      } elseif ($html -match '"'</body>') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>");
      } else {
        $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n";
      }

      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)'"\\b"'$kEsc'"\\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?)\");
      if("'$m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace '"',','.'), "'$inv) }
    }
    $missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) });
    if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join '"', ') in "'$pricingPath" }

    # --- 2) Sum metrics (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
    if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
    $csv  = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
    if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }

    $cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name;
    $sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^size_bytes$'"' });
    "'$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^elapsed_ms$'"' });
    if(-not "'$sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join '"', ')\" }

    [double]"'$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0;
    foreach($row in $csv){
      [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0;
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$b);
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$e);
      $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
    }
    # Decimal GB (10''^9) and hours
    $totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9;
    $totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0;

    # --- 3) Assumptions & Costs ---
    $assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
      avg_mem_GB = 0.5
      cpu_cores  = 1.0
      cpu_util   = 0.40
      power_watts= 65
    };
    $CPU_cost      = $pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']     * "'$assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util *
$totalHours;
    $RAM_cost      = $pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']  * "'$assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
    $Energy_kWh    = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0)  * $assumptions.cpu_util   * $totalHours;
    $Energy_cost   = $Energy_kWh * $pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh'];
    "'$Storage_cost  = $pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']* "'$totalGB;
    $Total_cost    = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

    # --- 4) cost_summary.json (new layout + legacy node) ---
    $pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']
      RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']
      Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
      Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]"'$pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']
    };
    "'$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
      elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
      totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
      totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
    };
    $costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
      ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
      energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
      storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
      energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_KWh
      total      = [double]$Total_cost
    };

    $legacy = [ordered]@{
      status                  = '"'complete'
      total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round("'$metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
      storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
      storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
      cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
      mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
      energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
      cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
      memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
      energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
      total_cost              = $costObj.total
    };

    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
      status         = '"'complete'
      timestamp_utc  = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
      pricing        = "'$pricingObj
      metrics        = $metricsObj
      assumptions    = $assumptions
      cost           = $costObj
      legacy         = $legacy
    };
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (new + mirror legacy fields inside .cost) ---
    $dash = [pscustomobject]@{
      status       = '"'complete'
      pricing      = "'$pricingObj
      metrics      = $metricsObj
      assumptions  = $assumptions
      cost         = $costObj
    };
    # Mirror legacy fields into .cost (without losing new ones)
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName status                  -NotePropertyValue '"'complete' -Force;
    "'$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_mb                -NotePropertyValue ([int]
([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))) -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_price_per_GB -NotePropertyValue
$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_cost         -NotePropertyValue $costObj.storage_io -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_price_per_hour      -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
-Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName mem_price_per_GB_hour   -NotePropertyValue
$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_price_per_kWh    -NotePropertyValue
$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_KWh -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_cost                -NotePropertyValue $costObj.cpu -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName memory_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.ram -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.energy -Force;
    $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_cost              -NotePropertyValue $costObj.total -Force;
    $dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 6) REPORT.html (inject/update block between markers) ---
    function BuildSnippet {
      $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder;
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('"'<"'!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->'"');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'<section id=\"custo-computacional\">');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <ul>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$("+(InvStr $CPU_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$("+(InvStr $RAM_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$("+(InvStr $Energy_cost)+'"') (kWh: '+(InvStr "'$Energy_kWh)+'"')</
li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$("+(InvStr $Storage_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$("+(InvStr $Total_cost)+'"')</strong></li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  </ul>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <p>Tempo total: '+(InvStr "'$totalHours '"'0.########')+' h; Dados processados:
'+(InvStr "'$totalGB)+'"' GB</p>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'</section>');
      [void]"'$sb.Append('"'<"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->'"');
      return "'$sb.ToString();
    }
    $snippet = BuildSnippet;

    if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
      if ($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet });
      } elseif ($html -match '"'</body>') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>");
      } else {
        $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n";
      }
    } else {
      $html = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
      $snippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@;
    }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 7) Recreate ZIP with required files ---
    Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem;
    if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create);
    $filesToZip = @($pricingPath, $costPath, $dashPath, $htmlPath);
    foreach ($f in $filesToZip) {
      if (Test-Path $f) {
        [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip, $f, [IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null;
      }
    }
    $zip.Dispose();

    "UPDATED:";
    $costPath;
    $dashPath;
    $htmlPath;
    $zipPath;
    '"'status=complete';"

### ASSISTENTE

Entendi, Felippe. 🚀  
O *Codex Master Prompt* já está no caminho certo, mas notei dois pontos que precisam de ajuste fino para não travar no `partial`:

1. **Parsing de preços** – as suas regex antigas não capturavam porque usavam `(:\.[0-9]+)` em vez de `(?:\.[0-9]+)`. Isso fazia `$CPU_price_per_hour` e outros virem em branco → `partial`.
2. **Nó `legacy` e dashboard** – o ideal é que o script grave `cost_summary.json` e `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` no formato novo **e** replique os campos legados dentro de `.legacy` e `.cost` para compatibilidade.

Aqui vai a versão corrigida e pronta para colar, no padrão TEIA (idempotente, cultura invariante, ZIP final atualizado):  

```powershell
# === TEIA - Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP ===
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if (!(Test-Path $OutDir)) { throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt="0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# 1) Preços
if (!(Test-Path $pricingPath)) { throw "Missing $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach ($k in $keys) {
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[.,][0-9]+)?)\b")
  if ($m.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach ($k in $keys) {
  if ($pricing.ContainsKey($k)) { continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[.,][0-9]+)?)")
  if ($m2.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if ($missing.Length -gt 0) { throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ')" }

# 2) Métricas
if (!(Test-Path $metricsPath)) { throw "Missing $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if (-not $csv) { throw "Empty $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' }
$elapsedCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' }
if (-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol) { throw "metrics_summary.csv missing required cols" }
[double]$sumBytes=0; [double]$sumMs=0
foreach ($row in $csv) {
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol -replace ",","."),[ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."),[ref]$e)
  $sumBytes+=$b; $sumMs+=$e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes/1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs/1000.0/3600.0

# 3) Custos
$assumptions=[pscustomobject]@{avg_mem_GB=0.5;cpu_cores=1.0;cpu_util=0.40;power_watts=65}
$CPU_cost    = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]*$assumptions.cpu_cores*$assumptions.cpu_util*$totalHours
$RAM_cost    = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]*$assumptions.avg_mem_GB*$totalHours
$Energy_kWh  = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0)*$assumptions.cpu_util*$totalHours
$Energy_cost = $Energy_kWh*$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost= $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]*$totalGB
$Total_cost  = $CPU_cost+$RAM_cost+$Energy_cost+$Storage_cost

# 4) Objetos
$pricingObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour=$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour=$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh=$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB=$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=$sumBytes;elapsed_ms_sum=$sumMs;totalGB=$totalGB;totalHours=$totalHours
}
$costObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=$CPU_cost;ram=$RAM_cost;energy=$Energy_cost;storage_io=$Storage_cost;energy_kwh=$Energy_kWh;total=$Total_cost
}
$legacy=[ordered]@{
  status="complete";total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io;cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour;energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu;memory_cost=$costObj.ram;energy_cost=$costObj.energy;total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete";timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj;metrics=$metricsObj;assumptions=$assumptions;cost=$costObj;legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8|Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# 5) Dashboard
$dash=[pscustomobject]@{status="complete";pricing=$pricingObj;metrics=$metricsObj;assumptions=$assumptions;cost=$costObj}
$legacy.GetEnumerator()|ForEach-Object{$dash.cost|Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue $_.Value -Force}
$dash|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8|Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# 6) HTML
function BuildSnippet {
  @"
<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->
<section id="custo-computacional">
  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>
  <ul>
    <li>CPU: $$(InvStr $CPU_cost)</li>
    <li>RAM: $$(InvStr $RAM_cost)</li>
    <li>Energia: $$(InvStr $Energy_cost) (kWh: $(InvStr $Energy_kWh))</li>
    <li>Storage I/O: $$(InvStr $Storage_cost)</li>
    <li><strong>Total: $$(InvStr $Total_cost)</strong></li>
  </ul>
  <p>Tempo total: $(InvStr $totalHours,"0.########") h; Dados processados: $(InvStr $totalGB) GB</p>
</section>
<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
"@
}
$snippet=BuildSnippet
if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html=Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  if($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"){
    $html=[regex]::Replace($html,"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->",$snippet)
  }elseif($html -match "</body>"){
    $html=$html -replace "</body>",($snippet+"`n</body>")
  }else{ $html+="`n$snippet`n" }
}else{
  $html=@"
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="pt-BR"><head><meta charset="utf-8"/><title>Relatório TEIA</title></head><body>
$snippet
</body></html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# 7) ZIP
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if(Test-Path $zipPath){Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force}
$zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){[System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal)|Out-Null}
}
$zip.Dispose()
"OK: custos recalculados, dashboard+HTML atualizados, ZIP pronto."
```

### Instruções
1. Copie e cole o script acima no PowerShell 7, estando dentro de `D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output`.
2. Ele vai gerar/atualizar:

   - `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` (novo + campos legados dentro de `.cost`)
   - `REPORT.html` (bloco entre `BEGIN/END`)
   - `teia_results_v3.zip` com tudo consolidado.
3. Resultado esperado: todos os arquivos mostram `status: complete`, com preços preenchidos e compatibilidade garantida.

user
# === TEIA - Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP ===
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if (!(Test-Path $OutDir)) { throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt="0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# 1) Preços
if (!(Test-Path $pricingPath)) { throw "Missing $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach ($k in $keys) {
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m = [regex]::Match($content,"(im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(:[.,][0-9]+))\b")
  if ($m.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach ($k in $keys) {
  if ($pricing.ContainsKey($k)) { continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(im)\b$kEsc\b.*([0-9]+(:[.,][0-9]+))")
  if ($m2.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if ($missing.Length -gt 0) { throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ')" }

# 2) Métricas
if (!(Test-Path $metricsPath)) { throw "Missing $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if (-not $csv) { throw "Empty $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' }
$elapsedCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' }
if (-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol) { throw "metrics_summary.csv missing required cols" }
[double]$sumBytes=0; [double]$sumMs=0
foreach ($row in $csv) {
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol -replace ",","."),[ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."),[ref]$e)
  $sumBytes+=$b; $sumMs+=$e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs1000.03600.0

# 3) Custos
$assumptions=[pscustomobject]@{avg_mem_GB=0.5;cpu_cores=1.0;cpu_util=0.40;power_watts=65}
$CPU_cost    = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]*$assumptions.cpu_cores*$assumptions.cpu_util*$totalHours
$RAM_cost    = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]*$assumptions.avg_mem_GB*$totalHours
$Energy_kWh  = ($assumptions.power_watts1000.0)*$assumptions.cpu_util*$totalHours
$Energy_cost = $Energy_kWh*$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost= $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]*$totalGB
$Total_cost  = $CPU_cost+$RAM_cost+$Energy_cost+$Storage_cost

# 4) Objetos
$pricingObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour=$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour=$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh=$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB=$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=$sumBytes;elapsed_ms_sum=$sumMs;totalGB=$totalGB;totalHours=$totalHours
}
$costObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=$CPU_cost;ram=$RAM_cost;energy=$Energy_cost;storage_io=$Storage_cost;energy_kwh=$Energy_kWh;total=$Total_cost
}
$legacy=[ordered]@{
  status="complete";total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io;cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour;energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu;memory_cost=$costObj.ram;energy_cost=$costObj.energy;total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete";timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj;metrics=$metricsObj;assumptions=$assumptions;cost=$costObj;legacy=$legacy

Applied

- Recalculated costs from pricing + metrics with invariant culture.

Compat Fixes

<section>
<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
"@
}
$snippet=BuildSnippet
if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html=Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  if($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"){
    $html=[regex]::Replace($html,"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo
Computacional\s*-->",$snippet)
  }elseif($html -match "<body>"){
    $html=$html -replace "<body>",($snippet+"`n<body>")
  }else{ $html+="`n$snippet`n" }
}else{
  $html=@"
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="pt-BR"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Relatório TEIA<title><head><body>
$snippet
<body><html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# 7) ZIP
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if(Test-Path $zipPath){Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force}
$zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){[System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal)|Out-Null}
}
$zip.Dispose()
"OK: custos recalculados, dashboard+HTML atualizados, ZIP pronto."

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — agora está `status=complete` e os campos legados estão espelhados.  
Se quiser fechar com chave de ouro, rode um **check rápido** no Codex para validar consistência e imprimir um resumo legível:

```text
run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference="Stop"
$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
$inv = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

$cs   = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath (Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json")     | ConvertFrom-Json
$dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath (Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json") | ConvertFrom-Json
$html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath (Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html")

# 1) Verificações
if($cs.status -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dash.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "Bloco HTML BEGIN/END não encontrado"
}

# 2) Consistência new vs legacy
$legacy = $cs.legacy
$eq = @{
  total_mb = ($legacy.total_mb -eq [int]([math]::Round($cs.metrics.totalGB*1024,0)))
  cpu_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.cpu_cost   - $cs.cost.cpu)      -lt 1e-9)
  ram_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.memory_cost- $cs.cost.ram)      -lt 1e-9)
  en_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.energy_cost- $cs.cost.energy)   -lt 1e-9)
  io_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.storage_io_cost- $cs.cost.storage_io) -lt 1e-9)
  total    = ([math]::Abs($legacy.total_cost - $cs.cost.total)    -lt 1e-9)
}
if(($eq.GetEnumerator()|?{ -not $_.Value }).Count){ throw "Inconsistência entre new/legacy em: " + (($eq.GetEnumerator()|?{ -not $_.Value }).Name -join ", ") }

# 3) Resumo amigável
$fmt = {
  param($n) [string]::Format($inv,"{0:0.######}",[double]$n)
}
$summary = [pscustomobject]@{
  total_GB      = (& $fmt $cs.metrics.totalGB)
  total_hours   = (& $fmt $cs.metrics.totalHours)
  cpu_cost      = (& $fmt $cs.cost.cpu)
  ram_cost      = (& $fmt $cs.cost.ram)
  energy_cost   = (& $fmt $cs.cost.energy)
  storage_io    = (& $fmt $cs.cost.storage_io)
  total_cost    = (& $fmt $cs.cost.total)
}
$summary | Format-List

"OK: validação passou."
'
```

Se notar qualquer sujeira de marcação (como `<title>…<title>` ou `<head>` duplicado), pode aplicar este **hotfix opcional** no HTML:

```text
run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$OutDir = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output"
$p = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p
$html = $html -replace "<title>([^<]+)<title>","<title>`$1</title>"
$html = $html -replace "<head>","<head>",1 -replace "</head>","</head>",1
$html = $html -replace "(?s)</body>.*</html>$","</body></html>"
Set-Content -LiteralPath $p -Value $html -Encoding UTF8
"OK: HTML normalizado."
'
```

Quer que eu te entregue um **prompt único** “/run recalc+validate” juntando recálculo, atualização e validação em um bloco só?

### ASSISTENTE

Entendido ✅ — nesse ponto você não precisa mais colar blocos grandes de PowerShell manualmente.  
Basta **delegar a função inteira** para o Codex CLI, assim:

```text
codex
# TEIA - Recalc + Dashboard + HTML + ZIP + Validate
task: custos_dashboard_full

goals:
  - Recalcular custos a partir de infra_pricing_request.md + metrics_summary.csv
  - Atualizar cost_summary.json (novo layout + legacy)
  - Atualizar REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo layout + cost legado espelhado)
  - Injet

---

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito! Aqui vai um **prompt único** para o Codex CLI (compatível com `/run`), que recalcula, atualiza JSON (novo+legado), injeta HTML entre marcadores, recria o ZIP e faz uma validação final com resumo.  
Basta colar no Codex:

```text
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Validate)
Contexto:
- Projeto: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar $OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em $OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv, "{0:$fmt}", $n) }

# --- 1) Parse pricing (tolerante a Markdown; vírgula ou ponto) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath

$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)\b")
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."), $inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)")
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."), $inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somar métricas (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }

$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){
  throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found: $($cols -join ', ')"
}

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
# GB decimais (10^9) e horas
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0

# --- 3) Assunções & Custos ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
  avg_mem_GB  = 0.5
  cpu_cores   = 1.0
  cpu_util    = 0.40
  power_watts = 65
}
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]     * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]  * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) Objetos (novo layout + nó legacy) ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_KWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
  elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
  totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
  totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
  ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
  energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
  energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
  total      = [double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status                  = "complete"
  total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
  memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
  energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
  total_cost              = $costObj.total
}
$costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
  status        = "complete"
  timestamp_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing       = $pricingObj
  metrics       = $metricsObj
  assumptions   = $assumptions
  cost          = $costObj
  legacy        = $legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo + espelho legacy em .cost) ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status      = "complete"
  pricing     = $pricingObj
  metrics     = $metricsObj
  assumptions = $assumptions
  cost        = $costObj
}
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName status                  -NotePropertyValue "complete" -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_mb                -NotePropertyValue ([int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))) -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_price_per_GB -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_cost         -NotePropertyValue $costObj.storage_io -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_price_per_hour      -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName mem_price_per_GB_hour   -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_price_per_kWh    -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_KWh -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_cost                -NotePropertyValue $costObj.cpu -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName memory_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.ram -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.energy -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_cost              -NotePropertyValue $costObj.total -Force
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) REPORT.html (inserir/atualizar entre BEGIN/END; corrigir marcações comuns) ---
function BuildSnippet {
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $(" + (InvStr $CPU_cost) + ")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $(" + (InvStr $RAM_cost) + ")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $(" + (InvStr $Energy_cost) + ") (kWh: " + (InvStr $Energy_kWh) + ")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $(" + (InvStr $Storage_cost) + ")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $(" + (InvStr $Total_cost) + ")</strong></li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p>Tempo total: " + (InvStr $totalHours,"0.########") + " h; Dados processados: " + (InvStr $totalGB) + " GB</p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$snippet = BuildSnippet

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  # Corrigir problemas comuns de tags duplicadas/abertas
  $html = $html -replace "<title>([^<]+)<title>","<title>`$1</title>"
  if(-not ($html -match "</head>")){ $html = $html -replace "(?is)(<head[^>]*>.*)$","`$1</head>" }
  if(-not ($html -match "<body")){ $html = $html -replace "(?is)(</head>)","`$1`n<body>" }
  if(-not ($html -match "</body>")){ $html += "`n</body>" }
  if(-not ($html -match "</html>")){ $html += "`n</html>" }

  if($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->",[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $snippet })
  } elseif($html -match "</body>"){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",$snippet + "`n</body>",1)
  } else {
    $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n"
  }
} else {
  $html = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$snippet
</body>
</html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# --- 7) ZIP (recriar) ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if(Test-Path $zipPath){ Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal)|Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) Validação + Resumo ---
$cs   = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath

if($cs.status -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dash.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block BEGIN/END not found"
}

$legacy = $cs.legacy
$checks = @{
  total_mb = ($legacy.total_mb -eq [int]([math]::Round($cs.metrics.totalGB*1024,0)))
  cpu_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.cpu_cost    - $cs.cost.cpu)        -lt 1e-9)
  ram_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.memory_cost - $cs.cost.ram)        -lt 1e-9)
  en_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.energy_cost - $cs.cost.energy)     -lt 1e-9)
  io_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.storage_io_cost - $cs.cost.storage_io) -lt 1e-9)
  total    = ([math]::Abs($legacy.total_cost  - $cs.cost.total)      -lt 1e-9)
}
$bad = ($checks.GetEnumerator() | Where-Object { -not $_.Value }).Name -join ", "
if($bad){ throw "Inconsistência entre new/legacy em: $bad" }

$summary = [pscustomobject]@{
  total_GB     = (InvStr $cs.metrics.totalGB)
  total_hours  = (InvStr $cs.metrics.totalHours,"0.########")
  cpu_cost     = (InvStr $cs.cost.cpu)
  ram_cost     = (InvStr $cs.cost.ram)
  energy_cost  = (InvStr $cs.cost.energy)
  storage_io   = (InvStr $cs.cost.storage_io)
  total_cost   = (InvStr $cs.cost.total)
}
"`n=== TEIA Recálculo / Validação ==="
"cost_summary.json : $costPath"
"REPORT_DASHBOARD  : $dashPath"
"REPORT.html       : $htmlPath"
"ZIP               : $zipPath"
$summary | Format-List
"OK: validação passou e artefatos atualizados."
'
```

Se quiser, posso te gerar uma versão “mínima” (sem validação/normalização de HTML), mas essa acima já cobre o ciclo completo com checagens claras.

---

### USUÁRIO

user

<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
"@

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  if($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo
Computacional\s*-->",$snippet)
  } elseif($html -match "<body>"){
    $html = $html -replace "<body>", ($snippet + "`n<body>")
  } else {
    $html += "`n$snippet`n"
  }
} else {
  $html = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" >
  <title>Relatório TEIA<title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" >
<head>
<body>
$snippet
<body>
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($htmlPath,$html,$enc)

# --- 7) ZIP (usando caminhos absolutos) ---
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'

codex
I’ll quickly verify the generated JSON structures and the injected HTML block to confirm new+legacy fields and markers
are correct.

>_
  ✓ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$OutDir = (Resolve-Path '"'.').Path; "'$cost = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath
(Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json') | ConvertFrom-Json; "'$dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath (Join-Path
