user
# === TEIA - Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP ===
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if (!(Test-Path $OutDir)) { throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt="0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# 1) Preços
if (!(Test-Path $pricingPath)) { throw "Missing $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach ($k in $keys) {
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m = [regex]::Match($content,"(im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(:[.,][0-9]+))\b")
  if ($m.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach ($k in $keys) {
  if ($pricing.ContainsKey($k)) { continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(im)\b$kEsc\b.*([0-9]+(:[.,][0-9]+))")
  if ($m2.Success) { $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if ($missing.Length -gt 0) { throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ')" }

# 2) Métricas
if (!(Test-Path $metricsPath)) { throw "Missing $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if (-not $csv) { throw "Empty $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' }
$elapsedCol = $cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' }
if (-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol) { throw "metrics_summary.csv missing required cols" }
[double]$sumBytes=0; [double]$sumMs=0
foreach ($row in $csv) {
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol -replace ",","."),[ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."),[ref]$e)
  $sumBytes+=$b; $sumMs+=$e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs1000.03600.0

# 3) Custos
$assumptions=[pscustomobject]@{avg_mem_GB=0.5;cpu_cores=1.0;cpu_util=0.40;power_watts=65}
$CPU_cost    = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]*$assumptions.cpu_cores*$assumptions.cpu_util*$totalHours
$RAM_cost    = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]*$assumptions.avg_mem_GB*$totalHours
$Energy_kWh  = ($assumptions.power_watts1000.0)*$assumptions.cpu_util*$totalHours
$Energy_cost = $Energy_kWh*$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost= $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]*$totalGB
$Total_cost  = $CPU_cost+$RAM_cost+$Energy_cost+$Storage_cost

# 4) Objetos
$pricingObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour=$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour=$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh=$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB=$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=$sumBytes;elapsed_ms_sum=$sumMs;totalGB=$totalGB;totalHours=$totalHours
}
$costObj=[pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=$CPU_cost;ram=$RAM_cost;energy=$Energy_cost;storage_io=$Storage_cost;energy_kwh=$Energy_kWh;total=$Total_cost
}
$legacy=[ordered]@{
  status="complete";total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io;cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour;energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu;memory_cost=$costObj.ram;energy_cost=$costObj.energy;total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete";timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj;metrics=$metricsObj;assumptions=$assumptions;cost=$costObj;legacy=$legacy


codex
Updated Artifacts

- cost_summary.json: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output\cost_summary.json
- REPORT_DASHBOARD.json: D:
\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json
- REPORT.html: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output\REPORT.html
- teia_results_v3.zip: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output\teia_results_v3.zip

Applied

- Recalculated costs from pricing + metrics with invariant culture.
- Wrote cost_summary.json in new layout + added “legacy” node.
- Updated REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (new layout) and mirrored legacy fields inside .cost.
- Injected/updated “Custo Computacional” block between BEGIN/END markers in REPORT.html.
- Recreated ZIP with the four required files; safe to re-run (idempotent).

Compat Fixes

- Metrics math: corrected divisions (/ 1e9, / 1000.0 / 3600.0) and energy (/ 1000.0).
- HTML: generated valid tags and replaced the marked block or inserted before </body>.

user
<section>
<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->
"@
}
$snippet=BuildSnippet
if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html=Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  if($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"){
    $html=[regex]::Replace($html,"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo
Computacional\s*-->",$snippet)
  }elseif($html -match "<body>"){
    $html=$html -replace "<body>",($snippet+"`n<body>")
  }else{ $html+="`n$snippet`n" }
}else{
  $html=@"
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="pt-BR"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Relatório TEIA<title><head><body>
$snippet
<body><html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# 7) ZIP
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if(Test-Path $zipPath){Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force}
$zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)


user
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Validate)
Contexto:
- Projeto: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar $OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em $OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv, "{0:$fmt}", $n) }

# --- 1) Parse pricing (tolerante a Markdown; vírgula ou ponto) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath

$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m = [regex]::Match($content, "(im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(:[\,\.][0-9]+))\b")
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."), $inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, "(im)\b$kEsc\b.*([0-9]+(:[\,\.][0-9]+))")
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."), $inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somar métricas (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }

$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){
  throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found: $($cols -join ', ')"
}

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
# GB decimais (10^9) e horas
$totalGB    = $sumBytes  1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs     1000.0  3600.0

# --- 3) Assunções & Custos ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{
  avg_mem_GB  = 0.5
  cpu_cores   = 1.0
  cpu_util    = 0.40
  power_watts = 65
}
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]     * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]  * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts  1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) Objetos (novo layout + nó legacy) ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_KWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
  elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
  totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
  totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
  ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
  energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
  energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
  total      = [double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status                  = "complete"
  total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
  memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
  energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
  total_cost              = $costObj.total
}
$costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
  status        = "complete"
  timestamp_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing       = $pricingObj
  metrics       = $metricsObj
  assumptions   = $assumptions
  cost          = $costObj
  legacy        = $legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo + espelho legacy em .cost) ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status      = "complete"
  pricing     = $pricingObj
  metrics     = $metricsObj
  assumptions = $assumptions
  cost        = $costObj
}
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName status                  -NotePropertyValue "complete" -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_mb                -NotePropertyValue ([int]
([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))) -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_price_per_GB -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
-Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName storage_io_cost         -NotePropertyValue $costObj.storage_io -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_price_per_hour      -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
-Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName mem_price_per_GB_hour   -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
-Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_price_per_kWh    -NotePropertyValue $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_KWh
-Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName cpu_cost                -NotePropertyValue $costObj.cpu -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName memory_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.ram -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy_cost             -NotePropertyValue $costObj.energy -Force
$dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_cost              -NotePropertyValue $costObj.total -Force
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) REPORT.html (inseriratualizar entre BEGINEND; corrigir marcações comuns) ---
function BuildSnippet {
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Custo Computacional<h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $(" + (InvStr $CPU_cost) + ")<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $(" + (InvStr $RAM_cost) + ")<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $(" + (InvStr $Energy_cost) + ") (kWh: " + (InvStr $Energy_kWh) + ")<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage IO: $(" + (InvStr $Storage_cost) + ")<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $(" + (InvStr $Total_cost) + ")<strong><li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p>Tempo total: " + (InvStr $totalHours,"0.########") + " h; Dados processados: " + (InvStr
$totalGB) + " GB<p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$snippet = BuildSnippet



>_
  ✗ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference = '"'Stop';
    Set-StrictMode -Version Latest;

    # --- Setup & Paths ---
    "'$Root   = '"'D:\\Teia\\TEIA_NUCLEO\\offline\\nano\\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1';
    "'$OutDir = Join-Path $Root '"'codex_audit_output';
    if("'!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

    $pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'infra_pricing_request.md';
    "'$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'metrics_summary.csv';
    "'$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json';
    "'$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json';
    "'$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT.html';
    "'$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir '"'teia_results_v3.zip';
    "'$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false);
    $inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture;

    function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt='"'0.######'){ [string]::Format("'$inv,'"'{0:'+"'$fmt+'"'}',"'$n) }

    # --- 1) Parse pricing (tolerant; comma or dot) ---
    if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
    $content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath;
    $keys = @('"'CPU_price_per_hour','RAM_price_per_GB_hour','Energy_price_per_kWh','Storage_IO_price_per_GB');
    "'$pricing = @{};
    foreach($k in $keys){
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $m = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)''^'"\\s*"'$kEsc'"\\s*[:=]\\s*([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?)\\b\");
      if("'$m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace '"',','.'), "'$inv) }
    }
    foreach($k in $keys){
      if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k);
      $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, "(?im)'"\\b"'$kEsc'"\\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?)\");
      if("'$m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace '"',','.'), "'$inv) }
    }
    $missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) });
    if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join '"', ') in "'$pricingPath" }

    # --- 2) Sum metrics ---
    if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
    $csv  = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath;
    if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
    $cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name;
    $sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^size_bytes$'"' });
    "'$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^elapsed_ms$'"' });
    if(-not "'$sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join '"', ')\" }
    [double]"'$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0;
    foreach($row in $csv){
      [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0;
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$b);
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$e);
      $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e;
    }
    $totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9;            # decimal GB (10''^9)
    $totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0; # hours

    # --- 3) Assumptions & Costs ---
    $assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB = 0.5; cpu_cores = 1.0; cpu_util = 0.40; power_watts = 65 };
    $CPU_cost      = $pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']     * "'$assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util *
$totalHours;
    $RAM_cost      = $pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']  * "'$assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours;
    $Energy_kWh    = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0)  * $assumptions.cpu_util   * $totalHours;
    $Energy_cost   = $Energy_kWh * $pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh'];
    "'$Storage_cost  = $pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']* "'$totalGB;
    $Total_cost    = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost;

    # --- 4) cost_summary.json (new + legacy) ---
    $pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']
      RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']
      Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
      Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]"'$pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']
    };
    "'$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
      elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
      totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
      totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
    };
    $costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
      ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
      energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
      storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
      energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
      total      = [double]$Total_cost
    };
    $legacy = [ordered]@{
      status                  = '"'complete'
      total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round("'$metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
      storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
      storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
      cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
      mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
      energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
      cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
      memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
      energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
      total_cost              = $costObj.total
    };
    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
      status        = '"'complete'
      timestamp_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
      pricing       = "'$pricingObj
      metrics       = $metricsObj
      assumptions   = $assumptions
      cost          = $costObj
      legacy        = $legacy
    };
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (new + mirror legacy in .cost) ---
    $dash = [pscustomobject]@{
      status      = '"'complete'
      pricing     = "'$pricingObj
      metrics     = $metricsObj
      assumptions = $assumptions
      cost        = $costObj
    };
    $legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue
$_.Value -Force };
    $dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 6) REPORT.html (inject/update marked block) ---
    function BuildSnippet {
      $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder;
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('"'<"'!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->'"');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'<section id=\"custo-computacional\">');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <ul>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$("+(InvStr $CPU_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$("+(InvStr $RAM_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$("+(InvStr $Energy_cost)+'"') (kWh: '+(InvStr "'$Energy_kWh)+'"')</
li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$("+(InvStr $Storage_cost)+'"')</li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$("+(InvStr $Total_cost)+'"')</strong></li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  </ul>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <p>Tempo total: '+(InvStr "'$totalHours,'"'0.########')+' h; Dados processados:
'+(InvStr "'$totalGB)+'"' GB</p>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'</section>');
      [void]"'$sb.Append('"'<"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->'"');
      return "'$sb.ToString();
    }
    $snippet = BuildSnippet;

    if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
      if ($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet });
      } elseif ($html -match '"'</body>') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>");
      } else {
        $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n";
      }
    } else {
      $html = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
      $snippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@;
    }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 7) ZIP ---
    Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem;
    if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create);
    $filesToZip = @($pricingPath, $costPath, $dashPath, $htmlPath);
    foreach ($f in $filesToZip) { if (Test-Path $f) { [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,
$f, [IO.Path]::GetFileName($f), [IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null } }
    $zip.Dispose();

    # --- 8) Validation summary ---
    $cost = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json;
    $dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json;
    $htmlText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
    $validation = [pscustomobject]@{
      cost_has_legacy = [bool]($cost.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains '"'legacy')
      dash_cost_has_legacy_fields =
@('status','total_mb','storage_io_price_per_GB','cpu_price_per_hour','mem_price_per_GB_hour','energy_price_per_kWh','cpu_cost','memory_cost','energy_cost','total_cost')

RAM_price_per_GB_hour=[double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour'];
Energy_price_per_kWh=[double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh'];

storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_KWh; total=[double]$Total_cost };
    $legacy = [ordered]@{ status='"'complete'; total_mb=[int]([math]::Round("'$metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0));
storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB; storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io;
cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour; mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour;
energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh; cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram;
energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total };
    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{ status='"'complete'; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o');
pricing="'$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy };
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (new + legacy mirrors in .cost) ---
    $dash = [pscustomobject]@{ status='"'complete'; pricing="'$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj;
assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj };
    $legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue
$_.Value -Force };
    $dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8;

    function BuildSnippet {

      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$("+(InvStr $Energy_cost)+'"') (kWh: '+(InvStr "'$Energy_kWh)+'"')</
li>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$("+(InvStr $Storage_cost)+'"')</li>');

      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  </ul>');

'+(InvStr "'$totalGB)+'"' GB</p>');
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'</section>');
      [void]"'$sb.Append('"'<"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->'"');
      return "'$sb.ToString();
    }

    if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
      if ($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet });
      } elseif ($html -match '"'</body>') {
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>");
      } else {
        $html += "`n" + $snippet + "`n";
      }
    } else {
      $html = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
      $snippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@;
    }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8;

    # --- 7) ZIP ---
    Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem;
    if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create);
    $filesToZip = @($pricingPath, $costPath, $dashPath, $htmlPath);
    foreach ($f in $filesToZip) { if (Test-Path $f) { [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,
$f, [IO.Path]::GetFileName($f), [IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null } }
    $zip.Dispose();

    # --- 8) Validation summary ---
    $cost = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json;
    $dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json;
    $htmlText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath;
    $validation = [pscustomobject]@{
      cost_has_legacy = [bool]($cost.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains '"'legacy')
      dash_cost_has_legacy_fields =
@('status','total_mb','storage_io_price_per_GB','cpu_price_per_hour','mem_price_per_GB_hour','energy_price_per_kWh','cpu_cost','memory_cost','energy_cost','total_cost')
| ForEach-Object { "'$_ + '"':' + [bool]("'$dash.cost.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $_) }
      html_has_markers = [bool]($htmlText -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*<"'!--'"\
\s*END:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->')
    };

    \"UPDATED:\";
    "'$costPath;
    $dashPath;
    $htmlPath;
    $zipPath;
    '"'VALIDATION:';
    "'$validation | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5;
    '"'status=complete';"

user
<title>Relatório TEIA<title>

$snippet

Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# --- 7) ZIP (recriar) ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if(Test-Path $zipPath){ Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal)|Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) Validação + Resumo ---
$cs   = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath

if($cs.status -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dash.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($html -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block BEGINEND not found"
}

$legacy = $cs.legacy
$checks = @{
  total_mb = ($legacy.total_mb -eq [int]([math]::Round($cs.metrics.totalGB*1024,0)))
  cpu_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.cpu_cost    - $cs.cost.cpu)        -lt 1e-9)
  ram_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.memory_cost - $cs.cost.ram)        -lt 1e-9)
  en_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.energy_cost - $cs.cost.energy)     -lt 1e-9)
  io_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.storage_io_cost - $cs.cost.storage_io) -lt 1e-9)
  total    = ([math]::Abs($legacy.total_cost  - $cs.cost.total)      -lt 1e-9)


>_
  ✗ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference = '"'Stop'
    Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

    # --- Setup & Paths ---
    "'$Root   = '"'D:\\Teia\\TEIA_NUCLEO\\offline\\nano\\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1'
    "'$OutDir = Join-Path $Root '"'codex_audit_output'
    if("'!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

    $pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'infra_pricing_request.md'
    "'$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'metrics_summary.csv'
    "'$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json'
    "'$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json'
    "'$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT.html'
    "'$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir '"'teia_results_v3.zip'
    "'$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

    function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = '"'0.######'){ [string]::Format("'$inv, '"'{0:'+ "'$fmt +'"'}', "'$n) }

    # --- 1) Parse pricing ---
    if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
    $content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
    $keys = @('"'CPU_price_per_hour','RAM_price_per_GB_hour','Energy_price_per_kWh','Storage_IO_price_per_GB')
    "'$pricing = @{}
    foreach($k in $keys){
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
      $m = [regex]::Match($content, '"'(?im)"'^'"\\s*'+"'$kEsc+'"'\\s*[:=]\\s*([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?)\\b')
      if("'$m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace '"',','.'), "'$inv) }
    }
    foreach($k in $keys){
      if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
      $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
      $m2 = [regex]::Match($content, '"'(?im)\\b'+"'$kEsc+'"'\\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?)')
      if("'$m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace '"',','.'), "'$inv) }
    }
    $missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
    if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join '"', ') in "'$pricingPath" }

    # --- 2) Sum metrics ---
    if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
    $csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
    if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
    $cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
    $sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^size_bytes$'"' })
    "'$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '"'"'^elapsed_ms$'"' })
    if(-not "'$sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join '"', ')\" }
    [double]"'$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
    foreach($row in $csv){
      [double]$b = 0; [double]$e = 0
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$b)
      [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace '"',','.'), [ref]"'$e)
      $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
    }
    $totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
    $totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0

    # --- 3) Costs ---
    $assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
    $CPU_cost      = $pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']     * "'$assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util *
$totalHours
    $RAM_cost      = $pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']  * "'$assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
    $Energy_kWh    = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0)  * $assumptions.cpu_util   * $totalHours
    $Energy_cost   = $Energy_kWh * $pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
    "'$Storage_cost  = $pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']* "'$totalGB
    $Total_cost    = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

    # --- 4) JSON objects ---
    $pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing['"'CPU_price_per_hour']
      RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]"'$pricing['"'RAM_price_per_GB_hour']
      Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]"'$pricing['"'Energy_price_per_kWh']
      Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]"'$pricing['"'Storage_IO_price_per_GB']
    }
    "'$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      size_bytes_sum = [double]$sumBytes
      elapsed_ms_sum = [double]$sumMs
      totalGB        = [double]$totalGB
      totalHours     = [double]$totalHours
    }
    $costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
      cpu        = [double]$CPU_cost
      ram        = [double]$RAM_cost
      energy     = [double]$Energy_cost
      storage_io = [double]$Storage_cost
      energy_kwh = [double]$Energy_kWh
      total      = [double]$Total_cost
    }
    $legacy = [ordered]@{
      status                  = '"'complete'
      total_mb                = [int]([math]::Round("'$metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
      storage_io_price_per_GB = $pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
      storage_io_cost         = $costObj.storage_io
      cpu_price_per_hour      = $pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
      mem_price_per_GB_hour   = $pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
      energy_price_per_kWh    = $pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
      cpu_cost                = $costObj.cpu
      memory_cost             = $costObj.ram
      energy_cost             = $costObj.energy
      total_cost              = $costObj.total
    }
    $costSummary = [pscustomobject]@{
      status        = '"'complete'
      timestamp_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o')
      pricing       = "'$pricingObj
      metrics       = $metricsObj
      assumptions   = $assumptions
      cost          = $costObj
      legacy        = $legacy
    }
    $costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

    # --- 5) Dashboard ---
    $dash = [pscustomobject]@{ status='"'complete'; pricing="'$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj;
assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj }
    $legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object{ $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue
$_.Value -Force }
    $dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

    # --- 6) HTML inject/update ---
    function BuildSnippet {
      $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('"'<"'!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->'"')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'<section id=\"custo-computacional\">')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <ul>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$("+(InvStr $CPU_cost)+'"')</li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$("+(InvStr $RAM_cost)+'"')</li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$("+(InvStr $Energy_cost)+'"') (kWh: '+(InvStr "'$Energy_kWh)+'"')</
li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$("+(InvStr $Storage_cost)+'"')</li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$("+(InvStr $Total_cost)+'"')</strong></li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  </ul>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <p>Tempo total: '+(InvStr "'$totalHours '"'0.########')+' h; Dados processados:
'+(InvStr "'$totalGB)+'"' GB</p>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'</section>')
      [void]"'$sb.Append('"'<"'!-- END: Custo Computacional -->'"')
      return "'$sb.ToString()
    }
    $snippet = BuildSnippet
    if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
      if($html -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->'){
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*?<"'!--'"\\s*END:\
\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->',[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param("'$m) $snippet })
      } elseif($html -match '"'</body>'){
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$snippet + "`n</body>")
      } else { $html += "`n$snippet`n" }
    } else {
      $html = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
      $snippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@
    }
    Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

    # --- 7) ZIP recreate ---
    Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
    if(Test-Path $zipPath){ Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
    foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
      if(Test-Path $f){ [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,
[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null }
    }
    $zip.Dispose()

    # --- 8) Validate + Summary ---
    $cs   = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
    $dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
    $htmlText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
    if($cs.status -ne '"'complete'){ throw 'cost_summary.status "'!= complete'"' }
    if("'$dash.status -ne '"'complete'){ throw 'dashboard.status "'!= complete'"' }
    if(-not ("'$htmlText -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Custo Computacional\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Custo
Computacional\\s*-->')){ throw 'HTML block BEGINEND not found' }
    "'$legacy = $cs.legacy
    $checks = @{
      total_mb = ($legacy.total_mb -eq [int]([math]::Round($cs.metrics.totalGB*1024,0)))
      cpu_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.cpu_cost    - $cs.cost.cpu)        -lt 1e-9)
      ram_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.memory_cost - $cs.cost.ram)        -lt 1e-9)
      en_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.energy_cost - $cs.cost.energy)     -lt 1e-9)
      io_cost  = ([math]::Abs($legacy.storage_io_cost - $cs.cost.storage_io) -lt 1e-9)
      total    = ([math]::Abs($legacy.total_cost  - $cs.cost.total)      -lt 1e-9)

  ✓ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference='"'Stop';
    "'$Root='"'D:\\Teia\\TEIA_NUCLEO\\offline\\nano\\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1';
    "'$OutDir=Join-Path $Root '"'codex_audit_output';
    "'$costPath=Join-Path $OutDir '"'cost_summary.json';
    "'$dashPath=Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json';

    "'$zipPath=Join-Path $OutDir '"'teia_results_v3.zip';
    "'$inv=[Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture;
    function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt='"'0.######'){ [string]::Format("'$inv,'"'{0:'+"'$fmt+'"'}',"'$n) }

Computacional\\s*-->')){ throw 'HTML block BEGINEND not found' }
    "'$legacy=$cs.legacy;
    $checks=@{
      total_mb = ($legacy.total_mb -eq [int]([math]::Round($cs.metrics.totalGB*1024,0)))
      cpu_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.cpu_cost    - $cs.cost.cpu)        -lt 1e-9)
      ram_cost = ([math]::Abs($legacy.memory_cost - $cs.cost.ram)        -lt 1e-9)

    $summary=[pscustomobject]@{

      total_hours = (InvStr $cs.metrics.totalHours '"'0.########')
      cpu_cost    = (InvStr "'$cs.cost.cpu)
      ram_cost    = (InvStr $cs.cost.ram)
      energy_cost = (InvStr $cs.cost.energy)
      storage_io  = (InvStr $cs.cost.storage_io)
      total_cost  = (InvStr $cs.cost.total)
    }
    "'"\\n=== TEIA Recálculo + Validação ===\";
    \"cost_summary.json : "'$costPath";
    "REPORT_DASHBOARD  : $dashPath";
    "REPORT.html       : $htmlPath";
    "ZIP               : $zipPath";
    $summary | Format-List;
    "OK: validação passou e artefatos atualizados.";
    "status=complete";'

Validation

- cost_summary.status: complete
- REPORT_DASHBOARD.status: complete

Summary

▌

---

### ASSISTENTE

Show! ✅ O `codex` executou tudo certinho e a validação passou — `status=complete`, blocos BEGIN/END encontrados e paridade new/legacy ok.  
Pelos números, o `total_hours` ficou minúsculo (≈2.78e-6 h), então CPU/RAM/Energia saíram ≈0 e só o `storage_io` entrou no total (compatível com o sumário que você colou).

Aqui vão **ajustes finos** (opcionais) pra blindar o fluxo:

1) Padronize as chaves (evita `null` acidental)  
Use sempre `Energy_price_per_kWh` (k minúsculo) em todos os pontos:
- parsing (regex),
- `$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]`,
- `$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh`,
- espelho legacy e dashboard.

2) HTML sempre válido (fallback)  
Você já injeta entre marcadores; mantenha também a normalização rápida quando o HTML de entrada vier quebrado:
- Fechar `<title>` corretamente,
- Garantir `</head>`, `<body>` e `</body></html>`.

3) Tolerância de decimais na leitura de CSV  
Você já aplica `-replace "," "."`. Se quiser, acrescente `NumberStyles` para ignorar espaços/brancos:
```powershell
[void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol -replace ",","."), [Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float, $inv, [ref]$b)
```

4) Checagens extras (sanidade dos números)  
Rodar após o processo, só pra sinalizar outliers:
```powershell
$cs = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$warns = @()
if($cs.metrics.totalGB -lt 0){ $warns += "totalGB < 0" }
if($cs.metrics.totalHours -lt 0){ $warns += "totalHours < 0" }
if($cs.cost.total -lt 0){ $warns += "total_cost < 0" }
if([math]::Abs(($cs.cost.cpu+$cs.cost.ram+$cs.cost.energy+$cs.cost.storage_io)-$cs.cost.total) -gt 1e-9){
  $warns += "cpu+ram+energy+io != total"
}
"Sanity: " + ($(if($warns){ $warns -join "; " } else { "OK" }))
```

5) Idempotência do ZIP  
Está ok: recria sempre e inclui só os 4 artefatos. Se quiser, adicione um `Write-Host` com os tamanhos dos arquivos pra auditoria rápida.

Se quiser, te mando uma versão final “polida” do script com esses pontos aplicados (mantendo o mesmo comportamento).

---

### USUÁRIO

o dashboard com todas as métricas terei acesso aonde? quero saber qual é a capacidade real atual do sistema com todos essas métricas que se enquedram na auditoria de um sistema como o nosso? "# O que auditar — visão geral (meticulosa e estratégica)

Para uma **auditoria de um sistema operacional** que realiza **compressão / descompressão** e **stream on-demand** de memória computacional, você deve coletar três classes de dados: **performance funcional**, **custo computacional (recursos → custo financeiro/energia)** e **observabilidade / confiabilidade**. Abaixo segue um checklist prático, métricas, como medi-las e fórmulas para converter uso em custo.

---

# 1) Métricas essenciais de performance (o “what”)

**A. Latência**

* Latência média / mediana (p50), p90, p95, p99, p999 para:

  * tempo de compressão por bloco (ms)
  * tempo de descompressão por bloco (ms)
  * tempo de atendimento de uma requisição stream on-demand (ms)
* Latências de cold vs warm (primeira leitura vs subsequentes)

**B. Throughput**

* MB/s ou GB/s processados por núcleo e por processo (compressão e descompressão)
* Requisições por segundo (RPS) servidas em modo stream

**C. Eficiência de compressão**

* **Compression ratio**:

  * escolha e documente a definição:

    * `CR = compressed_size / original_size` (valor ≤1 — menor é melhor)
    * ou `Gain = original_size / compressed_size` (valor ≥1).
* Taxa de compressão (MB/s) e taxa de descompressão (MB/s)

**D. Uso de CPU**

* % CPU absoluto e por núcleo (usuário / sistema)
* CPU-seconds por GB comprimido / descomprimido (CPU-time / bytes)

**E. Memória**

* Working set / Resident Set Size (RSS) por processo
* Pico de memória por operação / por sessão
* Pressão de memória: page faults/sec, major page faults, swap usage

**F. I/O e armazenamento**

* Disk throughput (MB/s), IOPS, avg latency (ms) (reads/writes)
* SSD vs NVMe vs HDD comportamento (se aplicável)
* Read amplification e write amplification (quando houver dedup/transformações)

**G. Caches e comportamento de CPU microarquitetural**

* Cache misses L1/L2/L3, TLB misses, branch mispredictions (se fizer profiling profundo)
* Contention: locks, mutex wait time, syscall rate, context switches/sec

**H. Rede (se for streaming pela rede)**

* Bandwidth (MB/s), packet loss, retransmits, RTT, p95/p99 de latência de rede
* Cost/GB de saída (para cloud) — ver seção custo

**I. Energia / potência**

* Watts médios durante compressão/descompressão
* Joules por GB processado (energia específica)

**J. Qualidade e integridade**

* Taxa de erros de decompressão, checksum failures
* Overhead de verificações (hashing, assinaturas) em ms/MB

---

# 2) Métricas de custo computacional (o “how to translate into \$/€”)

**Componentes de custo**

1. CPU: tempo de CPU \* custo por CPU-segundo.
2. Memória: GB-hora \* custo por GB-hora.
3. Armazenamento: GB armazenado \* preço por GB-mês + I/O (ops/GB) \* custo I/O.
4. Rede (egresso): GB transmitido \* preço por GB.
5. Energia: energia (kWh) \* tarifa elétrica.

**Fórmulas úteis (genéricas)**

* `CPU_cost = CPU_seconds * CPU_price_per_second`
* `Memory_cost = (Avg_GB_memory_allocated) * (time_hours) * (price_per_GB_hour)`
* `Storage_cost_month = avg_GB_stored * price_per_GB_month`
* `Network_cost = GB_out * price_per_GB`
* `Energy_cost = (Avg_Watts / 1000) * time_hours * price_per_kWh`

**Custo por operação / por GB**

* `Cost_per_GB = (CPU_cost_per_GB) + (IO_cost_per_GB) + (Network_cost_per_GB if streaming) + (Energy_cost_per_GB)`
* `CPU_cost_per_GB = (CPU_seconds_per_GB) * CPU_price_per_second`

  * CPU\_price\_per\_second você obtém da máquina/instância (ex.: vCPU hourly price / 3600)

> Observação: **não depende só do algoritmo** — depende de configuração (nº de threads, afinação, compressão level) e do perfil do dado (duplicação, entropia).

---

# 3) Metodologia de medição (o “how”)

1. **Defina workloads representativos**

   * traces reais (se possível) + synthetic (varrer tamanhos: 4KB, 64KB, 1MB, 16MB)
   * misturar compressible vs incompressible

2. **Warm-up e repetição**

   * aqueça caches / JIT. Repetir N vezes e reportar estatísticas agregadas
   * reportar mean, median, stdev, p90/p99

3. **Isolar overhead de instrumentação**

   * meça impacto das ferramentas (sampling interval razoável, ex.: 1s ou 5s)
   * orquestrar testes sem outras cargas

4. **Capturar percentis extremos**

   * p95/p99/p999 são críticos para latência em produção

5. **Ambiente**

   * documentar CPU model, frequency scaling, hyperthreading, NUMA layout, kernel tuning, filesystem, mount options, compression libs e versões, flags do compressor

6. **Reproduzibilidade**

   * fixar seeds, registrar hashes finais, salvar configurações de kernel e versions

---

# 4) Observabilidade e telemetria (o “instrumentation”)

* Exportar métricas para Prometheus / OpenTelemetry:

  * counters: bytes\_in, bytes\_out, ops\_completed, ops\_failed
  * histograms: compress\_time\_ms, decompress\_time\_ms, stream\_latency\_ms
* Tracing distribuído para paths de stream on-demand (ex.: spans: lookup → fetch → decompress → deliver)
* Logs estruturados com IDs de request, tamanho original/comprimido, latências, node\_id
* Health checks e SLAs (p95< X ms, uptime > 99.9%)

---

# 5) Indicadores de risco e confiabilidade

* Taxa de erros / falhas de descompressão
* Inconsistências de hashes entre original ↔ restituído
* RTO / Recovery time em caso de falha
* Degradação graciosa quando memória/IO saturados

---

# 6) Exemplo prático: script PowerShell para coleta básica de counters + medição de compressão

Abaixo um **snippet PowerShell** pronto para copy→paste — mede counters de sistema e roda um comando de compressão de exemplo (substituir `<compressor>` e caminhos). Está no padrão solicitado: bloco PowerShell puro. Instruções finais em 4 linhas.

```powershell
# textdoc embed Codex
# Coleta perf counters e mede tempo/bytes de compressão simples.
param(
  [string]$InputFile = "C:\path\to\input.bin",
  [string]$CompressedFile = "C:\path\to\out.comp",
  [int]$IntervalSec = 2,
  [int]$Samples = 120,
  [string]$CompressorCmd = "C:\tools\mycompressor.exe"  # Ex.: 7z.exe a -si -so (ajuste conforme)
)

# Counters to collect
$counters = @(
  "\Processor(_Total)\% Processor Time",
  "\System\Context Switches/sec",
  "\Memory\Available MBytes",
  "\Memory\Pages/sec",
  "\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\Disk Bytes/sec",
  "\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\Avg. Disk sec/Transfer",
  "\Network Interface(*)\Bytes Total/sec"
)

# Start background collection
$csvPath = Join-Path $env:TEMP ("perf_counters_{0:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.csv" -f (Get-Date))
Write-Output "Starting perf collection -> $csvPath"
Get-Counter -Counter $counters -SampleInterval $IntervalSec -MaxSamples $Samples | 
  Select-Object -ExpandProperty CounterSamples |
  Select-Object Timestamp, Path, CookedValue |
  Export-Csv -Path $csvPath -NoTypeInformation

# Measure compression (wall time + process CPU time + sizes)
Write-Output "Measuring compression: $InputFile -> $CompressedFile"
$origSize = (Get-Item $InputFile).Length
$stopwatch = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew()
# Run compressor (síncrono) - adapte o comando abaixo ao compressor disponível
& $CompressorCmd $InputFile $CompressedFile
$stopwatch.Stop()
$elapsedSec = $stopwatch.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
$compSize = (Get-Item $CompressedFile).Length
$compressionRatio = [math]::Round($compSize / $origSize, 6)
$mbPerSec = [math]::Round(($origSize / 1MB) / $elapsedSec, 3)

# Output summary
$summary = [PSCustomObject]@{
  Timestamp = (Get-Date).ToString("o")
  InputFile = $InputFile
  OrigBytes = $origSize
  CompressedBytes = $compSize
  CompressionRatio = $compressionRatio
  ElapsedSec = [math]::Round($elapsedSec,3)
  MB_per_sec = $mbPerSec
  PerfCsv = $csvPath
}
$summary | Format-List

# Save summary
$summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 | Out-File -FilePath (Join-Path $env:TEMP "compress_summary_{0:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.json" -f (Get-Date)) -Encoding UTF8
```

Instruções finais (4 linhas):

1. Substitua `$CompressorCmd` pelo caminho/flags do seu compressor (ex.: 7z, zstd, lz4).
2. Execute em ambiente de teste isolado (sem outras cargas).
3. Ajuste `$IntervalSec` e `$Samples` conforme duração do teste.
4. Analise o CSV gerado com Prometheus/Excel ou script de pós-processamento para percentis.

---

# 7) Relatórios e entregáveis recomendados para a auditoria

* Planilha com resultados por workload: compress\_ratio, MB/s, CPU-s/GB, memory\_peak, disk\_iops, p95/p99 latência.
* Gráficos: throughput vs cores, latency percentiles por load, CPU\_time\_per\_GB, energy\_per\_GB.
* Análise de tradeoffs: níveis de compressão vs CPU e latência vs ganho de armazenamento.
* Recomendações: parâmetros ideais (threads, level), limites operacionais, SLOs e budget estimado.

---

# 8) Prioridades práticas imediatas (próximo passo)

1. Escolher 3 workloads representativos (small/medium/large).
2. Rodar script acima (ou adaptar a sua infra) para coletar baseline.
3. Calcular `CPU_seconds_per_GB` e `MB_per_sec` para cada algoritmo/level, e transformar em `Cost_per_GB` usando preços de sua infra (forneço fórmula se quiser).

---

Se quiser, eu já adapto o script para:

* coletar counters via eBPF (Linux) ou perf (Linux), ou
* calcular automaticamente `CPU_seconds_per_GB` e `Cost_per_GB` a partir de um preço por vCPU/hora que você informar.

Deseja que eu gere a versão Linux (perf/eBPF) ou uma versão que já escreva o CSV com os cálculos `CPU_seconds_per_GB` e `Cost_per_GB` (você fornece o preço por vCPU/hora)? "

O HTML pode renderizar um recorte (como já faz com custo).

---

## Como extrair a **capacidade real atual** com o que já temos (e o que falta)

Hoje o pipeline calculou custo e somatórios básicos de bytes/tempo. Para “capacidade real”, precisamos preencher **3 grupos** no `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`:

1) **Performance**  
   - `latency_ms`: p50/p95/p99 por operação (compress/decompress/stream).  
   - `throughput`: MB/s por núcleo e agregado.  
   - `cpu_seconds_per_GB`, `decompress_MBps`.

2) **Recursos/energia**  
   - `cpu_util_pct`, `avg_mem_GB`, `rss_peak_GB`.  
   - `energy`: watts médios e **J/GB**.

3) **Confiabilidade/erro**  
   - `error_rate`, `checksum_failures`, `timeouts_pXX`.

Com isso, calcule:

- **Throughput sustentado por nó**  
  `throughput_sustentado_MBps = min( throughput_comp, throughput_decomp, disk_MBps, rede_MBps )`  
- **Streams simultâneas no SLO**  
  `streams_max = cores * util_alvo * (1 / service_time_p95)`  
- **Capacidade por GB/h**  
  `GB_por_hora = throughput_sustentado_MBps * 3600 / 1024`

> No cálculo, **o gargalo é o mínimo** entre CPU, disco, rede e descompressão. Hoje, pelos artefatos, o tempo total amostrado foi muito pequeno (≈2.78e-6 h), então não dá pra inferir p95/p99 nem throughput sustentado — precisamos rodar a coleta de performance (seu checklist) e alimentar o JSON.

---

## Esqueleto pro `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` “completo”
(Pronto pra você colar como alvo de escrita nas próximas execuções; mantém os blocos já existentes.)

```json
{
  "status": "complete",
  "pricing": { ... },
  "metrics": {
    "size_bytes_sum": 0,
    "elapsed_ms_sum": 0,
    "totalGB": 0,
    "totalHours": 0
  },
  "assumptions": { "avg_mem_GB": 0.5, "cpu_cores": 1, "cpu_util": 0.4, "power_watts": 65 },
  "cost": { "cpu": 0, "ram": 0, "energy": 0, "storage_io": 0, "energy_kwh": 0, "total": 0,
    "status":"complete","total_mb":0,"storage_io_price_per_GB":0,"cpu_price_per_hour":0,
    "mem_price_per_GB_hour":0,"energy_price_per_kWh":0,"cpu_cost":0,"memory_cost":0,"energy_cost":0,"total_cost":0
  },
  "performance": {
    "latency_ms": {
      "compress": {"p50":0,"p90":0,"p95":0,"p99":0},
      "decompress":{"p50":0,"p90":0,"p95":0,"p99":0},
      "stream":    {"p50":0,"p90":0,"p95":0,"p99":0}
    },
    "throughput": {
      "compress_MBps": 0,
      "decompress_MBps": 0,
      "per_core_MBps": 0
    },
    "cpu_seconds_per_GB": 0
  },
  "resources": {
    "cpu_util_pct_avg": 0,
    "rss_peak_GB": 0,
    "io": {"disk_MBps":0,"iops":0,"avg_latency_ms":0},
    "network": {"egress_MBps":0,"rtt_ms_p95":0}
  },
  "energy": { "avg_watts": 0, "joules_per_GB": 0 },
  "reliability": { "error_rate": 0, "checksum_failures": 0 },
  "capacity": {
    "throughput_sustained_MBps": 0,
    "streams_max_p95": 0,
    "GB_per_hour": 0,
    "bottleneck": "cpu|disk|network|algo"
  }
}
```

> Esse bloco “capacity” é derivado automaticamente a partir de `performance`, `resources` e `energy`. O script que você já usa pode escrever/atualizar essas chaves sem quebrar compatibilidade.

4) **(Opcional) Renderizar no HTML**: além do “Custo Computacional”, incluir um bloco **“Capacidade Atual”** com:

- calcula p50/p95/p99, MB/s, `cpu_seconds_per_GB`,
- **preenche** as novas seções no `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`,
- e **injeta** um bloco “Capacidade Atual” no `REPORT.html`.
