### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — vou **delegar ao agente `codex`** um job único que:
1) agrega métricas (se existirem CSV/JSON de perf),
2) atualiza `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` com **performance/resources/energy/capacity**,
3) injeta um bloco **“Capacidade Atual”** no `REPORT.html`,
4) valida tudo, mantendo compat + idempotência.

Apenas cole o **Master Prompt** abaixo no seu `codex cli`.

---

# TEIA Codex Master Prompt — Aggregator (Performance→Dashboard + HTML “Capacidade Atual”)

Contexto:
- Projeto: `D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1`
- Saída: `.\codex_audit_output` (usar `$OutDir`)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir`
- Idempotente; cultura invariante; caminhos absolutos
- **Inputs opcionais** (se existirem):
  - Perf counters CSV: `$OutDir\perf_counters_*.csv` (campos: `Timestamp,Path,CookedValue` do Get-Counter)
  - Resumos de compressão: `$OutDir\compress_summary_*.json` (ou no TEMP, cairá como opcional)
- **Artefatos obrigatórios** já existentes: `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`, `REPORT.html`
- **Saídas**: (atualizações in-place) `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`, `REPORT.html`, e **validação** em stdout

Aprovações: `approvals write_files, run_powershell`

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Paths / setup ---
$Root   = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$dashPath = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$inv      = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

if(!(Test-Path $dashPath)){ throw "Missing $dashPath" }

# --- Helpers ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $rank = ($p/100.0)*([double]($a.Count-1))
  $lo=[math]::Floor($rank); $hi=[math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return $a[$lo] }
  $w=$rank-$lo
  return $a[$lo]*(1-$w) + $a[$hi]*$w
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } }

# --- Load dashboard (keeps compat fields) ---
$dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json

# Ensure sections exist
if(-not $dash.performance){ $dash | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.resources){   $dash | Add-Member resources   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.energy){      $dash | Add-Member energy      ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.capacity){    $dash | Add-Member capacity    ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }

# --- Inputs (optional) ---
$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# --- Aggregate perf counters if available ---
$diskMBps_p95 = $null
$netMBps_p95  = $null

if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f }
  # Disk Bytes/sec
  $disk = ($rows | Where-Object { $_.Path -like "*\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\Disk Bytes/sec" } | ForEach-Object { [double]($_.CookedValue) })
  if($disk){
    $diskMBps = $disk | ForEach-Object { $_ / 1MB }
    $diskMBps_p95 = [math]::Round((Percentile $diskMBps 95),3)
  }
  # Network Bytes Total/sec (somar se múltiplas interfaces por timestamp não está trivial aqui; usar p95 por amostra total)
  $net = ($rows | Where-Object { $_.Path -like "*\Network Interface(*)\Bytes Total/sec" } | ForEach-Object { [double]($_.CookedValue) })
  if($net){
    $netMBps  = $net | ForEach-Object { $_ / 1MB }
    $netMBps_p95 = [math]::Round((Percentile $netMBps 95),3)
  }
}

# --- Aggregate compression summaries if available ---
# Esperado: campos OrigBytes, CompressedBytes, ElapsedSec, MB_per_sec
$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = [System.Collections.Generic.List[object]]::new()
  foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg.Add($j) } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps = $agg | ForEach-Object { [double]($_.MB_per_sec) } | Where-Object { $_ -gt 0 }
    $crs  = $agg | ForEach-Object { [double]($_.CompressionRatio) } | Where-Object { $_ -gt 0 }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{
      compress_MBps_p50 = if($mbps){ [math]::Round((Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
      compress_MBps_p95 = if($mbps){ [math]::Round((Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
      compression_ratio_p50 = if($crs){ [math]::Round((Percentile $crs 50),6) } else { $null }
    }
  }
}

# --- Fill performance/resources sections (non-destructive) ---
if(-not $dash.performance.latency_ms){
  $dash.performance | Add-Member latency_ms ([pscustomobject]@{
    compress   = @{ p50=$null;p90=$null;p95=$null;p99=$null }
    decompress = @{ p50=$null;p90=$null;p95=$null;p99=$null }
    stream     = @{ p50=$null;p90=$null;p95=$null;p99=$null }
  }) -Force
}
if(-not $dash.performance.throughput){
  $dash.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{
    compress_MBps   = $null
    decompress_MBps = $null
    per_core_MBps   = $null
  }) -Force
}
if(-not $dash.resources.io){      $dash.resources | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.resources.network){ $dash.resources | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }

# Write aggregates we have
if($compStats){
  $dash.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash.performance.compression_ratio){ $dash.performance | Add-Member compression_ratio $compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash.resources.io | Add-Member disk_MBps_p95 $diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash.resources.network | Add-Member total_MBps_p95 $netMBps_p95 -Force }

# --- Derive capacity ---
# Gargalo como mínimo entre: decompress_MBps (se existir), disk_MBps_p95, network_MBps_p95
$decomp = $dash.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]?.Value
$net    = $dash.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]?.Value

$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{name="algo"; value=[double]$decomp} }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{name="disk"; value=[double]$disk} }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{name="network"; value=[double]$net} }

$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){
  $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1
  $bottleneck = $min.name
  $throughput_sust = [math]::Round($min.value,3)
}

$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }

$dash.capacity | Add-Member throughput_sustained_MBps $throughput_sust -Force
$dash.capacity | Add-Member GB_per_hour $GB_per_hour -Force
$dash.capacity | Add-Member bottleneck ($bottleneck ?? "unknown") -Force
if(-not $dash.capacity.streams_max_p95){ $dash.capacity | Add-Member streams_max_p95 $null -Force } # placeholder

# --- Persist dashboard ---
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML injection: "Capacidade Atual" ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps){ "{0:N3}" -f $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps } else { "N/A" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour){ "{0:N3}" -f $d.capacity.GB_per_hour } else { "N/A" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "N/A" }
@"
<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->
<section id="capacidade-atual">
  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>
  <ul>
    <li>Throughput sustentado: $mbps MB/s</li>
    <li>Capacidade: $gbh GB/h</li>
    <li>Bottleneck: $bot</li>
  </ul>
</section>
<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->
"@
}

$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html -match $pattern){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html -match "</body>"){
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",($capSnippet + "`n</body>"))
  } else {
    $html += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
  $capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- Validation summary ---
$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$hasCap = ($dash2.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains "capacity") -and $dash2.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null
$hasMarkers = (Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath) -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"

"UPDATED:"
$dashPath
$htmlPath
"VALIDATION:"
@{
  dashboard_has_capacity = $hasCap
  html_has_capacidade_block = $hasMarkers
} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5
"status=complete"
'

---

## Como usar (resumo)
1) Rode seus testes de perf e gere **`perf_counters_*.csv`** e/ou **`compress_summary_*.json`** em `codex_audit_output`.  
2) Execute o Master Prompt acima no `codex cli`.  
3) Abra:
   - `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` → veja `performance/resources/energy/capacity`.
   - `REPORT.html` → seção **“Capacidade Atual”** renderizada.

Quer que eu inclua no job a leitura de **latências p50/p95/p99** específicas (compress/decompress/stream) a partir de um CSV seu (ex.: `op,latency_ms`)? Se você me disser o formato/nomes de colunas, já adiciono o parser e os cálculos ao prompt.

---

### USUÁRIO

>_
  ✓ ⌨️ pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference = '"'Stop'
    Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

    # --- Paths setup ---
    "'$Root = '"'D:\\Teia\\TEIA_NUCLEO\\offline\\nano\\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1'
    "'$OutDir = Join-Path $Root '"'codex_audit_output'
    if("'!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

    $dashPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT_DASHBOARD.json'
    "'$htmlPath = Join-Path $OutDir '"'REPORT.html'
    "'$inv = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

    if(!(Test-Path $dashPath)){ throw "Missing $dashPath" }

    # --- Helpers ---
    function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
      if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
      $a = $arr | Sort-Object
      $n = $a.Count
      if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
      $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
      $lo = [math]::Floor($rank)
      $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
      if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
      $w = $rank - $lo
      return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
    }
    function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json }
catch { $null } } }
    function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){ $s = [string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){ return $null }; $d=0.0;
if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace '"',','.'), [Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float, "'$inv, [ref]$d)){ return $d } else
{ return $null } }
    function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt='"'0.###'){ [string]::Format("'$inv,'"'{0:'+"'$fmt+'"'}',"'$n) }

    # --- Load dashboard ---
    $dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
    if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties['"'performance']){ "'$dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName performance
-NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
    if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties['"'resources'])  { "'$dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName resources
-NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
    if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties['"'energy'])     { "'$dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName energy
-NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
    if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties['"'capacity'])   { "'$dash | Add-Member -NotePropertyName capacity
-NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
    if(-not $dash.resources.PSObject.Properties['"'io'])      { "'$dash.resources  | Add-Member -NotePropertyName io
-NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
    if(-not $dash.resources.PSObject.Properties['"'network']) { "'$dash.resources  | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
network -NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
    if(-not $dash.performance.PSObject.Properties['"'throughput']){ "'$dash.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
throughput -NotePropertyValue ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null; per_core_MBps=$null })
-Force }
    if(-not $dash.performance.PSObject.Properties['"'latency_ms']){
      "'$dash.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName latency_ms -NotePropertyValue
([pscustomobject]@{ compress=@{p50=$null;p90=$null;p95=$null;p99=$null};
decompress=@{p50=$null;p90=$null;p95=$null;p99=$null}; stream=@{p50=$null;p90=$null;p95=$null;p99=$null} }) -Force }

    # --- Inputs (optional) ---
    $perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter '"'perf_counters_*.csv' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    "'$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter '"'compress_summary_*.json' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

    # --- Aggregate perf counters if available ---
    "'$diskMBps_p95 = $null
    $netMBps_p95  = $null
    if($perfCsvs){
      $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
      if($rows){
        # Disk Bytes/sec
        $diskVals = @()
        foreach($r in $rows){ if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match '"'\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec')){ "'$v =
ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) } } }
        if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d, 3) } }
        # Network Bytes Total/sec (sum across interfaces not handled; rough p95 of all samples)
        $netVals = @()
        foreach($r in $rows){ if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match '"'\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec')){ "'$v
= ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) } } }
        if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n, 3) } }
      }
    }

    # --- Aggregate compression summaries if available ---
    $compStats = $null
    if($compJson){
      $agg = @()
      foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
      if($agg.Count -gt 0){
        $mbps = @(); $ratios=@()
        foreach($j in $agg){
          $mb = $null
          if($j.PSObject.Properties['"'MB_per_sec']){ "'$mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
          if($mb -eq $null){
            $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
            if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
          }
          if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
          $orig2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $comp2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
          if($orig2 -ne $null -and $orig2 -gt 0 -and $comp2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$comp2/[double]$orig2) }
        }
        $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
        $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
        $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
        $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50 = $p50; compress_MBps_p95 = $p95; compression_ratio_p50
= $cr50 }
      }
    }

    # --- Fill performance/resources sections ---
    if($compStats){
      $dash.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
      if(-not $dash.performance.PSObject.Properties['"'compression_ratio']){ "'$dash.performance | Add-Member
-NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue $compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force }
    }
    if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash.resources.io | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
    if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95
-NotePropertyValue $netMBps_p95 -Force }

    # --- Derive capacity ---
    $decomp = $dash.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
    $disk   = $dash.resources.io.PSObject.Properties['"'disk_MBps_p95']
    "'$net    = $dash.resources.network.PSObject.Properties['"'total_MBps_p95']
    "'$set = @()
    if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name='"'algo';    value=[double]"'$decomp } }
    if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name='"'disk';    value=[double]"'$dash.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
    if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name='"'network'; value=[double]"'$dash.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
    $bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
    if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
    $GB_per_hour = $null
    if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
    $dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
    $dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
    $dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($bottleneck ??
'"'unknown') -Force
    if(-not "'$dash.capacity.PSObject.Properties['"'streams_max_p95']){ "'$dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

    # --- Persist dashboard ---
    $dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

    # --- HTML injection: "Capacidade Atual" ---
    function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
      $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps
'"'0.###' } else { 'NA' }
      "'$gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour '"'0.###' } else { 'NA' }
      "'$bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { '"'NA' }
      "'$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('"'<"'!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->'"')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'<section id=\"capacidade-atual\">')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  <ul>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'    <li>Throughput sustentado: '+"'$mbps+'"' MB/s</li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'    <li>Capacidade: '+"'$gbh+'"' GB/h</li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'    <li>Bottleneck: '+"'$bot+'"'</li>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'  </ul>')
      [void]"'$sb.AppendLine('"'</section>')
      [void]"'$sb.Append('"'<"'!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->'"')
      return "'$sb.ToString()
    }
    $capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash

    if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
      $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
      $pattern = '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Capacidade Atual\\s*-->[\\s\\S]*<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Capacidade Atual\\s*-->'
      if("'$html -match $pattern){
        $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m)
$capSnippet })
      } elseif($html -match '"'</body>'){
        "'$html = [regex]::Replace($html,'"'</body>',"'$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
      } else {
        $html += "`n$capSnippet`n"
      }
      Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8
    } else {
      $s = @"
    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="pt-BR">
    <head>
      <meta charset="utf-8" />
      <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    </head>
    <body>
    $capSnippet
    </body>
    </html>
    "@
      Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
    }

    # --- Validation summary ---
    $dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
    $hasCap = ($dash2.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains '"'capacity') -and ("'$dash2.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps
-ne $null)
    $hasMarkers = (Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath) -match '"'<"'!--'"\\s*BEGIN:\\s*Capacidade Atual\\s*-->[\\s\
\S]*<"'!--'"\\s*END:\\s*Capacidade Atual\\s*-->'

    \"UPDATED:\"; "'$dashPath; $htmlPath; '"'VALIDATION:';
    @{ dashboard_has_capacity = "'$hasCap; html_has_capacidade_block = $hasMarkers } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5;
    '"'status=complete'"

codex
Updated

- REPORT_DASHBOARD.json: D:
\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json
- REPORT.html: D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output\REPORT.html

What I Did

- Loaded dashboard; ensured .performance, .resources.{io,network}, .capacity exist.
- Optionally aggregated perf_counters_*.csv (p95 of Disk MB/s and Network MB/s) and compress_summary_*.json (p50/p95 MB/
s, compression ratio).
- Wrote aggregates into
dashboard: .performance.throughput.compress_MBps, .resources.io.disk_MBps_p95, .resources.network.total_MBps_p95.
- Derived capacity: .capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps = min of available {decompress_MBps, disk_MBps_p95,
total_MBps_p95}; .capacity.GB_per_hour, .capacity.bottleneck.
- Injected/updated “Capacidade Atual” HTML block between markers in REPORT.html.

Validation

- dashboard_has_capacity: False
- html_has_capacidade_block: True

Note: dashboard_has_capacity=False indicates no qualifying inputs were present to compute sustained throughput
(no decompress_MBps and no perf CSVs found). If you provide those inputs, I can recompute to populate capacity.
status=complete

### ASSISTENTE

Ótima pergunta — eis “onde ver” e “como chegar na capacidade real” 👇

## Onde acessar o dashboard
- **JSON**: `D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`  
  (contém as seções `performance`, `resources` e `capacity`)
- **HTML** (visual): `...\codex_audit_output\REPORT.html`  
  – a seção **“Capacidade Atual”** já foi injetada entre os marcadores.

## Por que “capacity” veio vazia
O agente `codex` rodou e **não encontrou insumos suficientes** para calcular o throughput sustentado:
- não havia `performance.throughput.decompress_MBps` no dashboard **nem**
- arquivos `perf_counters_*.csv` / `compress_summary_*.json` em `codex_audit_output`.

Sem esses dados, o cálculo (min{decompress_MBps, disk_MBps_p95, total_MBps_p95}) não fecha.

## Como preencher e obter a “capacidade real”
Você tem 3 caminhos (pode usar um ou combinar):

1) **Informar manualmente o throughput de descompressão**  
   Se você já sabe o valor (MB/s), injete no dashboard e re-rodar o job:
   ```powershell
   $OutDir="D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1\codex_audit_output"
   $p=Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
   $d=Get-Content -Raw $p | ConvertFrom-Json
   if(-not $d.performance){$d|Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{})}
   if(-not $d.performance.throughput){$d.performance|Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{})}
   $d.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps = 850  # <- substitua pelo seu valor medido
   $d|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 | Set-Content $p -Encoding UTF8
   ```
   Depois, execute novamente o **prompt Aggregator** do `codex` (aquele que você já rodou).  
   Resultado: `capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps`, `capacity.GB_per_hour` e `capacity.bottleneck` preenchidos.

2) **Fornecer perf counters (disco/rede)**  
   Salve em `codex_audit_output` arquivos `perf_counters_*.csv` no formato do `Get-Counter`:
   ```
   Timestamp,Path,CookedValue
   2025-09-01T10:00:00Z,\\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\Disk Bytes/sec,123456789
   2025-09-01T10:00:00Z,\\Network Interface(Intel)\Bytes Total/sec,98765432
   ...
   ```
   O aggregator vai calcular **p95** de `disk_MBps` e `network_MBps`.

3) **Fornecer resumos de compressão/descompressão**  
   Coloque `compress_summary_*.json` em `codex_audit_output` neste formato:
   ```json
   {
     "Timestamp": "2025-09-01T10:00:00Z",
     "InputFile": "C:\\data\\file.bin",
     "OrigBytes": 104857600,
     "CompressedBytes": 52428800,
     "ElapsedSec": 0.12,
     "MB_per_sec": 800.0
   }
   ```
   (o job já extrai **p50/p95 MB/s** e **compression_ratio**).

> Dica: se você só tem compressão no momento, use o mesmo esquema para **descompressão** (mude o comando/ferramenta) e gere `compress_summary_*.json` com a taxa de **decompressão** — ela entra como candidato a gargalo do sistema.

## Como o “capacity” é calculado
`capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps = min( decompress_MBps, disk_MBps_p95, total_MBps_p95 )`  
`capacity.GB_per_hour = throughput_sustained_MBps * 3600 / 1024`  
`capacity.bottleneck = "algo" | "disk" | "network"` (o que for o mínimo).

## Quer o coletor pronto?
Se quiser, te entrego um snippet PowerShell que:
- roda **descompressão** num arquivo de teste,
- mede `MB_per_sec`,
- exporta `compress_summary_*.json`,
- coleta perf counters simultaneamente (`perf_counters_*.csv`),
- e já deixa tudo em `codex_audit_output` para o aggregator calcular a capacidade.

---

### USUÁRIO

script que delega a função pro codex cli

---

### ASSISTENTE

beleza — aqui vai um **script PowerShell** que *deleg* a execução inteira para o **codex CLI** (ele envia um *master prompt* com tudo: recálculo de custos, atualização do dashboard/HTML/ZIP e agregação de capacidade).  
Salve como `delegate-teia-to-codex.ps1` e rode.

```powershell
<# 
  delegate-teia-to-codex.ps1
  - Envia um master prompt completo para o codex CLI executar (idempotente).
  - Inclui: Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP + Capacity Aggregator.
  - Requisitos: codex CLI acessível como "codex" ou "codex.exe" no PATH.
#>

param(
  [string]$Root = "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1",
  [int]$TimeoutSec = 900
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

function Find-CodexCli {
  $candidates = @(
    $env:CODEX_CLI,
    "codex",
    "codex.exe"
  ) | Where-Object { $_ -and $_.Trim() -ne "" }

  foreach($c in $candidates){
    try {
      $cmd = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction Stop
      if($cmd -and $cmd.Path){ return $cmd.Path }
    } catch {}
  }
  throw "codex CLI não encontrado no PATH. Defina CODEX_CLI ou instale/adicione ao PATH."
}

$Codex = Find-CodexCli

$Prompt = @"
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Capacity+Validate)
Contexto:
- Projeto: $Root
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar `$OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "$Root"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Parse pricing (vírgula ou ponto, tolerante a Markdown) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m  = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)\b")
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)")
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somar métricas (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found: $($cols -join ', ')" }
[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0

# --- 3) Assunções & Custos ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]    * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"] * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) cost_summary.json (novo + legacy) ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=[double]$sumBytes; elapsed_ms_sum=[double]$sumMs
  totalGB=[double]$totalGB; totalHours=[double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=[double]$CPU_cost; ram=[double]$RAM_cost; energy=[double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh; total=[double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status="complete"
  total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram; energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo + espelhos legacy em .cost) ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj
}
$legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue $_.Value -Force }
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) REPORT.html (Custo Computacional) ---
function BuildCostSnippet {
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$( "+(InvStr $CPU_cost)+" )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$( "+(InvStr $RAM_cost)+" )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$( "+(InvStr $Energy_cost)+" ) (kWh: "+(InvStr $Energy_kWh)+")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$( "+(InvStr $Storage_cost)+" )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$( "+(InvStr $Total_cost)+" )</strong></li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p>Tempo total: "+(InvStr $totalHours,"0.########")+" h; Dados processados: "+(InvStr $totalGB)+" GB</p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$costSnippet = BuildCostSnippet

if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pat = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"
  if ($html -match $pat) {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pat,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $costSnippet })
  } elseif ($html -match "</body>") {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",$costSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html += "`n$costSnippet`n"
  }
} else {
  $html = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# --- 7) ZIP ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY: agrega perf_counters_*.csv e compress_summary_*.json, escreve dashboard.capacity e injeta HTML ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank)
  $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){ $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}; $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else { $null } }
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null } } }

$dash = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){ $dash.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null; per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force }

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){ if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){ $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) } } }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){ if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){ $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) } } }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){ $dash.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue $compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue $diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue $netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name; $throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($bottleneck ?? "unknown") -Force
if(-not $dash.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "</body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 9) Validação rápida ---
$cs   = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dash2= Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT= Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dash2.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
"@

# --- Execução do codex CLI ---
# Observação: muitas instalações aceitam entrada via STDIN simples.
# Se o seu binário tiver flags específicas (ex.: "codex run --timeout ..."),
# ajuste as opções abaixo.

Write-Host "➡ Enviando master prompt ao codex CLI..."
$psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
$psi.FileName = $Codex
$psi.RedirectStandardInput  = $true
$psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true
$psi.RedirectStandardError  = $true
$psi.UseShellExecute = $false
$psi.Arguments = ""
$proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process
$proc.StartInfo = $psi
$null = $proc.Start()
$stdIn = $proc.StandardInput
$stdIn.WriteLine($Prompt)
$stdIn.Close()

$sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew()
while(-not $proc.HasExited){
  Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
  if($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds -gt $TimeoutSec){
    try{ $proc.Kill() }catch{}
    throw "codex CLI timeout após $TimeoutSec s"
  }
}
$sw.Stop()

$out = $proc.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()
$err = $proc.StandardError.ReadToEnd()

Write-Host "---- codex stdout ----"
Write-Host $out
if($err.Trim()){
  Write-Host "---- codex stderr ----"
  Write-Host $err
}

if($proc.ExitCode -ne 0){
  throw "codex CLI retornou código $($proc.ExitCode)"
}

Write-Host "`nOK: delegação concluída."
```

### Como usar
1) Salve como `delegate-teia-to-codex.ps1`.  
2) (Opcional) Ajuste o parâmetro `-Root` se o seu caminho do projeto for diferente.  
3) Execute no PowerShell:
```powershell
.\delegate-teia-to-codex.ps1 -Root "D:\Teia\TEIA_NUCLEO\offline\nano\teia-nucleo-procedural_0.1"
```

Pronto — isso **delega a função** ao codex CLI com o *master prompt* completo (recalcula custos, atualiza JSON/HTML/ZIP, agrega capacidade e valida).

---

### USUÁRIO

user
<title>Relatório TEIA<title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" >
<head>
<body>
$capSnippet
<body>
<html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 9) Validação rápida ---
$cs   = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dash2= Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT= Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dash2.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
"@

# --- Execução do codex CLI ---
# Observação: muitas instalações aceitam entrada via STDIN simples.
# Se o seu binário tiver flags específicas (ex.: "codex run --timeout ..."),
# ajuste as opções abaixo.

Write-Host " Enviando master prompt ao codex CLI..."
$psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
$psi.FileName = $Codex
$psi.RedirectStandardInput  = $true
$psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true
$psi.RedirectStandardError  = $true
$psi.UseShellExecute = $false
$psi.Arguments = ""
$proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process
$proc.StartInfo = $psi
$null = $proc.Start()
$stdIn = $proc.StandardInput
$stdIn.WriteLine($Prompt)
$stdIn.Close()
while(-not $proc.HasExited){
  Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
  if($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds -gt $TimeoutSec){
    try{ $proc.Kill() }catch{}
    throw "codex CLI timeout após $TimeoutSec s"
  }
}
$sw.Stop()

$out = $proc.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()
$err = $proc.StandardError.ReadToEnd()

Write-Host "---- codex stdout ----"
Write-Host $out
if($err.Trim()){
  Write-Host "---- codex stderr ----"
  Write-Host $err
}

if($proc.ExitCode -ne 0){
  throw "codex CLI retornou código $($proc.ExitCode)"
}

Write-Host "`nOK: delegação concluída."

codex
Review Outcome

- Your delegation wrapper is solid, but the embedded prompt contains several small syntax bugs that can break execution
or produce malformed HTML.

Critical Fixes

- Regex flags and decimals:
    - Replace "(im)" with "(?im)".
    - Replace ([0-9]+(:[\,\.][0-9]+)) with ([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?).
- Metrics math:
    - totalGB = $sumBytes / 1e9
    - totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0
    - Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
- Perf/Compression parsing:
    - Disk pattern: \\PhysicalDisk\\.*\\Disk Bytes/sec
    - Net pattern: \\Network Interface\\.*\\Bytes Total/sec
    - Convert to MB/s: $diskVals += ($v / 1MB) and $netVals += ($v / 1MB)
    - Derive MB/s from bytes+seconds: $mb = ($orig / 1MB) / $sec
    - Compression ratio: $ratios += ([double]$c2 / [double]$o2)
- Percentile:
    - Use rank interpolation: $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1) and interpolate between lo and hi.
- Invariant formatting:
    - Call InvStr with a space between args: InvStr $totalHours '0.########' (avoid array-to-double conversion errors).

HTML Corrections

- Cost snippet:
    - Close tags properly: </h2>, </li>, </ul>, </section>.
    - Use MB/s, GB/h.
    - Example lines:
    - `    <li>CPU: $$( $(InvStr $CPU_cost) )</li>`
    - `  </ul>`
- Capacity snippet:
    - Use MB/s, GB/h, proper tags:
    - `    <li>Throughput sustentado: $mbps MB/s</li>`
    - `    <li>Capacidade: $gbh GB/h</li>`
- HTML injection:
    - Replace existing block between markers; else insert before </body>; else append.
    - Use backtick newline: `n not n.
- Fallback HTML templates:
    - Fix malformed tags. Use:
    - `<title>Relatório TEIA</title>`
    - Close `<head>` and `<html>` correctly; single `<body>` open/close.

Capacity Math

- GB/h from MB/s: $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3)

Validation Section

- Current checks look good. Keep:
    - cost_summary.status == complete
    - REPORT_DASHBOARD.status == complete
    - Both HTML markers present

Small Safety Tweaks

- Use Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 consistently (no BOM).
- When reading JSON, always via -LiteralPath and invariant parsing for any derived doubles.

If you want, I can provide a single consolidated $Prompt string (drop‑in) that includes:

- Recalc Costs (new layout + legacy),
- Dashboard update with mirrored legacy fields,
- HTML inject for “Custo Computacional”,
- ZIP recreate,
- Capacity aggregation from optional inputs + HTML “Capacidade Atual”,
- Final validation summary.

Say “paste consolidated prompt” and I’ll include it ready to embed in delegate-teia-to-codex.ps1.

▌

---

### ASSISTENTE

perfeito — segue o **consolidated master prompt** pronto pra colar na sua variável `$Prompt` do wrapper. Ele inclui: recálculo (novo layout + `legacy`), atualização do `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` (espelho legacy em `.cost`), injeção do bloco **Custo Computacional**, recriação do ZIP, agregador de **Capacidade Atual** (p95 de disco/rede + p50 de compressão), e **validação final**.

> Troque apenas o conteúdo da sua variável `$Prompt` por este here-string.

```powershell
$Prompt = @"
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Capacity+Validate)
Contexto:
- Projeto: $Root
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar `$OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "$Root"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$enc         = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture

function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Parse pricing (vírgula ou ponto, tolerante a Markdown) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m  = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)\b")
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)")
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somar métricas (size_bytes, elapsed_ms) ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found: $($cols -join ', ')" }
[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0

# --- 3) Assunções & Custos ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]    * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"] * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts/1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) cost_summary.json (novo + legacy) ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=[double]$sumBytes; elapsed_ms_sum=[double]$sumMs
  totalGB=[double]$totalGB; totalHours=[double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=[double]$CPU_cost; ram=[double]$RAM_cost; energy=[double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh; total=[double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status="complete"
  total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram; energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (novo + espelhos legacy em .cost) ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj
}
$legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue $_.Value -Force }
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) REPORT.html (Custo Computacional) ---
function BuildCostSnippet {
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$( "+(InvStr $CPU_cost)+" )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$( "+(InvStr $RAM_cost)+" )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$( "+(InvStr $Energy_cost)+" ) (kWh: "+(InvStr $Energy_kWh)+")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$( "+(InvStr $Storage_cost)+" )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$( "+(InvStr $Total_cost)+" )</strong></li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p>Tempo total: "+(InvStr $totalHours,"0.########")+" h; Dados processados: "+(InvStr $totalGB)+" GB</p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$costSnippet = BuildCostSnippet

if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pat = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"
  if ($html -match $pat) {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pat,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $costSnippet })
  } elseif ($html -match "</body>") {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",$costSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html += "`n$costSnippet`n"
  }
} else {
  $html = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# --- 7) ZIP ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY: agrega perf_counters_*.csv e compress_summary_*.json, escreve dashboard.capacity e injeta HTML ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else { $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null; per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue $compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue $diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue $netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name; $throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($bottleneck ?? "unknown") -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "</body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 9) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
"@
```

rapid-fix no seu wrapper: antes do `while(-not $proc.HasExited){ ... }` adicione:
```powershell
$sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew()
```

se quiser, eu também te mando a versão do wrapper já com esse `$Prompt` embutido.

---

### USUÁRIO

user
  <title>Relatório TEIA<title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" >
<head>
<body>
$costSnippet
<body>
<html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# --- 7) ZIP ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY: agrega perf_counters_*.csv e compress_summary_*.json, escreve dashboard.capacity e injeta HTML ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else
{ $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null;
per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytessec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Totalsec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig1MB)$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue
$compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.01024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($bottleneck  "unknown")
-Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual<h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MBs<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GBh<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "<body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"<body>",$capSnippet + "`n<body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" >

codex
Fix Applied Block

- Corrects math ops and regex patterns.
- Uses invariant parsing and MB/s, GB/h units.
- Properly closes HTML tags and injects between markers.
- Computes p95 percentiles and GB/h accurately.
- Idempotent; preserves existing dashboard fields.

Replace your section from the first Set-Content after building $costSnippet through the end of Capacity HTML with this:

`# 6) REPORT.html write (after $costSnippet created)
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# --- 7) ZIP ---

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
}
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY: agrega perf_counters_.csv e compress_summary_.json, escreve dashboard.capacity e injeta HTML ---

function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
$a = $arr | Sort-Object
$n = $a.Count
if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
$rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
$lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
$w = $rank - $lo
return ([double]$a[$lo])(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
$s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
$d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else
{ $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
