```powershell
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else { $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null; per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue $compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue $diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue $netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name; $throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck){$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "</body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 9) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
'@
```

Se quiser, te mando também um **wrapper minimal** já com o `Stopwatch` e o `while` corretos — é só pedir.

---

### USUÁRIO

user
<title>Relatório TEIA<title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" >
<head>
<body>
$capSnippet
<body>
<html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 9) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
'@

# Substitui __ROOT__ pelo caminho real
$Prompt = $PromptTemplate.Replace('__ROOT__', $Root)

# ============================
# Execução do codex CLI
# ============================
Write-Host " Enviando master prompt ao codex CLI..."
$psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
$psi.FileName = $Codex
$psi.RedirectStandardInput  = $true
$psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true
$psi.RedirectStandardError  = $true
$psi.UseShellExecute = $false
$psi.Arguments = ""

$proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process
$proc.StartInfo = $psi
$null = $proc.Start()

# Envia o prompt e fecha STDIN
$stdIn = $proc.StandardInput
$stdIn.WriteLine($Prompt)
$stdIn.Close()

# Rapid fix: cronômetro para timeout
$sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew()

  Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
  if($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds -gt $TimeoutSec){
    try{ $proc.Kill() }catch{}
    throw "codex CLI timeout após $TimeoutSec s"
  }
}
$sw.Stop()

# Captura saídas
$out = $proc.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()
$err = $proc.StandardError.ReadToEnd()

Write-Host "---- codex stdout ----"
Write-Host $out
if($err.Trim()){
  Write-Host "---- codex stderr ----"
  Write-Host $err
}

if($proc.ExitCode -ne 0){
  throw "codex CLI retornou código $($proc.ExitCode)"
}

Write-Host "`nOK: delegação concluída."

codex
Wrapper OK

- Process launch, stdin piping, timeout stopwatch, and output capture look good.

Critical Corrections in $PromptTemplate

- Regex flags: replace "(im)" with "(?im)" in both pricing matches.
- Number capture: replace ([0-9]+(:[\,\.][0-9]+)) with ([0-9]+(?:[\\.,][0-9]+)?).
- Metrics math:
    - totalGB = $sumBytes / 1e9
    - totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0
    - Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
- Key casing: Energy_price_per_KWh → Energy_price_per_kWh (pricingObj and anywhere mirrored).
- Variable casing: energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_KWh → energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh (ensure the computed variable is


user
$PromptTemplate = @'
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Capacity+Validate)
Contexto:
- Projeto: __ROOT__
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar `$OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "__ROOT__"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture
function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Pricing (vírgulaponto) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m  = [regex]::Match($content,"(im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(:[\,\.][0-9]+))\b")
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(im)\b$kEsc\b.*([0-9]+(:[\,\.][0-9]+))")
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somatórios métricas ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join ', ')" }

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes  1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs     1000.0  3600.0

# --- 3) Custos ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]    * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"] * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts  1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) cost_summary.json ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=[double]$sumBytes; elapsed_ms_sum=[double]$sumMs
  totalGB=[double]$totalGB; totalHours=[double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=[double]$CPU_cost; ram=[double]$RAM_cost; energy=[double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh; total=[double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status="complete"
  total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_Hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram; energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj
}
$legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue $_.Value
-Force }
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) HTML: Custo Computacional ---
function BuildCostSnippet {
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Custo Computacional<h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$( " + (InvStr $CPU_cost) + " )<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$( " + (InvStr $RAM_cost) + " )<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$( " + (InvStr $Energy_cost) + " ) (kWh: " + (InvStr $Energy_kWh) + ")<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage IO: $$( " + (InvStr $Storage_cost) + " )<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$( " + (InvStr $Total_cost) + " )<strong><li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")


codex
Corrected PromptTemplate

- Fixes regex flags, math, casing, HTML tags, and injection logic.
- Adds robust capacity aggregation and proper MB/s, GB/h units.
- Idempotent; uses invariant culture; prints absolute paths + status.

`$PromptTemplate = @'

# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Capacity+Validate)

Contexto:

- Projeto: ROOT
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar `$OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---

$Root   = "ROOT"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture
function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Pricing (vírgula/ponto; tolerante) ---

if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
$kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
$m  = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[,.][0-9]+)?)\b")
if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
$kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
$m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[,.][0-9]+)?)")
if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somatórios métricas ---

if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join ', ')" }

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
[double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
[void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
[void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
$sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0

# --- 3) Custos ---

$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]    * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"] * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) cost_summary.json ---

$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
size_bytes_sum=[double]$sumBytes; elapsed_ms_sum=[double]$sumMs
totalGB=[double]$totalGB; totalHours=[double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
cpu=[double]$CPU_cost; ram=[double]$RAM_cost; energy=[double]$Energy_cost
storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh; total=[double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
status="complete"
total_mb=int ([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io
cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram; energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
status="complete"; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json ---

$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
status="complete"; pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj
}
$legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $.Key -NotePropertyValue $.Value
-Force }
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) HTML: Custo Computacional ---

function BuildCostSnippet {
$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  Custo Computacional")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    CPU: $$( " + (InvStr $CPU_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    RAM: $$( " + (InvStr $RAM_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Energia: $$( " + (InvStr $Energy_cost) + " ) (kWh: " + (InvStr $Energy_kWh) + ")")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Storage I/O: $$( " + (InvStr $Storage_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Total: $$( " + (InvStr $Total_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  Tempo total: " + (InvStr $totalHours '0.########') + " h; Dados processados: " + (InvStr
$totalGB) + " GB")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.Append("")
return $sb.ToString()
}
$costSnippet = BuildCostSnippet

if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
$html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
$pat = "[\s\S]*"
if ($html -match $pat) {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pat,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $costSnippet })
} elseif ($html -match "") {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",$costSnippet + "`n</body>")
} else {
    $html += "`n$costSnippet`n"
}
} else {
$html = @"

# --- 7) ZIP (recriar) ---

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
}
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY: agrega perf_counters_.csv e compress_summary_.json ---

function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
$a = $arr | Sort-Object
$n = $a.Count
if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
$rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
$lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
$w = $rank - $lo
return ([double]$a[$lo])(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){ $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}; $d=0.0;
if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else { $null } }
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
$dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null;
per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
$rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
}
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
$agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
}
}

if($compStats){
$dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue
$compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
}
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---

function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
$mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
$gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
$bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  Capacidade Atual")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Bottleneck: "+$bot+"")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.Append("")
return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
$html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
$pattern = "[\s\S]*"
if($html2 -match $pattern){
⚠  stream error: stream disconnected before completion: Transport error: error decoding response body; retrying 1/5
in 190ms…

    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($Here’s a corrected, drop-in $PromptTemplate. It fixes regex flags, number parsing, math
ops, key casing, HTML tags, injection points, capacity math, and units. It’s idempotent, uses invariant culture, and
prints absolute paths with status=complete.

$PromptTemplate = @'

# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Compat+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Capacity+Validate)

Contexto:

- Projeto: ROOT
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar `$OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---

$Root   = "ROOT"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture
function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Pricing (vírgula/ponto; tolerante) ---

if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
$kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
$m  = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[,.][0-9]+)?)\b")
if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
$kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
$m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[,.][0-9]+)?)")
if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somatórios métricas ---

if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:
$($cols -join ', ')" }

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
[double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
[void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
[void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
$sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0

# --- 3) Custos ---

$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]    * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"] * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) cost_summary.json ---

$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
size_bytes_sum=[double]$sumBytes; elapsed_ms_sum=[double]$sumMs
totalGB=[double]$totalGB; totalHours=[double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
cpu=[double]$CPU_cost; ram=[double]$RAM_cost; energy=[double]$Energy_cost
storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh; total=[double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
status="complete"
total_mb=int ([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io
cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram; energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
status="complete"; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json ---

$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
status="complete"; pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj
}
$legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $.Key -NotePropertyValue $.Value
-Force }
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) HTML: Custo Computacional ---

function BuildCostSnippet {
$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  Custo Computacional")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    CPU: $$( " + (InvStr $CPU_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    RAM: $$( " + (InvStr $RAM_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Energia: $$( " + (InvStr $Energy_cost) + " ) (kWh: " + (InvStr $Energy_kWh) + ")")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Storage I/O: $$( " + (InvStr $Storage_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Total: $$( " + (InvStr $Total_cost) + " )")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  Tempo total: " + (InvStr $totalHours '0.########') + " h; Dados processados: " + (InvStr
$totalGB) + " GB")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.Append("")
return $sb.ToString()
}
$costSnippet = BuildCostSnippet

if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
$html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
$pat = "[\s\S]*"
if ($html -match $pat) {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pat,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $costSnippet })
} elseif ($html -match "") {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",$costSnippet + "`n</body>")
} else {
    $html += "`n$costSnippet`n"
}
} else {
$html = @"

# --- 7) ZIP (recriar) ---

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
}
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY: agrega perf_counters_.csv e compress_summary_.json ---

function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
$a = $arr | Sort-Object
$n = $a.Count
if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
$rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
$lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
$w = $rank - $lo
return ([double]$a[$lo])(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){ $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}; $d=0.0;
if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else { $null } }
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
$dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null;
per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
$rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
}
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
$agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
}
}

if($compStats){
$dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue
$compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
}
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---

function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
$mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
$gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
$bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  Capacidade Atual")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Bottleneck: "+$bot+"")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.Append("")
return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
$html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
$pattern = "[\s\S]*"
if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
} elseif($html2 -match ""){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
} else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
$s = @"

# --- 9) Validação final ---

$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "[\s\S]*")){
throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "[\s\S]")){
throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
'@

Reminder: after creating it, replace ROOT with $Root as you already do:
$Prompt = $PromptTemplate.Replace('ROOT', $Root)

Want me to run a quick validation pass after you wire this in?

user
  <title>Relatório TEIA<title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" >
<head>
<body>
$costSnippet
<body>
<html>
"@
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8

# --- 7) ZIP ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY (perf_counters + compress_summary) ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else
{ $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null;
per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytessec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Totalsec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig1MB)$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue
$compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.01024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual<h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MBs<li>")
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "<body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"<body>",$capSnippet + "`n<body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" >

codex
Fix Summary

- Corrects math and regex typos (e.g., $p100.0, $v1MB, Bytessec).
- Uses MB/s and GB/h correctly and closes HTML tags.
- Injects “Capacidade Atual” before </body> when no markers.
- Idempotent; preserves existing dashboard fields.

Drop‑in Replacement (from “# --- 7) ZIP ---” through Capacity HTML)
Replace your block with the following:
# --- 7) ZIP ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile(
      $zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal
    ) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY (perf_counters + compress_summary) ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else
{ $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null;
per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue
$compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "</body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}
If you want, I can fold this into your full template and run a validation pass.

user

  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" >
<head>
<body>
$capSnippet
<body>
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 9) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){

}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'

codex
You’ve still got a few blocking typos in the CAPACITY + HTML fallback chunk. Here are the precise fixes and a drop‑in
replacement to make it correct and idempotent.

Critical Fixes

- Percentile: use $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1).
- Perf regex: use '\PhysicalDisk\.\Disk Bytes/sec' and '\Network Interface\.\Bytes Total/sec'.
- MB/s conversions: ($v / 1MB) not $v1MB.
- Compression: MB/s = ($orig/1MB)/$sec; ratio = ([double]$c2/[double]$o2).
- GB/h: ($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0).
- HTML: close tags; use MB/s, GB/h; inject before  when no markers.
- Fallback HTML: valid , close , single …, close .

Drop‑in Replacement (from “# --- 8) CAPACITY …” through the capacity HTML)
Use this complete block:

# --- 8) CAPACITY (perf_counters + compress_summary) ---

function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
$a = $arr | Sort-Object
$n = $a.Count
if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
$rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
$lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
$w = $rank - $lo
return ([double]$a[$lo])(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
$s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
$d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else
{ $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
$dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null;
per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
$rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
}
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
$agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
}
}

if($compStats){
$dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue
$compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
}
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }

$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force

$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force

streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

# --- HTML: Capacidade Atual ---

function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
$mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
$gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
$bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  Capacidade Atual")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("    Bottleneck: "+$bot+"")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("  ")
[void]$sb.AppendLine("")
[void]$sb.Append("")
return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
$html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
$pattern = "[\s\S]*"
if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
} elseif($html2 -match ""){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
} else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
}
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8

```powershell
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json

  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
```
