### Correções rápidas que ainda faltavam acima no seu script (faça “localizar → substituir”)
- HTML:
  - `\<title\>Relatório TEIA<title>` → `<title>Relatório TEIA</title>`
  - Remova `<head>` perdido após `<meta ...>` e **não** duplique `<body>`; deixe só um `<body> ... </body>`.
- Somatórios e energia:
  - `$totalGB    = $sumBytes  1e9` → `$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9`
  - `$totalHours = $sumMs     1000.0  3600.0` → `$totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0`
  - `$Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts  1000.0) * ...` → `($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * ...`
- Regex/perf e unidades:
  - `"Disk Bytessec"` → `"Disk Bytes/sec"`
  - `"Bytes Totalsec"` → `"Bytes Total/sec"`
  - `$v1MB` → `$v/1MB`
  - `($orig1MB)$sec` → `($orig/1MB)/$sec`
  - `([double]$c2[double]$o2)` → `([double]$c2/[double]$o2)`
  - `$rank = ($p100.0) * ($n-1)` → `$rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)`
  - `($throughput_sust*3600.01024.0)` → `($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0)`
- Listas HTML do bloco de custo:
  - Feche tags corretamente: `<h2>...</h2>`, `<ul>...</ul>`, cada item `<li>...</li>`.

Se colar o bloco acima e aplicar esses find→replace, o template fica idempotente, com HTML válido e as validações dos dois marcadores funcionando. Quer que eu compacte todas as correções “upstream” numa versão final do master prompt também?

---

### USUÁRIO

codex
Fix: Fallback HTML (valid + both blocks)
Replace your fallback with the valid structure below. It closes tags correctly and includes both blocks.
# Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
$s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
Notes

- Fixes: </title>, </head>, single <body>…</body>, closes </html>.
- Uses self-closing meta/link tags and keeps both “Custo Computacional” and “Capacidade Atual” blocks.

---

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — esse fallback HTML está **correto** e completo. ✅

Checklist rapidinho pra tudo fechar:
1) Garanta que os snippets **incluam marcadores**:
- `<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional --> ... <!-- END: Custo Computacional -->`
- `<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual --> ... <!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->`

2) Suas expressões de validação (no fim) devem usar `[\s\S]*?` (lazy):
```
"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"
"<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*?<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
```

3) Nos caminhos “com HTML existente”, injete/atualize **entre os marcadores** via `Regex.Replace`; se não houver, **insira antes de `</body>`**; se nem isso existir, use o **fallback** que você acabou de colar.

4) Evite `<body>` duplicado: mantenha **um único** `<body>…</body>` (o seu fallback já corrige).

5) Confirme que os cálculos já foram corrigidos (divisões e MB/s, GB/h):
- `$totalGB = $sumBytes / 1e9`
- `$totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0`
- `$Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours`
- MB/s: `($v / 1MB)`; GB/h: `($throughput_sust * 3600.0 / 1024.0)`

Se quiser, monto uma versão “master” final consolidando todos os fixes (pricing, métricas, custo, dashboard, capacidade, HTML e validação) num único `$PromptTemplate`.

---

### USUÁRIO

Quero ter acesso ao Dashboard. Quero ter acesso ao Dashboard. Quero ter acesso ao Dashboard. Quero ter acesso ao Dashboard.

---

### ASSISTENTE

Beleza — vamos te dar acesso **já**.

## Como abrir o Dashboard agora
No PowerShell, rode (ajuste `__ROOT__` se preciso):
```powershell
$Root="__ROOT__"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
$dashPath = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"

# 1) Ver o JSON do Dashboard (legível)
Get-Content -Raw $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20

# 2) Abrir o relatório HTML no navegador
Start-Process $htmlPath
```

## Se o HTML ainda não mostra o Dashboard
Garanta que seu HTML contenha **ambos** os blocos (os seus prompts corrigidos já fazem isso):
- `<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional --> ... <!-- END: Custo Computacional -->`
- `<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual --> ... <!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->`

E, em último caso, gere um fallback imediato:
```powershell
$costSnippet = "<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional --><section id='custo-computacional'><h2>Custo Computacional</h2></section><!-- END: Custo Computacional -->"
$capSnippet  = "<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual --><section id='capacidade-atual'><h2>Capacidade Atual</h2></section><!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->"
$s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
$s | Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Encoding UTF8
Start-Process $htmlPath
```

## Abrir só a capacidade/custos direto do JSON
```powershell
$dash = Get-Content -Raw $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
"Throughput sustentado (MB/s): " + $dash.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps
"Capacidade (GB/h): " + $dash.capacity.GB_per_hour
"Bottleneck: " + $dash.capacity.bottleneck
"Custo total (USD): " + $dash.cost.total
```

Se preferir incorporar um link “Baixar Dashboard (JSON)” dentro do HTML, adicione perto do topo do `<body>`:
```powershell
$html = Get-Content -Raw $htmlPath
$link = "<p><a href='REPORT_DASHBOARD.json' download>Baixar Dashboard (JSON)</a></p>"
$html = $html -replace '(?is)(<body[^>]*>)','$1' + "`n$link`n"
$html | Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Encoding UTF8
Start-Process $htmlPath
```

Pronto. Isso te dá acesso imediato tanto ao **JSON do Dashboard** quanto ao **Relatório HTML**.

---

### USUÁRIO

Delegue para o Codex cli Orquestrar tudo isso e fornecer até o Dashboard completo consolidado das métricas de autonomia real atual

---

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — segue **um único Master Prompt** para o Codex CLI orquestrar tudo e te entregar o **Dashboard completo** (custos + capacidade/“autonomia real”), o **HTML** com ambos os blocos e o **ZIP** com os artefatos.  
É “drop-in”: basta colar no seu `$PromptTemplate`, manter `__ROOT__` (o seu wrapper já faz o replace), e rodar seu fluxo normal.

```powershell
$PromptTemplate = @'
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (Custos + Capacidade + Dashboard + HTML + ZIP + Validação)
Contexto:
- Projeto: __ROOT__
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar `$OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "__ROOT__"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture
function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Pricing (tolerante vírgula/ponto) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m  = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[.,][0-9]+)?)\b")
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[.,][0-9]+)?)")
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somatórios métricas ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){ throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found: $($cols -join ', ')" }

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0

# --- 3) Custos ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]    * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"] * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) cost_summary.json ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=[double]$sumBytes; elapsed_ms_sum=[double]$sumMs
  totalGB=[double]$totalGB; totalHours=[double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=[double]$CPU_cost; ram=[double]$RAM_cost; energy=[double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh; total=[double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status="complete"
  total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram; energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json (base) ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj
}
$legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue $_.Value -Force }
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) HTML: Custo Computacional ---
function BuildCostSnippet {
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$( " + (InvStr $CPU_cost) + " )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$( " + (InvStr $RAM_cost) + " )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$( " + (InvStr $Energy_cost) + " ) (kWh: " + (InvStr $Energy_kWh) + ")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$( " + (InvStr $Storage_cost) + " )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$( " + (InvStr $Total_cost) + " )</strong></li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$costSnippet = BuildCostSnippet

if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pat = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"
  if ($html -match $pat) {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pat,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $costSnippet })
  } elseif ($html -match "</body>") {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",$costSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html += "`n$costSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 7) ZIP (sempre recriar) ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile($zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),
      [IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 8) CAPACITY (perf_counters + compress_summary) ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else { $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null; per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue $compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue $diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue $netMBps_p95  -Force }

# Bottleneck + autonomia (GB/h)
$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name; $throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck){$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 9) HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p><a href=""REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"" download>Baixar Dashboard (JSON)</a></p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "</body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  # Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 10) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
'@
```

### Como usar
1) Cole o conteúdo acima no seu `$PromptTemplate`.  
2) No seu wrapper, faça o `Replace('__ROOT__', $Root)` exatamente como já faz.  
3) Execute seu `codex` CLI com esse **único** prompt.

Isso vai gerar/atualizar:
- `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json` com **custos**, **performance**, **recursos** e **capacity/autonomia (GB/h)**;
- `REPORT.html` com os blocos: **Custo Computacional** e **Capacidade Atual** (e link para baixar o JSON);
- `teia_results_v3.zip` com os artefatos;
- `cost_summary.json` (compatível com o legado).

Se quiser, te mando um snippet curtinho para rodar um **smoke test** do dashboard depois da execução.

---

### USUÁRIO

user
$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name;
$throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.01024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 9) HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual<h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MBs<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GBh<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"<li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p><a href=""REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"" download>Baixar Dashboard (JSON)<a><p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "<body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"<body>",$capSnippet + "`n<body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  # Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" >

codex
Here’s a corrected, drop-in replacement for your “Capacidade Atual” block. It fixes GB/h math, closes HTML tags, uses
MB/s and GB/h units, and injects before  when markers aren’t found.

Replace your block starting at $decomp through the fallback HTML with this:
$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]

$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }

$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){
  $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1
  $bottleneck = $min.name
  $throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3)
}

$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }

$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 9) HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p><a href=""REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"" download>Baixar Dashboard (JSON)</a></p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "</body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  # Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}
Key changes

- GB/h: uses * 3600.0 / 1024.0
- Tags: </h2>, </li>, </ul>, </section>, and closing </a> and </p>
- Units: “MB/s” and “GB/h”
- Injection: inserts before </body> when no markers, not after <body>

user
<title>Relatório TEIA<title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" >
<head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
<body>
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 10) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"
'
'@

Fix Fallback HTML
Replace your fallback block with a valid template that includes both sections and proper tag closure.
# Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
$s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
Why

- Closes , , , and .
- Avoids duplicate  and  openings.
- Keeps both “Custo Computacional” and “Capacidade Atual” blocks for validation.

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — aí vai o **patch mínimo** e pronto-pra-colar para o seu *fallback* HTML (mantém os **dois blocos** e fecha todas as tags). Substitua **apenas** o trecho que monta `$s` e faz o `Set-Content`:

```powershell
# Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
$s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
```

Isso garante que a sua validação final passe, pois os marcadores de **Custo Computacional** e **Capacidade Atual** estarão presentes no HTML mesmo quando o arquivo ainda não existir.

Se quiser um **smoke test** rápido depois de rodar o Codex CLI, execute:

```powershell
# Smoke test pós-execução
$errors = @()

foreach($p in @($costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath,$zipPath)){
  if(!(Test-Path $p)){ $errors += "Arquivo ausente: $p" }
}

$htmlT = if(Test-Path $htmlPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath } else { "" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Custo Computacional' não encontrado"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Capacidade Atual' não encontrado"
}

$dashF = if(Test-Path $dashPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }
if($dashF){
  if(-not $dashF.capacity.PSObject.Properties["GB_per_hour"]){ $errors += "Dashboard sem capacity.GB_per_hour" }
  if(-not $dashF.capacity.PSObject.Properties["throughput_sustained_MBps"]){ $errors += "Dashboard sem capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps" }
}

if($errors.Count){ "SMOKE TEST: FALHOU"; $errors } else { "SMOKE TEST: OK" }
```

Se você preferir, posso te entregar novamente o **Master Prompt único** já com esse fallback e todas as correções incorporadas (custos + capacidade + dashboard + HTML + ZIP + validação).

else { "NA" }

# Smoke test pós-execução
$errors = @()

foreach($p in @($costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath,$zipPath)){
  if(!(Test-Path $p)){ $errors += "Arquivo ausente: $p" }
}

$htmlT = if(Test-Path $htmlPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath } else { "" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Custo Computacional' não encontrado"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Capacidade Atual' não encontrado"
}

$dashF = if(Test-Path $dashPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }
if($dashF){
  if(-not $dashF.capacity.PSObject.Properties["GB_per_hour"]){ $errors += "Dashboard sem capacity.GB_per_hour" }
  if(-not $dashF.capacity.PSObject.Properties["throughput_sustained_MBps"]){ $errors += "Dashboard sem
capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps" }
}

codex
Looks good. Here are a few quick hardening tweaks so the smoke test catches more issues and fails clearly.

Improvements

- Status checks: validate status="complete" in both JSONs.
- Capacity values: ensure properties exist and are non-null numbers.
- ZIP contents: verify all four expected files are inside the ZIP.
- Clear failure: throw on failure (non‑zero exit), keep simple OK message otherwise.

Drop‑In Smoke Test
# Smoke test pós-execução (robusto)
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$errors = @()

# 1) Arquivos devem existir
foreach($p in @($costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath,$zipPath)){
  if(!(Test-Path $p)){ $errors += "Arquivo ausente: $p" }
}

# 2) HTML deve conter os dois blocos marcados
$htmlT = if(Test-Path $htmlPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath } else { "" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Custo Computacional' não encontrado"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Capacidade Atual' não encontrado"
}

# 3) JSON: status e capacidade
$cs   = if(Test-Path $costPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }
$dash = if(Test-Path $dashPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }

if(-not $cs){ $errors += "Falha ao ler cost_summary.json" }
elseif($cs.status -ne 'complete'){ $errors += "cost_summary.status != complete" }

if(-not $dash){ $errors += "Falha ao ler REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" }
else {
  if($dash.status -ne 'complete'){ $errors += "dashboard.status != complete" }
  if(-not $dash.PSObject.Properties['capacity']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem nó capacity" }
  else {
    $cap = $dash.capacity
    if(-not $cap.PSObject.Properties['GB_per_hour']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem capacity.GB_per_hour" }
    if(-not $cap.PSObject.Properties['throughput_sustained_MBps']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem
capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps" }
    # Opcional: garantir não-nulos quando presentes
    if($cap.PSObject.Properties['GB_per_hour'] -and $null -eq $cap.GB_per_hour){ $errors += "capacity.GB_per_hour
é nulo" }
    if($cap.PSObject.Properties['throughput_sustained_MBps'] -and $null -eq $cap.throughput_sustained_MBps){ $errors +=
"capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps é nulo" }
  }
}

# 4) ZIP deve conter os 4 artefatos
try {
  Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem -ErrorAction Stop
  if(Test-Path $zipPath){
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($zipPath)
    $entries = $zip.Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }
    $zip.Dispose()
    $expected = @('infra_pricing_request.md','cost_summary.json','REPORT_DASHBOARD.json','REPORT.html')
    foreach($n in $expected){
      if(-not ($entries -contains $n)){ $errors += "ZIP não contém: $n" }
    }
  }
} catch {
  $errors += "Falha ao inspecionar ZIP: $($_.Exception.Message)"
}

# Resultado
if($errors.Count){
  "SMOKE TEST: FALHOU"
  $errors | ForEach-Object { "- $_" }
  throw "Smoke test falhou com $($errors.Count) erro(s)."
} else {
  "SMOKE TEST: OK"
}

### ASSISTENTE

Beleza — segue um **Master Prompt ÚNICO** (compatível com o seu Codex CLI) já com **todas as correções** consolidadas: pricing robusto, recálculo de métricas, custos, `REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`, injeção de **dois blocos** no HTML (Custo Computacional + Capacidade Atual), criação do `.zip`, capacidade agregada (perf + compress), **validação final** e **smoke test** opcional no fim. É só **colar** no seu `$PromptTemplate` (ele já substitui `__ROOT__` por `$Root` como você faz).

> Dica: mantenha apenas **um** master prompt (este) no pipeline do Codex.

```powershell
$PromptTemplate = @'
# TEIA Codex Master Prompt (All-in-One: Pricing+Recalc+Dashboard+HTML+ZIP+Capacity+Validate+Smoke)
Contexto:
- Projeto: __ROOT__
- Saída: .\codex_audit_output  (usar `$OutDir)
- Não alterar código-fonte; apenas arquivos em `$OutDir
- Idempotente; usar cultura invariante (ponto decimal) e caminhos absolutos

Aprovações: approvals write_files, run_powershell

run
pwsh.exe -NoProfile -Command '
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# --- Setup & Paths ---
$Root   = "__ROOT__"
$OutDir = Join-Path $Root "codex_audit_output"
if(!(Test-Path $OutDir)){ throw "Missing output dir: $OutDir" }

$pricingPath = Join-Path $OutDir "infra_pricing_request.md"
$metricsPath = Join-Path $OutDir "metrics_summary.csv"
$costPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "cost_summary.json"
$dashPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"
$htmlPath    = Join-Path $OutDir "REPORT.html"
$zipPath     = Join-Path $OutDir "teia_results_v3.zip"
$inv         = [Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture
function InvStr([double]$n,[string]$fmt = "0.######"){ [string]::Format($inv,"{0:$fmt}",$n) }

# --- 1) Pricing (vírgula/ponto; tolerante) ---
if(!(Test-Path $pricingPath)){ throw "Missing infra_pricing_request.md at $pricingPath" }
$content = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $pricingPath
$keys = @("CPU_price_per_hour","RAM_price_per_GB_hour","Energy_price_per_kWh","Storage_IO_price_per_GB")
$pricing = @{}
foreach($k in $keys){
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m  = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[,.][0-9]+)?)\b")
  if($m.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
foreach($k in $keys){
  if($pricing.ContainsKey($k)){ continue }
  $kEsc = [regex]::Escape($k)
  $m2 = [regex]::Match($content,"(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[,.][0-9]+)?)")
  if($m2.Success){ $pricing[$k] = [double]::Parse(($m2.Groups[1].Value -replace ",","."),$inv) }
}
$missing = @($keys | Where-Object { -not $pricing.ContainsKey($_) })
if($missing.Length -gt 0){ throw "Missing pricing keys: $($missing -join ', ') in $pricingPath" }

# --- 2) Somatórios métricas ---
if(!(Test-Path $metricsPath)){ throw "Missing metrics_summary.csv at $metricsPath" }
$csv = Import-Csv -LiteralPath $metricsPath
if(-not $csv){ throw "metrics_summary.csv is empty: $metricsPath" }
$cols = $csv[0].PSObject.Properties.Name
$sizeCol    = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^size_bytes$' })
$elapsedCol = ($cols | Where-Object { $_ -match '^elapsed_ms$' })
if(-not $sizeCol -or -not $elapsedCol){
  throw "metrics_summary.csv must contain size_bytes and elapsed_ms. Found:`n$($cols -join ', ')"
}

[double]$sumBytes = 0; [double]$sumMs = 0
foreach($row in $csv){
  [double]$b=0; [double]$e=0
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$sizeCol    -replace ",","."), [ref]$b)
  [void][double]::TryParse(($row.$elapsedCol -replace ",","."), [ref]$e)
  $sumBytes += $b; $sumMs += $e
}
$totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
$totalHours = $sumMs    / 1000.0 / 3600.0

# --- 3) Custos ---
$assumptions = [pscustomobject]@{ avg_mem_GB=0.5; cpu_cores=1.0; cpu_util=0.40; power_watts=65 }
$CPU_cost     = $pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]    * $assumptions.cpu_cores * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$RAM_cost     = $pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"] * $assumptions.avg_mem_GB * $totalHours
$Energy_kWh   = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
$Energy_cost  = $Energy_kWh * $pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
$Storage_cost = $pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"] * $totalGB
$Total_cost   = $CPU_cost + $RAM_cost + $Energy_cost + $Storage_cost

# --- 4) cost_summary.json ---
$pricingObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  CPU_price_per_hour      = [double]$pricing["CPU_price_per_hour"]
  RAM_price_per_GB_hour   = [double]$pricing["RAM_price_per_GB_hour"]
  Energy_price_per_kWh    = [double]$pricing["Energy_price_per_kWh"]
  Storage_IO_price_per_GB = [double]$pricing["Storage_IO_price_per_GB"]
}
$metricsObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  size_bytes_sum=[double]$sumBytes; elapsed_ms_sum=[double]$sumMs
  totalGB=[double]$totalGB; totalHours=[double]$totalHours
}
$costObj = [pscustomobject]@{
  cpu=[double]$CPU_cost; ram=[double]$RAM_cost; energy=[double]$Energy_cost
  storage_io=[double]$Storage_cost; energy_kwh=[double]$Energy_kWh; total=[double]$Total_cost
}
$legacy = [ordered]@{
  status="complete"
  total_mb=[int]([math]::Round($metricsObj.totalGB*1024,0))
  storage_io_price_per_GB=$pricingObj.Storage_IO_price_per_GB
  storage_io_cost=$costObj.storage_io
  cpu_price_per_hour=$pricingObj.CPU_price_per_hour
  mem_price_per_GB_hour=$pricingObj.RAM_price_per_GB_hour
  energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_KWh
  cpu_cost=$costObj.cpu; memory_cost=$costObj.ram; energy_cost=$costObj.energy; total_cost=$costObj.total
}
$costSummary=[pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; timestamp_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString("o")
  pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj; legacy=$legacy
}
$costSummary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $costPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 5) REPORT_DASHBOARD.json ---
$dash = [pscustomobject]@{
  status="complete"; pricing=$pricingObj; metrics=$metricsObj; assumptions=$assumptions; cost=$costObj
}
$legacy.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object {
  $dash.cost | Add-Member -NotePropertyName $_.Key -NotePropertyValue $_.Value -Force
}
$dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 6) HTML: Custo Computacional ---
function BuildCostSnippet {
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Custo Computacional -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""custo-computacional"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Custo Computacional</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>CPU: $$( " + (InvStr $CPU_cost) + " )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>RAM: $$( " + (InvStr $RAM_cost) + " )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Energia: $$( " + (InvStr $Energy_cost) + " ) (kWh: " + (InvStr $Energy_kWh) + ")</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Storage I/O: $$( " + (InvStr $Storage_cost) + " )</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li><strong>Total: $$( " + (InvStr $Total_cost) + " )</strong></li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Custo Computacional -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$costSnippet = BuildCostSnippet

# --- 7) HTML base / injeção do custo ---
if (Test-Path $htmlPath) {
  $html = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pat = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->"
  if ($html -match $pat) {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,$pat,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $costSnippet })
  } elseif ($html -match "</body>") {
    $html = [regex]::Replace($html,"</body>",$costSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html += "`n$costSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 8) ZIP (recriar) ---
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
if (Test-Path $zipPath) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $zipPath -Force }
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open($zipPath,[System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Create)
foreach($f in @($pricingPath,$costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath)){
  if(Test-Path $f){
    [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile(
      $zip,$f,[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f),[IO.Compression.CompressionLevel]::Optimal
    ) | Out-Null
  }
}
$zip.Dispose()

# --- 9) CAPACITY (perf_counters + compress_summary) ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else { $null }
}
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null } } }

$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null; per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 = [math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue $compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue $diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue $netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]
$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }
$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){ $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1; $bottleneck = $min.name; $throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3) }
$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck){$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 10) HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p><a href=""REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"" download>Baixar Dashboard (JSON)</a></p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $html2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  $pattern = "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  if($html2 -match $pattern){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,$pattern,[System.Text.RegularExpressions.MatchEvaluator]{ param($m) $capSnippet })
  } elseif($html2 -match "</body>"){
    $html2 = [regex]::Replace($html2,"</body>",$capSnippet + "`n</body>")
  } else {
    $html2 += "`n$capSnippet`n"
  }
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $html2 -Encoding UTF8
} else {
  # Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
  $s = @"
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>Relatório TEIA</title>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
</head>
<body>
$costSnippet
$capSnippet
</body>
</html>
"@
  Set-Content -LiteralPath $htmlPath -Value $s -Encoding UTF8
}

# --- 11) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"

# --- 12) Smoke test pós-execução (opcional, robusto) ---
$errors = @()

# 1) Arquivos devem existir
foreach($p in @($costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath,$zipPath)){
  if(!(Test-Path $p)){ $errors += "Arquivo ausente: $p" }
}

# 2) HTML deve conter os dois blocos marcados
if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
    $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Custo Computacional' não encontrado"
  }
  if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
    $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Capacidade Atual' não encontrado"
  }
}

# 3) JSON: status e capacidade
$cs2   = if(Test-Path $costPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }
$dash2r = if(Test-Path $dashPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }

if(-not $cs2){ $errors += "Falha ao ler cost_summary.json" }
elseif($cs2.status -ne 'complete'){ $errors += "cost_summary.status != complete" }

if(-not $dash2r){ $errors += "Falha ao ler REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" }
else {
  if($dash2r.status -ne 'complete'){ $errors += "dashboard.status != complete" }
  if(-not $dash2r.PSObject.Properties['capacity']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem nó capacity" }
  else {
    $cap = $dash2r.capacity
    if(-not $cap.PSObject.Properties['GB_per_hour']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem capacity.GB_per_hour" }
    if(-not $cap.PSObject.Properties['throughput_sustained_MBps']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps" }
    if($cap.PSObject.Properties['GB_per_hour'] -and $null -eq $cap.GB_per_hour){ $errors += "capacity.GB_per_hour é nulo" }
    if($cap.PSObject.Properties['throughput_sustained_MBps'] -and $null -eq $cap.throughput_sustained_MBps){ $errors += "capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps é nulo" }
  }
}

# 4) ZIP deve conter os 4 artefatos
try {
  Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem -ErrorAction Stop
  if(Test-Path $zipPath){
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($zipPath)
    $entries = $zip.Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }
    $zip.Dispose()
    $expected = @('infra_pricing_request.md','cost_summary.json','REPORT_DASHBOARD.json','REPORT.html')
    foreach($n in $expected){
      if(-not ($entries -contains $n)){ $errors += "ZIP não contém: $n" }
    }
  }
} catch {
  $errors += "Falha ao inspecionar ZIP: $($_.Exception.Message)"
}

if($errors.Count){
  "SMOKE TEST: FALHOU"
  $errors | ForEach-Object { "- $_" }
  throw "Smoke test falhou com $($errors.Count) erro(s)."
} else {
  "SMOKE TEST: OK"
}
'
'@
# Substitui __ROOT__ pelo caminho real do seu projeto
$Prompt = $PromptTemplate.Replace('__ROOT__', $Root)
```

Se quiser, te passo também um **one-liner** para chamar seu Codex CLI exatamente como você já faz, mas sem ruído — é só me dizer o caminho do binário.

---

### USUÁRIO

codexnot$$dash2r){L$errors +=l"Falhacaoaler REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" }
Drop‑in Fix (replace your entire CAPACITY + HTML block)>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
- Fixes counters regex, percentile math, MB/s conversions, GB/h calc.ad>Baixar Dashboard (JSON)<a><p>")
- Closes HTML tags; uses MB/s and GB/h; injects before .
- Fallback HTML is valid and includes both blocks.")
# --- 9) CAPACITY (perf_counters + compress_summary) ---
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.CounttmlPath){
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }th $htmlPath
  $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->"
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)

  $w = $rank - $lo-match "<body>"){
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w+ "`n<body>")
} } else {
function ParseDoubleInv([object]$x){
  $s=[string]$x; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){return $null}
  $d=0.0; if([double]::TryParse(($s -replace ",","."),[Globalization.NumberStyles]::Float,$inv,[ref]$d)){ $d } else
{ $null }
} # Fallback HTML válido (inclui os dois blocos)
function TryReadJson([string]$p){ if(Test-Path $p){ try { Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p | ConvertFrom-Json } catch
{ $null } } }l>
<html lang="pt-BR">
$dash2 = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json                7
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["performance"]){ $dash2 | Add-Member performance ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["resources"])  { $dash2 | Add-Member resources  ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.PSObject.Properties["capacity"])   { $dash2 | Add-Member capacity   ([pscustomobject]@{}) -Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["io"])      { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member io      ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.resources.PSObject.Properties["network"]) { $dash2.resources  | Add-Member network ([pscustomobject]@{})
-Force }
if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["throughput"]){
  $dash2.performance | Add-Member throughput ([pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps=$null; decompress_MBps=$null;
per_core_MBps=$null }) -Force
}

$perfCsvs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "perf_counters_*.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$compJson = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $OutDir -Filter "compress_summary_*.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$diskMBps_p95 = $null; $netMBps_p95 = $null
if($perfCsvs){
  $rows = foreach($f in $perfCsvs){ Import-Csv -LiteralPath $f.FullName }
  if($rows){
    $diskVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($diskVals.Count -gt 0){ $d = Percentile $diskVals 95; if($d -ne $null){ $diskMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$d,3) } }

    $netVals = @()
    foreach($r in $rows){
      if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){
        $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v -ne $null){ $netVals += ($v/1MB) }
      }
    }
    if($netVals.Count -gt 0){ $n = Percentile $netVals 95; if($n -ne $null){ $netMBps_p95 =
[math]::Round([double]$n,3) } }
  }
}

$compStats = $null
if($compJson){
  $agg = @(); foreach($f in $compJson){ $j = TryReadJson $f.FullName; if($j){ $agg += $j } }
  if($agg.Count -gt 0){
    $mbps=@(); $ratios=@()
    foreach($j in $agg){
      $mb = $null
      if($j.PSObject.Properties["MB_per_sec"]){ $mb = ParseDoubleInv $j.MB_per_sec }
      if($mb -eq $null){
        $orig = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $sec = ParseDoubleInv $j.ElapsedSec
        if($orig -ne $null -and $sec -ne $null -and $sec -gt 0){ $mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec }
      }
      if($mb -ne $null -and $mb -gt 0){ $mbps += [double]$mb }
      $o2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.OrigBytes; $c2 = ParseDoubleInv $j.CompressedBytes
      if($o2 -ne $null -and $o2 -gt 0 -and $c2 -ne $null){ $ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2) }
    }
    $p50 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 50),3) } else { $null }
    $p95 = if($mbps.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $mbps 95),3) } else { $null }
    $cr50= if($ratios.Count -gt 0){ [math]::Round([double](Percentile $ratios 50),6) } else { $null }
    $compStats = [pscustomobject]@{ compress_MBps_p50=$p50; compress_MBps_p95=$p95; compression_ratio_p50=$cr50 }
  }
}

if($compStats){
  $dash2.performance.throughput.compress_MBps = $compStats.compress_MBps_p50
  if(-not $dash2.performance.PSObject.Properties["compression_ratio"]){
    $dash2.performance | Add-Member -NotePropertyName compression_ratio -NotePropertyValue
$compStats.compression_ratio_p50 -Force
  }
}
if($diskMBps_p95 -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.io      | Add-Member -NotePropertyName disk_MBps_p95  -NotePropertyValue
$diskMBps_p95 -Force }
if($netMBps_p95  -ne $null){ $dash2.resources.network | Add-Member -NotePropertyName total_MBps_p95 -NotePropertyValue
$netMBps_p95  -Force }

$decomp = $dash2.performance.throughput.decompress_MBps
$disk   = $dash2.resources.io.PSObject.Properties["disk_MBps_p95"]
$net    = $dash2.resources.network.PSObject.Properties["total_MBps_p95"]

$set = @()
if($decomp){ $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="algo";    value=[double]$decomp } }
if($disk){   $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="disk";    value=[double]$dash2.resources.io.disk_MBps_p95 } }
if($net){    $set += [pscustomobject]@{ name="network"; value=[double]$dash2.resources.network.total_MBps_p95 } }

$bottleneck = $null; $throughput_sust = $null
if($set.Count -gt 0){
  $min = $set | Sort-Object value | Select-Object -First 1
  $bottleneck = $min.name
  $throughput_sust = [math]::Round([double]$min.value,3)
}

$GB_per_hour = $null
if($throughput_sust -ne $null){ $GB_per_hour = [math]::Round(($throughput_sust*3600.0/1024.0),3) }

$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName throughput_sustained_MBps -NotePropertyValue $throughput_sust -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName GB_per_hour             -NotePropertyValue $GB_per_hour    -Force
$dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName bottleneck              -NotePropertyValue ($(if($bottleneck)
{$bottleneck}else{'unknown'})) -Force
if(-not $dash2.capacity.PSObject.Properties["streams_max_p95"]){ $dash2.capacity | Add-Member -NotePropertyName
streams_max_p95 -NotePropertyValue $null -Force }

$dash2 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $dashPath -Encoding UTF8

# --- 10) HTML: Capacidade Atual ---
function BuildCapSnippet([object]$d){
  $mbps = if($d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps "0.###" }
else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }
  $bot  = if($d.capacity.bottleneck){ $d.capacity.bottleneck } else { "NA" }
  $sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<!-- BEGIN: Capacidade Atual -->")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("<section id=""capacidade-atual"">")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <h2>Capacidade Atual</h2>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Throughput sustentado: "+$mbps+" MB/s</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Capacidade: "+$gbh+" GB/h</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("    <li>Bottleneck: "+$bot+"</li>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  </ul>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("  <p><a href=""REPORT_DASHBOARD.json"" download>Baixar Dashboard (JSON)</a></p>")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("</section>")
  [void]$sb.Append("<!-- END: Capacidade Atual -->")
  return $sb.ToString()
}
$capSnippet = BuildCapSnippet $dash2

if(Test-Path $htmlPath){


user

# --- 11) Validação final ---
$cs    = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$dashF = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json
$htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
if($cs.status   -ne "complete"){ throw "cost_summary.status != complete" }
if($dashF.status -ne "complete"){ throw "dashboard.status != complete" }
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Custo Computacional not found"
}
if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
  throw "HTML block Capacidade Atual not found"
}

"UPDATED:"
$costPath
$dashPath
$htmlPath
$zipPath
"status=complete"

# --- 12) Smoke test pós-execução (opcional, robusto) ---
$errors = @()

# 1) Arquivos devem existir
foreach($p in @($costPath,$dashPath,$htmlPath,$zipPath)){
  if(!(Test-Path $p)){ $errors += "Arquivo ausente: $p" }
}

# 2) HTML deve conter os dois blocos marcados
if(Test-Path $htmlPath){
  $htmlT = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $htmlPath
  if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Custo Computacional\s*-->")){
    $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Custo Computacional' não encontrado"
  }
  if(-not ($htmlT -match "<!--\s*BEGIN:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->[\s\S]*<!--\s*END:\s*Capacidade Atual\s*-->")){
    $errors += "Bloco HTML 'Capacidade Atual' não encontrado"
  }
}

# 3) JSON: status e capacidade
$cs2   = if(Test-Path $costPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $costPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }
$dash2r = if(Test-Path $dashPath){ Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $dashPath | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $null }

if(-not $cs2){ $errors += "Falha ao ler cost_summary.json" }
elseif($cs2.status -ne 'complete'){ $errors += "cost_summary.status != complete" }

if(-not $dash2r){ $errors += "Falha ao ler REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" }
else {
  if($dash2r.status -ne 'complete'){ $errors += "dashboard.status != complete" }
  if(-not $dash2r.PSObject.Properties['capacity']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem nó capacity" }
  else {
    $cap = $dash2r.capacity
    if(-not $cap.PSObject.Properties['GB_per_hour']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem capacity.GB_per_hour" }
    if(-not $cap.PSObject.Properties['throughput_sustained_MBps']){ $errors += "Dashboard sem
capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps" }
    if($cap.PSObject.Properties['GB_per_hour'] -and $null -eq $cap.GB_per_hour){ $errors += "capacity.GB_per_hour
é nulo" }
    if($cap.PSObject.Properties['throughput_sustained_MBps'] -and $null -eq $cap.throughput_sustained_MBps){ $errors +=
"capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps é nulo" }
  }
}

  Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem -ErrorAction Stop
  if(Test-Path $zipPath){
    $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($zipPath)
    $entries = $zip.Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }
    $zip.Dispose()

} catch {

}

if($errors.Count){
  "SMOKE TEST: FALHOU"
  $errors | ForEach-Object { "- $_" }
  throw "Smoke test falhou com $($errors.Count) erro(s)."
} else {
  "SMOKE TEST: OK"
}

Percentile + Conversions + Patterns
Fix the percentile math and perf/ratio conversions:
function Percentile([double[]]$arr, [double]$p){
  if(!$arr -or $arr.Count -eq 0){ return $null }
  $a = $arr | Sort-Object
  $n = $a.Count
  if($n -eq 1){ return [double]$a[0] }
  $rank = ($p/100.0) * ($n-1)
  $lo = [math]::Floor($rank); $hi = [math]::Ceiling($rank)
  if($lo -eq $hi){ return [double]$a[$lo] }
  $w = $rank - $lo
  return ([double]$a[$lo])*(1.0-$w) + ([double]$a[$hi])*$w
}
# Disk/Net regex and MB/s
if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\PhysicalDisk\\\\.*\\\\Disk Bytes/sec")){ $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue; if($v
-ne $null){ $diskVals += ($v/1MB) } }
if($r.Path -and ($r.Path -match "\\\\Network Interface\\\\.*\\\\Bytes Total/sec")){ $v = ParseDoubleInv $r.CookedValue;
if($v -ne $null){ $netVals  += ($v/1MB) } }

# Compression MB/s and ratio
$mb = ($orig/1MB)/$sec
$ratios += ([double]$c2/[double]$o2)

else { "NA" }
  $gbh  = if($d.capacity.GB_per_hour -ne $null){ InvStr $d.capacity.GB_per_hour "0.###" } else { "NA" }

Also fix earlier lines (found above in your template)

- Pricing regex strings:
    - "(im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(:[,.][0-9]+))\b" → "(?im)^\s*$kEsc\s*[:=]\s*([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)\b"
    - "(im)\b$kEsc\b.*([0-9]+(:[,.][0-9]+))" → "(?im)\b$kEsc\b.*?([0-9]+(?:[\,\.][0-9]+)?)"
- Metrics math:
    - $totalGB    = $sumBytes / 1e9
    - $totalHours = $sumMs / 1000.0 / 3600.0
- Energy:
    - $Energy_kWh = ($assumptions.power_watts / 1000.0) * $assumptions.cpu_util * $totalHours
- Legacy key casing:
    - energy_price_per_kWh=$pricingObj.Energy_price_per_kWh (not per_KWh)

Apply these and the template will be valid, idempotent, and pass your final and smoke validations.
Onde está o Dashboard que estamos buscando até agora?

---

### ASSISTENTE

Ele já fica gerado como **arquivo JSON** e embutido no **HTML** no seu `OutDir`.

### Onde está
- **JSON (dashboard completo):**  
  `__ROOT__\codex_audit_output\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json`
- **HTML (com os blocos + link p/ baixar o JSON):**  
  `__ROOT__\codex_audit_output\REPORT.html`  
  (contém “Custo Computacional” e “Capacidade Atual”, e um link *Baixar Dashboard (JSON)*)

> Obs.: se você usou meu master prompt “all-in-one”, esses dois arquivos são atualizados em cada execução, e o ZIP `teia_results_v3.zip` no mesmo diretório agrega todos os artefatos.

### Como abrir rápido (PowerShell)
```powershell
# Ver dashboard no console
Get-Content -Raw "__ROOT__\codex_audit_output\REPORT_DASHBOARD.json" |
  ConvertFrom-Json | Format-List * -Force

# Abrir o relatório HTML no navegador
Start-Process "__ROOT__\codex_audit_output\REPORT.html"

# Conferir que o ZIP contém tudo
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$z = [IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead("__ROOT__\codex_audit_output\teia_results_v3.zip")
$z.Entries | Select-Object FullName
$z.Dispose()
```

### O que você deve ver no JSON
Campos principais (exemplo de chaves):
- `status: "complete"`
- `pricing`, `metrics`, `assumptions`, `cost`
- `performance.throughput.compress_MBps`, `compression_ratio`
- `resources.io.disk_MBps_p95`, `resources.network.total_MBps_p95`
- `capacity.throughput_sustained_MBps`, `capacity.GB_per_hour`, `capacity.bottleneck`

Se **não** encontrar esses arquivos, rode o *smoke test* que incluí no prompt (ele acusa o que faltou) e confira se o `OutDir` está correto (`$Root\codex_audit_output`) e se o fallback HTML válido (com **ambos** os blocos) foi aplicado.
